dn15:2.2
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā jarāmaraṇan’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇan’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.3
Pali: ‘Atthi idappaccayā jātī’ti iti puṭṭhena satā, ānanda, atthītissa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.4
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā jātī’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘bhavapaccayā jātī’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.5
Pali: ‘Atthi idappaccayā bhavo’ti iti puṭṭhena satā, ānanda, atthītissa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.6
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā bhavo’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘upādānapaccayā bhavo’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.7
Pali: ‘Atthi idappaccayā upādānan’ti iti puṭṭhena satā, ānanda, atthītissa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.8
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā upādānan’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘taṇhāpaccayā upādānan’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.9
Pali: ‘Atthi idappaccayā taṇhā’ti iti puṭṭhena satā, ānanda, atthītissa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.10
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā taṇhā’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘vedanāpaccayā taṇhā’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.11
Pali: ‘Atthi idappaccayā vedanā’ti iti puṭṭhena satā, ānanda, atthītissa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.12
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā vedanā’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘phassapaccayā vedanā’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.13
Pali: ‘Atthi idappaccayā phasso’ti iti puṭṭhena satā, ānanda, atthītissa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.14
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā phasso’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘nāmarūpapaccayā phasso’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.15
Pali: ‘Atthi idappaccayā nāmarūpan’ti iti puṭṭhena satā, ānanda, atthītissa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.16
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā nāmarūpan’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘viññāṇapaccayā nāmarūpan’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.17
Pali: ‘Atthi idappaccayā viññāṇan’ti iti puṭṭhena satā, ānanda, atthītissa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:2.18
Pali: ‘Kiṁpaccayā viññāṇan’ti iti ce vadeyya, ‘nāmarūpapaccayā viññāṇan’ti iccassa vacanīyaṁ. 

dn15:3.1
Pali: Iti kho, ānanda, nāmarūpapaccayā viññāṇaṁ, viññāṇapaccayā nāmarūpaṁ, nāmarūpapaccayā phasso, phassapaccayā vedanā, vedanāpaccayā taṇhā, taṇhāpaccayā upādānaṁ, upādānapaccayā bhavo, bhavapaccayā jāti, jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇaṁ sokaparidevadukkhadomanassupāyāsā sambhavanti. 

dn15:3.2
Pali: Evametassa kevalassa dukkhakkhandhassa samudayo hoti. 

dn15:4.1
Pali: ‘Jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇan’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇaṁ. 

dn15:4.2
Pali: Jāti ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, seyyathidaṁ—

dn15:4.3
Pali: devānaṁ vā devattāya, gandhabbānaṁ vā gandhabbattāya, yakkhānaṁ vā yakkhattāya, bhūtānaṁ vā bhūtattāya, manussānaṁ vā manussattāya, catuppadānaṁ vā catuppadattāya, pakkhīnaṁ vā pakkhittāya, sarīsapānaṁ vā sarīsapattāya, tesaṁ tesañca hi, ānanda, sattānaṁ tadattāya jāti nābhavissa. Sabbaso jātiyā asati jātinirodhā api nu kho jarāmaraṇaṁ paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:4.4
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:4.5
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo jarāmaraṇassa, yadidaṁ jāti. 

dn15:5.1
Pali: ‘Bhavapaccayā jātī’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā bhavapaccayā jāti. 

dn15:5.2
Pali: Bhavo ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, seyyathidaṁ—

dn15:5.3
Pali: kāmabhavo vā rūpabhavo vā arūpabhavo vā, sabbaso bhave asati bhavanirodhā api nu kho jāti paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:5.4
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:5.5
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo jātiyā, yadidaṁ bhavo. 

dn15:6.1
Pali: ‘Upādānapaccayā bhavo’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā upādānapaccayā bhavo. 

dn15:6.2
Pali: Upādānañca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, seyyathidaṁ—

dn15:6.3
Pali: kāmupādānaṁ vā diṭṭhupādānaṁ vā sīlabbatupādānaṁ vā attavādupādānaṁ vā, sabbaso upādāne asati upādānanirodhā api nu kho bhavo paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:6.4
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:6.5
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo bhavassa, yadidaṁ upādānaṁ. 

dn15:7.1
Pali: ‘Taṇhāpaccayā upādānan’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā taṇhāpaccayā upādānaṁ. 

dn15:7.2
Pali: Taṇhā ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, seyyathidaṁ—

dn15:7.3
Pali: rūpataṇhā saddataṇhā gandhataṇhā rasataṇhā phoṭṭhabbataṇhā dhammataṇhā, sabbaso taṇhāya asati taṇhānirodhā api nu kho upādānaṁ paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:7.4
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:7.5
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo upādānassa, yadidaṁ taṇhā. 

dn15:8.1
Pali: ‘Vedanāpaccayā taṇhā’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā vedanāpaccayā taṇhā. 

dn15:8.2
Pali: Vedanā ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, seyyathidaṁ—

dn15:8.3
Pali: cakkhusamphassajā vedanā sotasamphassajā vedanā ghānasamphassajā vedanā jivhāsamphassajā vedanā kāyasamphassajā vedanā manosamphassajā vedanā, sabbaso vedanāya asati vedanānirodhā api nu kho taṇhā paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:8.4
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:8.5
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo taṇhāya, yadidaṁ vedanā. 

dn15:9.1
Pali: Iti kho panetaṁ, ānanda, vedanaṁ paṭicca taṇhā, taṇhaṁ paṭicca pariyesanā, pariyesanaṁ paṭicca lābho, lābhaṁ paṭicca vinicchayo, vinicchayaṁ paṭicca chandarāgo, chandarāgaṁ paṭicca ajjhosānaṁ, ajjhosānaṁ paṭicca pariggaho, pariggahaṁ paṭicca macchariyaṁ, macchariyaṁ paṭicca ārakkho. 

dn15:9.2
Pali: Ārakkhādhikaraṇaṁ daṇḍādānasatthādānakalahaviggahavivādatuvaṁtuvaṁpesuññamusāvādā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti. 

dn15:10.1
Pali: ‘Ārakkhādhikaraṇaṁ daṇḍādānasatthādānakalahaviggahavivādatuvaṁtuvaṁpesuññamusāvādā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavantī’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā ārakkhādhikaraṇaṁ daṇḍādānasatthādānakalahaviggahavivādatuvaṁtuvaṁpesuññamusāvādā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti. 

dn15:10.2
Pali: Ārakkho ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, sabbaso ārakkhe asati ārakkhanirodhā api nu kho daṇḍādānasatthādānakalahaviggahavivādatuvaṁtuvaṁpesuññamusāvādā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhaveyyun”ti? 

dn15:10.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:10.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo daṇḍādānasatthādānakalahaviggahavivādatuvaṁtuvaṁpesuññamusāvādānaṁ anekesaṁ pāpakānaṁ akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ sambhavāya yadidaṁ ārakkho. 

dn15:11.1
Pali: ‘Macchariyaṁ paṭicca ārakkho’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā macchariyaṁ paṭicca ārakkho. 

dn15:11.2
Pali: Macchariyañca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, sabbaso macchariye asati macchariyanirodhā api nu kho ārakkho paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:11.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:11.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo ārakkhassa, yadidaṁ macchariyaṁ. 

dn15:12.1
Pali: ‘Pariggahaṁ paṭicca macchariyan’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā pariggahaṁ paṭicca macchariyaṁ. 

dn15:12.2
Pali: Pariggaho ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, sabbaso pariggahe asati pariggahanirodhā api nu kho macchariyaṁ paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:12.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:12.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo macchariyassa, yadidaṁ pariggaho. 

dn15:13.1
Pali: ‘Ajjhosānaṁ paṭicca pariggaho’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā ajjhosānaṁ paṭicca pariggaho. 

dn15:13.2
Pali: Ajjhosānañca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, sabbaso ajjhosāne asati ajjhosānanirodhā api nu kho pariggaho paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:13.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:13.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo pariggahassa—yadidaṁ ajjhosānaṁ. 

dn15:14.1
Pali: ‘Chandarāgaṁ paṭicca ajjhosānan’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā chandarāgaṁ paṭicca ajjhosānaṁ. 

dn15:14.2
Pali: Chandarāgo ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, sabbaso chandarāge asati chandarāganirodhā api nu kho ajjhosānaṁ paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:14.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:14.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo ajjhosānassa, yadidaṁ chandarāgo. 

dn15:15.1
Pali: ‘Vinicchayaṁ paṭicca chandarāgo’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā vinicchayaṁ paṭicca chandarāgo. 

dn15:15.2
Pali: Vinicchayo ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, sabbaso vinicchaye asati vinicchayanirodhā api nu kho chandarāgo paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:15.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:15.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo chandarāgassa, yadidaṁ vinicchayo. 

dn15:16.1
Pali: ‘Lābhaṁ paṭicca vinicchayo’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā lābhaṁ paṭicca vinicchayo. 

dn15:16.2
Pali: Lābho ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, sabbaso lābhe asati lābhanirodhā api nu kho vinicchayo paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:16.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:16.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo vinicchayassa, yadidaṁ lābho. 

dn15:17.1
Pali: ‘Pariyesanaṁ paṭicca lābho’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā pariyesanaṁ paṭicca lābho. 

dn15:17.2
Pali: Pariyesanā ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, sabbaso pariyesanāya asati pariyesanānirodhā api nu kho lābho paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:17.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:17.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo lābhassa, yadidaṁ pariyesanā. 

dn15:18.1
Pali: ‘Taṇhaṁ paṭicca pariyesanā’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā taṇhaṁ paṭicca pariyesanā. 

dn15:18.2
Pali: Taṇhā ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, seyyathidaṁ—

dn15:18.3
Pali: kāmataṇhā bhavataṇhā vibhavataṇhā, sabbaso taṇhāya asati taṇhānirodhā api nu kho pariyesanā paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:18.4
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:18.5
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo pariyesanāya, yadidaṁ taṇhā. 

dn15:18.6
Pali: Iti kho, ānanda, ime dve dhammā dvayena vedanāya ekasamosaraṇā bhavanti. 

dn15:19.1
Pali: ‘Phassapaccayā vedanā’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā phassapaccayā vedanā. 

dn15:19.2
Pali: Phasso ca hi, ānanda, nābhavissa sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ kassaci kimhici, seyyathidaṁ—

dn15:19.3
Pali: cakkhusamphasso sotasamphasso ghānasamphasso jivhāsamphasso kāyasamphasso manosamphasso, sabbaso phasse asati phassanirodhā api nu kho vedanā paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:19.4
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:19.5
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo vedanāya, yadidaṁ phasso. 

dn15:20.1
Pali: ‘Nāmarūpapaccayā phasso’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā nāmarūpapaccayā phasso. 

dn15:20.2
Pali: Yehi, ānanda, ākārehi yehi liṅgehi yehi nimittehi yehi uddesehi nāmakāyassa paññatti hoti, tesu ākāresu tesu liṅgesu tesu nimittesu tesu uddesesu asati api nu kho rūpakāye adhivacanasamphasso paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:20.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:20.4
Pali: “Yehi, ānanda, ākārehi yehi liṅgehi yehi nimittehi yehi uddesehi rūpakāyassa paññatti hoti, tesu ākāresu …pe… tesu uddesesu asati api nu kho nāmakāye paṭighasamphasso paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:20.5
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:20.6
Pali: “Yehi, ānanda, ākārehi …pe… yehi uddesehi nāmakāyassa ca rūpakāyassa ca paññatti hoti, tesu ākāresu …pe… tesu uddesesu asati api nu kho adhivacanasamphasso vā paṭighasamphasso vā paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:20.7
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:20.8
Pali: “Yehi, ānanda, ākārehi …pe… yehi uddesehi nāmarūpassa paññatti hoti, tesu ākāresu …pe… tesu uddesesu asati api nu kho phasso paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:20.9
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:20.10
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo phassassa, yadidaṁ nāmarūpaṁ. 

dn15:21.1
Pali: ‘Viññāṇapaccayā nāmarūpan’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā viññāṇapaccayā nāmarūpaṁ. 

dn15:21.2
Pali: Viññāṇañca hi, ānanda, mātukucchismiṁ na okkamissatha, api nu kho nāmarūpaṁ mātukucchismiṁ samuccissathā”ti? 

dn15:21.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:21.4
Pali: “Viññāṇañca hi, ānanda, mātukucchismiṁ okkamitvā vokkamissatha, api nu kho nāmarūpaṁ itthattāya abhinibbattissathā”ti? 

dn15:21.5
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:21.6
Pali: “Viññāṇañca hi, ānanda, daharasseva sato vocchijjissatha kumārakassa vā kumārikāya vā, api nu kho nāmarūpaṁ vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjissathā”ti? 

dn15:21.7
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:21.8
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo nāmarūpassa—yadidaṁ viññāṇaṁ. 

dn15:22.1
Pali: ‘Nāmarūpapaccayā viññāṇan’ti iti kho panetaṁ vuttaṁ, tadānanda, imināpetaṁ pariyāyena veditabbaṁ, yathā nāmarūpapaccayā viññāṇaṁ. 

dn15:22.2
Pali: Viññāṇañca hi, ānanda, nāmarūpe patiṭṭhaṁ na labhissatha, api nu kho āyatiṁ jātijarāmaraṇaṁ dukkhasamudayasambhavo paññāyethā”ti? 

dn15:22.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:22.4
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, eseva hetu etaṁ nidānaṁ esa samudayo esa paccayo viññāṇassa yadidaṁ nāmarūpaṁ. 

dn15:22.5
Pali: Ettāvatā kho, ānanda, jāyetha vā jīyetha vā mīyetha vā cavetha vā upapajjetha vā. 

dn15:22.6
Pali: Ettāvatā adhivacanapatho, ettāvatā niruttipatho, ettāvatā paññattipatho, ettāvatā paññāvacaraṁ, ettāvatā vaṭṭaṁ vattati itthattaṁ paññāpanāya yadidaṁ nāmarūpaṁ saha viññāṇena aññamaññapaccayatā pavattati. 

dn15:23.0
Pali: 2. Attapaññatti 

dn15:23.1
Pali: Kittāvatā ca, ānanda, attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti? 

dn15:23.2
Pali: Rūpiṁ vā hi, ānanda, parittaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti: 

dn15:23.3
Pali: ‘rūpī me paritto attā’ti. 

dn15:23.4
Pali: Rūpiṁ vā hi, ānanda, anantaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti: 

dn15:23.5
Pali: ‘rūpī me ananto attā’ti. 

dn15:23.6
Pali: Arūpiṁ vā hi, ānanda, parittaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti: 

dn15:23.7
Pali: ‘arūpī me paritto attā’ti. 

dn15:23.8
Pali: Arūpiṁ vā hi, ānanda, anantaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti: 

dn15:23.9
Pali: ‘arūpī me ananto attā’ti. 

dn15:24.1
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so rūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti. 

dn15:24.2
Pali: Etarahi vā so rūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti, tattha bhāviṁ vā so rūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti, ‘atathaṁ vā pana santaṁ tathattāya upakappessāmī’ti iti vā panassa hoti. 

dn15:24.3
Pali: Evaṁ santaṁ kho, ānanda, rūpiṁ parittattānudiṭṭhi anusetīti iccālaṁ vacanāya. 

dn15:24.4
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so rūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti. 

dn15:24.5
Pali: Etarahi vā so rūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti, tattha bhāviṁ vā so rūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti, ‘atathaṁ vā pana santaṁ tathattāya upakappessāmī’ti iti vā panassa hoti. 

dn15:24.6
Pali: Evaṁ santaṁ kho, ānanda, rūpiṁ anantattānudiṭṭhi anusetīti iccālaṁ vacanāya. 

dn15:24.7
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so arūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti. 

dn15:24.8
Pali: Etarahi vā so arūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti, tattha bhāviṁ vā so arūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti, ‘atathaṁ vā pana santaṁ tathattāya upakappessāmī’ti iti vā panassa hoti. 

dn15:24.9
Pali: Evaṁ santaṁ kho, ānanda, arūpiṁ parittattānudiṭṭhi anusetīti iccālaṁ vacanāya. 

dn15:24.10
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so arūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti. 

dn15:24.11
Pali: Etarahi vā so arūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti, tattha bhāviṁ vā so arūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti, ‘atathaṁ vā pana santaṁ tathattāya upakappessāmī’ti iti vā panassa hoti. 

dn15:24.12
Pali: Evaṁ santaṁ kho, ānanda, arūpiṁ anantattānudiṭṭhi anusetīti iccālaṁ vacanāya. 

dn15:24.13
Pali: Ettāvatā kho, ānanda, attānaṁ paññapento paññapeti. 

dn15:25.0
Pali: 3. Naattapaññatti 

dn15:25.1
Pali: Kittāvatā ca, ānanda, attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti? 

dn15:25.2
Pali: Rūpiṁ vā hi, ānanda, parittaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti: 

dn15:25.3
Pali: ‘rūpī me paritto attā’ti. 

dn15:25.4
Pali: Rūpiṁ vā hi, ānanda, anantaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti: 

dn15:25.5
Pali: ‘rūpī me ananto attā’ti. 

dn15:25.6
Pali: Arūpiṁ vā hi, ānanda, parittaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti: 

dn15:25.7
Pali: ‘arūpī me paritto attā’ti. 

dn15:25.8
Pali: Arūpiṁ vā hi, ānanda, anantaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti: 

dn15:25.9
Pali: ‘arūpī me ananto attā’ti. 

dn15:26.1
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so rūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti. 

dn15:26.2
Pali: Etarahi vā so rūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti, tattha bhāviṁ vā so rūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti, ‘atathaṁ vā pana santaṁ tathattāya upakappessāmī’ti iti vā panassa na hoti. 

dn15:26.3
Pali: Evaṁ santaṁ kho, ānanda, rūpiṁ parittattānudiṭṭhi nānusetīti iccālaṁ vacanāya. 

dn15:26.4
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so rūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti. 

dn15:26.5
Pali: Etarahi vā so rūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti, tattha bhāviṁ vā so rūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti, ‘atathaṁ vā pana santaṁ tathattāya upakappessāmī’ti iti vā panassa na hoti. 

dn15:26.6
Pali: Evaṁ santaṁ kho, ānanda, rūpiṁ anantattānudiṭṭhi nānusetīti iccālaṁ vacanāya. 

dn15:26.7
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so arūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti. 

dn15:26.8
Pali: Etarahi vā so arūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti, tattha bhāviṁ vā so arūpiṁ parittaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti, ‘atathaṁ vā pana santaṁ tathattāya upakappessāmī’ti iti vā panassa na hoti. 

dn15:26.9
Pali: Evaṁ santaṁ kho, ānanda, arūpiṁ parittattānudiṭṭhi nānusetīti iccālaṁ vacanāya. 

dn15:26.10
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so arūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti. 

dn15:26.11
Pali: Etarahi vā so arūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti, tattha bhāviṁ vā so arūpiṁ anantaṁ attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti, ‘atathaṁ vā pana santaṁ tathattāya upakappessāmī’ti iti vā panassa na hoti. 

dn15:26.12
Pali: Evaṁ santaṁ kho, ānanda, arūpiṁ anantattānudiṭṭhi nānusetīti iccālaṁ vacanāya. 

dn15:26.13
Pali: Ettāvatā kho, ānanda, attānaṁ na paññapento na paññapeti. 

dn15:27.0
Pali: 4. Attasamanupassanā 

dn15:27.1
Pali: Kittāvatā ca, ānanda, attānaṁ samanupassamāno samanupassati? 

dn15:27.2
Pali: Vedanaṁ vā hi, ānanda, attānaṁ samanupassamāno samanupassati: 

dn15:27.3
Pali: ‘vedanā me attā’ti. 

dn15:27.4
Pali: ‘Na heva kho me vedanā attā, appaṭisaṁvedano me attā’ti iti vā hi, ānanda, attānaṁ samanupassamāno samanupassati. 

dn15:27.5
Pali: ‘Na heva kho me vedanā attā, nopi appaṭisaṁvedano me attā, attā me vediyati, vedanādhammo hi me attā’ti iti vā hi, ānanda, attānaṁ samanupassamāno samanupassati. 

dn15:28.1
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so evamāha: 

dn15:28.2
Pali: ‘vedanā me attā’ti, 

dn15:28.3
Pali: so evamassa vacanīyo: 

dn15:28.4
Pali: ‘tisso kho imā, āvuso, vedanā—

dn15:28.5
Pali: sukhā vedanā dukkhā vedanā adukkhamasukhā vedanā. 

dn15:28.6
Pali: Imāsaṁ kho tvaṁ tissannaṁ vedanānaṁ katamaṁ attato samanupassasī’ti? 

dn15:28.7
Pali: Yasmiṁ, ānanda, samaye sukhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti, neva tasmiṁ samaye dukkhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti, na adukkhamasukhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti; 

dn15:28.8
Pali: sukhaṁyeva tasmiṁ samaye vedanaṁ vedeti. 

dn15:28.9
Pali: Yasmiṁ, ānanda, samaye dukkhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti, neva tasmiṁ samaye sukhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti, na adukkhamasukhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti; 

dn15:28.10
Pali: dukkhaṁyeva tasmiṁ samaye vedanaṁ vedeti. 

dn15:28.11
Pali: Yasmiṁ, ānanda, samaye adukkhamasukhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti, neva tasmiṁ samaye sukhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti, na dukkhaṁ vedanaṁ vedeti; 

dn15:28.12
Pali: adukkhamasukhaṁyeva tasmiṁ samaye vedanaṁ vedeti. 

dn15:29.1
Pali: Sukhāpi kho, ānanda, vedanā aniccā saṅkhatā paṭiccasamuppannā khayadhammā vayadhammā virāgadhammā nirodhadhammā. 

dn15:29.2
Pali: Dukkhāpi kho, ānanda, vedanā aniccā saṅkhatā paṭiccasamuppannā khayadhammā vayadhammā virāgadhammā nirodhadhammā. 

dn15:29.3
Pali: Adukkhamasukhāpi kho, ānanda, vedanā aniccā saṅkhatā paṭiccasamuppannā khayadhammā vayadhammā virāgadhammā nirodhadhammā. 

dn15:29.4
Pali: Tassa sukhaṁ vedanaṁ vediyamānassa ‘eso me attā’ti hoti. 

dn15:29.5
Pali: Tassāyeva sukhāya vedanāya nirodhā ‘byagā me attā’ti hoti. 

dn15:29.6
Pali: Dukkhaṁ vedanaṁ vediyamānassa ‘eso me attā’ti hoti. 

dn15:29.7
Pali: Tassāyeva dukkhāya vedanāya nirodhā ‘byagā me attā’ti hoti. 

dn15:29.8
Pali: Adukkhamasukhaṁ vedanaṁ vediyamānassa ‘eso me attā’ti hoti. 

dn15:29.9
Pali: Tassāyeva adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya nirodhā ‘byagā me attā’ti hoti. 

dn15:29.10
Pali: Iti so diṭṭheva dhamme aniccasukhadukkhavokiṇṇaṁ uppādavayadhammaṁ attānaṁ samanupassamāno samanupassati, yo so evamāha: ‘vedanā me attā’ti. 

dn15:29.11
Pali: Tasmātihānanda, etena petaṁ nakkhamati: ‘vedanā me attā’ti samanupassituṁ. 

dn15:30.1
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so evamāha: 

dn15:30.2
Pali: ‘na heva kho me vedanā attā, appaṭisaṁvedano me attā’ti, so evamassa vacanīyo: 

dn15:30.3
Pali: ‘yattha panāvuso, sabbaso vedayitaṁ natthi api nu kho, tattha “ayamahamasmī”ti siyā’”ti? 

dn15:30.4
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:30.5
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, etena petaṁ nakkhamati: ‘na heva kho me vedanā attā, appaṭisaṁvedano me attā’ti samanupassituṁ. 

dn15:31.1
Pali: Tatrānanda, yo so evamāha: 

dn15:31.2
Pali: ‘na heva kho me vedanā attā, nopi appaṭisaṁvedano me attā, attā me vediyati, vedanādhammo hi me attā’ti. 

dn15:31.3
Pali: So evamassa vacanīyo—

dn15:31.4
Pali: vedanā ca hi, āvuso, sabbena sabbaṁ sabbathā sabbaṁ aparisesā nirujjheyyuṁ. 

dn15:31.5
Pali: Sabbaso vedanāya asati vedanānirodhā api nu kho tattha ‘ayamahamasmī’ti siyā”ti? 

dn15:31.6
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:31.7
Pali: “Tasmātihānanda, etena petaṁ nakkhamati: ‘na heva kho me vedanā attā, nopi appaṭisaṁvedano me attā, attā me vediyati, vedanādhammo hi me attā’ti samanupassituṁ. 

dn15:32.1
Pali: Yato kho, ānanda, bhikkhu neva vedanaṁ attānaṁ samanupassati, nopi appaṭisaṁvedanaṁ attānaṁ samanupassati, nopi ‘attā me vediyati, vedanādhammo hi me attā’ti samanupassati. 

dn15:32.2
Pali: So evaṁ na samanupassanto na ca kiñci loke upādiyati, 

dn15:32.3
Pali: anupādiyaṁ na paritassati, aparitassaṁ paccattaññeva parinibbāyati, 

dn15:32.4
Pali: ‘khīṇā jāti, vusitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ, kataṁ karaṇīyaṁ, nāparaṁ itthattāyā’ti pajānāti. 

dn15:32.5
Pali: Evaṁ vimuttacittaṁ kho, ānanda, bhikkhuṁ yo evaṁ vadeyya: 

dn15:32.6
Pali: ‘hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā itissa diṭṭhī’ti, tadakallaṁ. 

dn15:32.7
Pali: ‘Na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā itissa diṭṭhī’ti, tadakallaṁ. 

dn15:32.8
Pali: ‘Hoti ca na ca hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā itissa diṭṭhī’ti, tadakallaṁ. 

dn15:32.9
Pali: ‘Neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā itissa diṭṭhī’ti, tadakallaṁ. 

dn15:32.10
Pali: Taṁ kissa hetu? 

dn15:32.11
Pali: Yāvatā, ānanda, adhivacanaṁ yāvatā adhivacanapatho, yāvatā nirutti yāvatā niruttipatho, yāvatā paññatti yāvatā paññattipatho, yāvatā paññā yāvatā paññāvacaraṁ, yāvatā vaṭṭaṁ, yāvatā vaṭṭati, tadabhiññāvimutto bhikkhu, tadabhiññāvimuttaṁ bhikkhuṁ ‘na jānāti na passati itissa diṭṭhī’ti, tadakallaṁ. 

dn15:33.0
Pali: 5. Sattaviññāṇaṭṭhiti 

dn15:33.1
Pali: Satta kho, ānanda, viññāṇaṭṭhitiyo, dve āyatanāni. 

dn15:33.2
Pali: Katamā satta? 

dn15:33.3
Pali: Santānanda, sattā nānattakāyā nānattasaññino, seyyathāpi manussā, ekacce ca devā, ekacce ca vinipātikā. 

dn15:33.4
Pali: Ayaṁ paṭhamā viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn15:33.5
Pali: Santānanda, sattā nānattakāyā ekattasaññino, seyyathāpi devā brahmakāyikā paṭhamābhinibbattā. 

dn15:33.6
Pali: Ayaṁ dutiyā viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn15:33.7
Pali: Santānanda, sattā ekattakāyā nānattasaññino, seyyathāpi devā ābhassarā. 

dn15:33.8
Pali: Ayaṁ tatiyā viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn15:33.9
Pali: Santānanda, sattā ekattakāyā ekattasaññino, seyyathāpi devā subhakiṇhā. 

dn15:33.10
Pali: Ayaṁ catutthī viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn15:33.11
Pali: Santānanda, sattā sabbaso rūpasaññānaṁ samatikkamā paṭighasaññānaṁ atthaṅgamā nānattasaññānaṁ amanasikārā ‘ananto ākāso’ti ākāsānañcāyatanūpagā. 

dn15:33.12
Pali: Ayaṁ pañcamī viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn15:33.13
Pali: Santānanda, sattā sabbaso ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma ‘anantaṁ viññāṇan’ti viññāṇañcāyatanūpagā. 

dn15:33.14
Pali: Ayaṁ chaṭṭhī viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn15:33.15
Pali: Santānanda, sattā sabbaso viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma ‘natthi kiñcī’ti ākiñcaññāyatanūpagā. 

dn15:33.16
Pali: Ayaṁ sattamī viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn15:33.17
Pali: Asaññasattāyatanaṁ nevasaññānāsaññāyatanameva dutiyaṁ. 

dn15:34.1
Pali: Tatrānanda, yāyaṁ paṭhamā viññāṇaṭṭhiti nānattakāyā nānattasaññino, seyyathāpi manussā, ekacce ca devā, ekacce ca vinipātikā. 

dn15:34.2
Pali: Yo nu kho, ānanda, tañca pajānāti, tassā ca samudayaṁ pajānāti, tassā ca atthaṅgamaṁ pajānāti, tassā ca assādaṁ pajānāti, tassā ca ādīnavaṁ pajānāti, tassā ca nissaraṇaṁ pajānāti, kallaṁ nu tena tadabhinanditun”ti? 

dn15:34.3
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante” …pe… 

dn15:34.4
Pali: “tatrānanda, yamidaṁ asaññasattāyatanaṁ. 

dn15:34.5
Pali: Yo nu kho, ānanda, tañca pajānāti, tassa ca samudayaṁ pajānāti, tassa ca atthaṅgamaṁ pajānāti, tassa ca assādaṁ pajānāti, tassa ca ādīnavaṁ pajānāti, tassa ca nissaraṇaṁ pajānāti, kallaṁ nu tena tadabhinanditun”ti? 

dn15:34.6
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:34.7
Pali: “Tatrānanda, yamidaṁ nevasaññānāsaññāyatanaṁ. 

dn15:34.8
Pali: Yo nu kho, ānanda, tañca pajānāti, tassa ca samudayaṁ pajānāti, tassa ca atthaṅgamaṁ pajānāti, tassa ca assādaṁ pajānāti, tassa ca ādīnavaṁ pajānāti, tassa ca nissaraṇaṁ pajānāti, kallaṁ nu tena tadabhinanditun”ti? 

dn15:34.9
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn15:34.10
Pali: “Yato kho, ānanda, bhikkhu imāsañca sattannaṁ viññāṇaṭṭhitīnaṁ imesañca dvinnaṁ āyatanānaṁ samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ viditvā anupādā vimutto hoti, ayaṁ vuccatānanda, bhikkhu paññāvimutto. 

dn15:35.0
Pali: 6. Aṭṭhavimokkha 

dn15:35.1
Pali: Aṭṭha kho ime, ānanda, vimokkhā. 

dn15:35.2
Pali: Katame aṭṭha? 

dn15:35.3
Pali: Rūpī rūpāni passati 

dn15:35.4
Pali: ayaṁ paṭhamo vimokkho. 

dn15:35.5
Pali: Ajjhattaṁ arūpasaññī bahiddhā rūpāni passati, 

dn15:35.6
Pali: ayaṁ dutiyo vimokkho. 

dn15:35.7
Pali: Subhanteva adhimutto hoti, 

dn15:35.8
Pali: ayaṁ tatiyo vimokkho. 

dn15:35.9
Pali: Sabbaso rūpasaññānaṁ samatikkamā paṭighasaññānaṁ atthaṅgamā nānattasaññānaṁ amanasikārā ‘ananto ākāso’ti ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati, 

dn15:35.10
Pali: ayaṁ catuttho vimokkho. 

dn15:35.11
Pali: Sabbaso ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma ‘anantaṁ viññāṇan’ti viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati, 

dn15:35.12
Pali: ayaṁ pañcamo vimokkho. 

dn15:35.13
Pali: Sabbaso viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma ‘natthi kiñcī’ti ākiñcaññāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati, 

dn15:35.14
Pali: ayaṁ chaṭṭho vimokkho. 

dn15:35.15
Pali: Sabbaso ākiñcaññāyatanaṁ samatikkamma nevasaññānāsaññāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati, 

dn15:35.16
Pali: ayaṁ sattamo vimokkho. 

dn15:35.17
Pali: Sabbaso nevasaññānāsaññāyatanaṁ samatikkamma saññāvedayitanirodhaṁ upasampajja viharati, 

dn15:35.18
Pali: ayaṁ aṭṭhamo vimokkho. 

dn15:35.19
Pali: Ime kho, ānanda, aṭṭha vimokkhā. 

dn15:36.1
Pali: Yato kho, ānanda, bhikkhu ime aṭṭha vimokkhe anulomampi samāpajjati, paṭilomampi samāpajjati, anulomapaṭilomampi samāpajjati, yatthicchakaṁ yadicchakaṁ yāvaticchakaṁ samāpajjatipi vuṭṭhātipi. 

dn15:36.2
Pali: Āsavānañca khayā anāsavaṁ cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja viharati, ayaṁ vuccatānanda, bhikkhu ubhatobhāgavimutto. 

dn15:36.3
Pali: Imāya ca, ānanda, ubhatobhāgavimuttiyā aññā ubhatobhāgavimutti uttaritarā vā paṇītatarā vā natthī”ti. 

dn15:36.4
Pali: Idamavoca bhagavā. 

dn15:36.5
Pali: Attamano āyasmā ānando bhagavato bhāsitaṁ abhinandīti. 

dn15:36.6
Pali: Mahānidānasuttaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dutiyaṁ. 

Legacy Chinese translations, not segment-aligned

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Author: 莊春江 (zhuang)
Title: 大因緣經
ID: zh_dn15_zhuang
Source: https://suttacentral.net/api/suttas/dn15/zhuang?lang=zh

長部15經

大品［第二］

大因緣經

緣起

我聽到這樣：

有一次，世尊住在俱盧國，名叫葛馬沙達馬的俱盧國城鎮。

那時，尊者阿難去見世尊。抵達後，向世尊問訊，接著在一旁坐下。在一旁坐好後，尊者阿難對世尊這麼說：

「不可思議啊，大德！未曾有啊，大德！大德！這緣起是多麼甚深與顯現甚深，然而，對我來說，卻看起來像明顯明顯的。」

「阿難！不要這樣說！阿難！不要這樣說！阿難！這緣起是甚深與顯現甚深的。阿難！由於此法的不隨覺、不通達，這樣，這世代成為糾纏的線軸、打結的線球，為蘆草與燈心草團，不能超越苦界、惡趣、下界、輪迴。

阿難！當被像這樣問：『老死有特定條件（特定緣）嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有老死呢？』應該回答：『以生為緣而有老死。』

阿難！當被像這樣問：『生有特定條件嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有生呢？』應該回答：『以有為緣而有生。』

阿難！當被像這樣問：『有有特定條件嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有有呢？』應該回答：『以取為緣而有有。』

阿難！當被像這樣問：『取有特定條件嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有取呢？』應該回答：『以渴愛為緣而有取。』

阿難！當被像這樣問：『渴愛有特定條件嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有渴愛呢？』應該回答：『以受為緣而有渴愛。』

阿難！當被像這樣問：『受有特定條件嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有受呢？』應該回答：『以觸為緣而有受。』

阿難！當被像這樣問：『觸有特定條件嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有觸呢？』應該回答：『以名色為緣而有觸。』

阿難！當被像這樣問：『名色有特定條件嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有名色呢？』應該回答：『以識為緣而有名色。』

阿難！當被像這樣問：『識有特定條件嗎？』時，應該回答：『有。』如果他像這樣說：『以什麼為緣而有識呢？』應該回答：『以名色為緣而有識。』

阿難！像這樣，以名色為緣而有識；以識為緣而有名色；以名色為緣而有觸；以觸為緣而有受；以受為緣而有渴愛；以渴愛為緣而有取；以取為緣而有有；以有為緣而有生；以生為緣而有老、死、愁、悲、苦、憂、絕望生起，這樣是這整個苦蘊的集。

『以生為緣而有老死。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以生為緣而有老死：阿難！如果生完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，即：天狀態下天的［生］、乾達婆狀態下乾達婆的［生］、夜叉狀態下夜叉的［生］、鬼狀態下鬼的［生］、人狀態下人的［生］、四隻腳狀態下四隻腳的［生］、有翅膀狀態下有翅膀的［生］、爬行動物狀態下爬行動物的［生］，阿難！如果那些眾生的生不存在，當一切生都不存在時，以生之滅，老死是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對老死來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：生。

『以有為緣而有生。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以有為緣而有生：阿難！如果有完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，即：欲有、色有、無色有，當一切有都不存在時，以有之滅，生是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對生來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：有。

『以取為緣而有有。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以取為緣而有有：阿難！如果取完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，即：欲取、見取、戒禁取、［真］我論取，當一切取都不存在時，以取之滅，有是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對有來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：取。

『以渴愛為緣而有取。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以渴愛為緣而有取：阿難！如果渴愛完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，即：對色的渴愛、對聲的渴愛、對氣味的渴愛、對味道的渴愛、對所觸的渴愛、對法的渴愛，當一切渴愛都不存在時，以渴愛之滅，取是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對取來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：渴愛。

『以受為緣而有渴愛。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以受為緣而有渴愛：阿難！如果受完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，即：眼觸所生受、耳觸所生受、鼻觸所生受、舌觸所生受、身觸所生受、意觸所生受，當一切受都不存在時，以受之滅，渴愛是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對渴愛來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：受。

阿難！像這樣，緣於受有渴愛；緣於渴愛而有遍求；緣於遍求而有得到；緣於得到而有決定；緣於決定而有欲貪；緣於欲貪而有取著；緣於取著而持有；緣於持有而有慳吝；緣於慳吝而有守護；因為守護之故而有拿杖、拿刀、鬥諍、異執、諍論、指責、離間語、妄語等種種惡不善法生起。

『因為守護之故而有拿杖、拿刀、鬥諍、異執、諍論、指責、離間語、妄語等種種惡不善法生起。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，因為守護之故而有拿杖、拿刀、鬥諍、異執、諍論、指責、離間語、妄語等種種惡不善法生起：阿難！如果守護完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切守護都不存在時，以守護之滅，拿杖、拿刀、鬥諍、異執、諍論、指責、離間語、妄語等種種惡不善法是否還會生起呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對拿杖、拿刀、鬥諍、異執、諍論、指責、離間語、妄語等種種惡不善法的生起來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：守護。

『緣於慳吝而有守護。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，緣於慳吝而有守護：阿難！如果慳吝完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切慳吝都不存在時，以慳吝之滅，守護是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對守護來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：慳吝。

『緣於持有而有慳吝。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，緣於持有而有慳吝：阿難！如果持有完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切持有都不存在時，以持有之滅，慳吝是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對慳吝來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：持有。

『緣於取著而持有。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，緣於取著而持有：阿難！如果取著完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切取著都不存在時，以取著之滅，持有是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對持有來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：取著。

『緣於欲貪而有取著。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，緣於欲貪而有取著：阿難！如果欲貪完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切欲貪都不存在時，以欲貪之滅，取著是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對取著來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：欲貪。

『緣於決定而有欲貪。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，緣於決定而有欲貪：阿難！如果決定完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切決定都不存在時，以決定之滅，欲貪是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對欲貪來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：決定。

『緣於得到而有決定。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，緣於得到而有決定：阿難！如果得到完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切得到都不存在時，以得到之滅，決定是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對決定來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：得到。

『緣於遍求而有得到。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，緣於遍求而有得到：阿難！如果遍求完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切遍求都不存在時，以遍求之滅，得到是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對得到來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：遍求。

『緣於渴愛而有遍求。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，緣於渴愛而有遍求：阿難！如果渴愛完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，當一切渴愛都不存在時，以渴愛之滅，遍求是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對遍求來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：渴愛。

阿難！像這樣，此二法以一對而在受上會合為一。

『以觸為緣而有受。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以觸為緣而有受：阿難！如果觸完全地、全部地、無論什麼、無論如何都不存在，即：眼觸、耳觸、鼻觸、舌觸、身觸、意觸，當一切觸都不存在時，以觸之滅，受是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對受來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：觸。

『以名色為緣而有觸。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以名色為緣而有觸：阿難！凡以行相、特徵、相、說示為名身的安立，當那些行相、特徵、相、說示都不存在時，對色身的名稱觸是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！凡以行相、特徵、相、說示為色身的安立，當那些行相、特徵、相、說示都不存在時，對名身的有對觸是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！凡以行相、特徵、相、說示為名身與色身的安立，當那些行相、特徵、相、說示都不存在時，名稱觸或有對觸是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！凡以行相、特徵、相、說示為名色的安立，當那些行相、特徵、相、說示都不存在時，觸是否還能被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對觸來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：名色。

『以識為緣而有名色。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以識為緣而有名色：阿難！如果識不入到母親的子宮，名色是否會在母親的子宮中增長呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！識入到母親的子宮後如果脫離，名色是否會在這樣［輪迴］的狀態中出生呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！如果年幼眾生，幼童或幼女的識被切斷，名色是否會來到成長、增長、擴展呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對名色來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：識。

『以名色為緣而有識。』像這樣，此被說。阿難！以此法門，這能被體會，以名色為緣而有識：阿難！如果識得不到在名色中住立，未來的生、老、死，苦集的生成是否會被了知呢？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，對識來說，這就是因，這是因緣，這是集，這是緣，即：名色。

阿難！就這個範圍，可能被生、老去、死去；可能去世、再生，就這個範圍有名稱道，就這個範圍有言語道，就這個範圍有安立道，就這個範圍有慧的領域，就這個範圍為這樣［輪迴］的狀態之安立轉起輪轉，即：名色與識一起互相為緣的狀態轉起。

真我之安立

阿難！當安立真我時，在什麼情形下安立呢？阿難！當安立真我時，安立有色的、少量的：『我的真我是有色的、少量的。』阿難！當安立真我時，安立有色的、無量的：『我的真我是有色的、無量的。』阿難！當安立真我時，安立無色的、少量的：『我的真我是無色的、少量的。』阿難！當安立真我時，安立無色的、無量的：『我的真我是無色的、無量的。』

阿難！在那裡，當安立真我時，凡安立有色的、少量的者，當安立真我時，現在他安立有色的、少量的，或者，當安立真我時，來世他安立有色的、少量的，或者，他像這樣而想：『雖然現在不是真實的，我將令其成真。』阿難！這樣，『真我為有色的、少量的之隨見成為煩惱潛在趨勢。』這是適當的言說。

阿難！在那裡，當安立真我時，凡安立有色的、無量的者，當安立真我時，現在他安立有色的、無量的，或者，當安立真我時，來世他安立有色的、無量的，或者，他像這樣而想：『雖然現在不是真實的，我將令其成真。』阿難！這樣，『真我為有色的、無量的之隨見成為煩惱潛在趨勢。』這是適當的言說。

阿難！在那裡，當安立真我時，凡安立無色的、少量的者，當安立真我時，現在他安立無色的、少量的，或者，當安立真我時，來世他安立無色的、少量的，或者，他像這樣而想：『雖然現在不是真實的，我將令其成真。』阿難！這樣，『真我為無色的、少量的之隨見成為煩惱潛在趨勢。』這是適當的言說。

阿難！在那裡，當安立真我時，凡安立無色的、無量的者，當安立真我時，現在他安立無色的、無量的，或者，當安立真我時，來世他安立無色的、無量的，或者，他像這樣而想：『雖然現在不是真實的，我將令其成真。』阿難！這樣，『真我為無色的、無量的之隨見成為煩惱潛在趨勢。』這是適當的言說。

真我之不安立

阿難！當不安立真我時，在什麼情形下不安立呢？阿難！當不安立真我時，不安立有色的、少量的：『我的真我是有色的、少量的。』阿難！當不安立真我時，不安立有色的、無量的：『我的真我是有色的、無量的。』阿難！當不安立真我時，不安立無色的、少量的：『我的真我是無色的、少量的。』阿難！當不安立真我時，不安立無色的、無量的：『我的真我是無色的、無量的。』

阿難！在那裡，當不安立真我時，凡不安立有色的、少量的者，當不安立真我時，現在他不安立有色的、少量的，或者，當不安立真我時，來世他不安立有色的、少量的，或者，他不像這樣而想：『雖然現在不是真實的，我將令其成真。』阿難！這樣，『真我為有色的、少量的之隨見不成為煩惱潛在趨勢。』這是適當的言說。

阿難！在那裡，當不安立真我時，凡不安立有色的、無量的者，當不安立真我時，現在他不安立有色的、無量的，或者，當不安立真我時，來世他不安立有色的、無量的，或者，他不像這樣而想：『雖然現在不是真實的，我將令其成真。』阿難！這樣，『真我為有色的、無量的之隨見不成為煩惱潛在趨勢。』這是適當的言說。

阿難！在那裡，當不安立真我時，凡不安立無色的、少量的者，當不安立真我時，現在他不安立無色的、少量的，或者，當不安立真我時，來世他不安立無色的、少量的，或者，他不像這樣而想：『雖然現在不是真實的，我將令其成真。』阿難！這樣，『真我為無色的、少量的之隨見不成為煩惱潛在趨勢。』這是適當的言說。

阿難！在那裡，當不安立真我時，凡不安立無色的、無量的者，當不安立真我時，現在他不安立無色的、無量的，或者，當不安立真我時，來世他不安立無色的、無量的，或者，他不像這樣而想：『雖然現在不是真實的，我將令其成真。』阿難！這樣，『真我為無色的、無量的之隨見不成為煩惱潛在趨勢。』這是適當的言說。

真我之認為

阿難！當認為真我時，在什麼情形下認為呢？阿難！當認為真我時，認為受：『受是我的真我。』或者，阿難！像這樣，當認為真我時，認為：『受不是我的真我，我的真我是無感受的。』或者，阿難！像這樣，當認為真我時，認為：『受不是我的真我，我的真我也不是無感受的，我的真我感受，我的真我是受法。』

阿難！在那裡，凡這麼說：『受是我的真我。』者，他應該被這麼回答：『朋友！有這三受：樂受、苦受、不苦不樂受，這三受哪一個你認為是真我呢？』阿難！每當感受樂受時，那時，既不感受苦受，也不感受不苦不樂受，那時，只感受樂受；阿難！每當感受苦受時，那時，既不感受樂受，也不感受不苦不樂受，那時，只感受苦受；阿難！每當感受不苦不樂受時，那時，既不感受樂受，也不感受苦受，那時，只感受不苦不樂受。

阿難！樂受是無常的、有為的、緣所生的、滅盡法、消散法、褪去法、滅法；阿難！苦受也是無常的、有為的、緣所生的、滅盡法、消散法、褪去法、滅法；阿難！不苦不樂受也是無常的、有為的、緣所生的、滅盡法、消散法、褪去法、滅法，如果他感受樂受而想：『這是我的真我。』則就以樂受之滅而他想：『我的真我消失了。』如果感受苦受而想：『這是我的真我。』則就以苦受之滅而他想：『我的真我消失了。』如果感受不苦不樂受而想：『這是我的真我。』則就以不苦不樂受之滅而他想：『我的真我消失了。』凡這麼說：『受是我的真我。』者，像這樣，當認為真我時，他在當生中認為［真我是］無常的與苦樂混合的生起與消散法。阿難！因此，在這裡，以此，認為：『受是我的真我。』這不適用。

阿難！在那裡，凡這麼說：『受不是我的真我，我的真我是無感受的。』者，他應該被這麼回答：『朋友！如果一切都不被感受之處是否有「我是這個」呢？』」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，以此，認為：『受不是我的真我，我的真我是無感受的。』這不適用。

阿難！在那裡，凡這麼說：『受不是我的真我，我的真我也不是無感受的，我的真我感受，我的真我是受法。』者，他應該被這麼回答：『朋友！如果受完全地、全部地無餘滅，以一切受不存在，以受滅，該處是否有「我是這個」呢？』」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！因此，在這裡，以此，認為：『受不是我的真我，我的真我也不是無感受的，我的真我感受，我的真我是受法。』這不適用。

阿難！當比丘不認為受是真我，也不認為無感受是真我，也不認為：『我的真我受，我的真我是受法。』當不這麼認為時，他在世間中不執取任何事物。不執取則不戰慄，不戰慄就獨自地證涅槃，他了知：『出生已盡，梵行已完成，應該作的已作，不再有這樣［輪迴］的狀態了。』阿難！如果說這樣心解脫的比丘：『「死後如來存在」是他的見。』那是不適當的。『「死後如來不存在」是他的見。』那是不適當的。『「死後如來存在且不存在」是他的見。』那是不適當的。『「死後如來既非存在也非不存在」是他的見。』那是不適當的。那是什麼原因呢？阿難！所有名稱之所及，所有名稱道之所及，所有言語之所及，所有言語道之所及，所有安立之所及，所有安立道之所及，所有慧之所及，所有慧的領域之所及，所有輪轉之所及，所有轉起之所及，證知它後，比丘為解脫者。［說：］『證知它後已解脫的比丘「不知、不見」是他的見。』那是不適當的。

七識住

阿難！有七識住、二處，哪七個呢？阿難！有種種身、種種想的眾生，即：人類、某些天、某些墮下界者，這是第一識住。阿難！有種種身、單一想的眾生，即：以第一［禪］往生的梵眾天，這是第二識住。阿難！有單一身、種種想的眾生，即：光音天，這是第三識住。阿難！有單一身、單一想的眾生，即：遍淨天，這是第四識住。阿難！有以一切色想的超越，以有對想的滅沒，以不作意種種想［而知］：『虛空是無邊的』，到虛空無邊處的眾生，這是第五識住。阿難！有以一切虛空無邊處的超越［而知］：『識是無邊的』，到識無邊處的眾生，這是第六識住。阿難！有以一切識無邊處的超越［而知］：『什麼都沒有』，到無所有處的眾生，這是第七識住。無想眾生處、非想非非想處為二［處］。

阿難！在這裡，這第一識處：種種身、種種想的眾生，即：人類、某些天、某些墮下界者，阿難！凡了知它、了知它的集起、了知它的滅沒、了知它的樂味、了知它的過患、了知它的出離，適合歡喜它嗎？」

「不，大德！」……（中略）

「阿難！在這裡，這無想眾生處，阿難！凡了知它、了知它的集起、了知它的滅沒、了知它的樂味、了知它的過患、了知它的出離，適合歡喜它嗎？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！在這裡，這非想非非想處，阿難！凡了知它、了知它的集起、了知它的滅沒、了知它的樂味、了知它的過患、了知它的出離，適合歡喜它嗎？」

「不，大德！」

「阿難！當比丘如實知這七識住與這二處的集起、滅沒、樂味、過患、出離後，以不執取而成為解脫者，阿難！這被稱為慧解脫者。

阿難！有這八解脫，哪八個呢？有色者見諸色，這是第一解脫。內無色想者見外諸色，這是第二解脫。只傾心於清淨的，這是第三解脫。以一切色想的超越，以有對想的滅沒，以不作意種種想［而知］：『虛空是無邊的』，進入後住於虛空無邊處，這是第四解脫。以一切虛空無邊處的超越［而知］：『識是無邊的』，進入後住於識無邊處，這是第五解脫。以一切識無邊處的超越［而知］：『什麼都沒有』，進入後住於無所有處，這是第六解脫。以一切無所有處的超越，進入後住於非想非非想處，這是第七解脫。以一切非想非非想處的超越，進入後住於想受滅，這是第八解脫。

阿難！當比丘順入、逆入、順逆入這八解脫時，他出入於想要之處、想要之時、想要之所及，他以諸煩惱的滅盡，以證智自作證後，在當生中進入後住於無煩惱的心解脫、慧解脫，阿難！這被稱為俱分解脫的比丘。阿難！沒有其它俱分解脫比這位俱分解脫者更優勝或勝妙的了。」

這就是世尊所說，悅意的尊者阿難歡喜世尊所說。

大因緣經第二終了。

莊春江譯 。

Retrieved from http://agama.buddhason.org/

Prepared for SuttaCentral by Bhikkhu Sujato .

Pali segments

dn16:0.1
Pali: Dīgha Nikāya 16 

dn16:0.2
Pali: Mahāparinibbānasutta 

dn16:1.1.1
Pali: Evaṁ me sutaṁ—

dn16:1.1.2
Pali: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā rājagahe viharati gijjhakūṭe pabbate. 

dn16:1.1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājā māgadho ajātasattu vedehiputto vajjī abhiyātukāmo hoti. 

dn16:1.1.4
Pali: So evamāha: 

dn16:1.1.5
Pali: “ahaṁ hime vajjī evaṁmahiddhike evaṁmahānubhāve ucchecchāmi vajjī, vināsessāmi vajjī, anayabyasanaṁ āpādessāmī”ti. 

dn16:1.2.1
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho ajātasattu vedehiputto vassakāraṁ brāhmaṇaṁ magadhamahāmattaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:1.2.2
Pali: “ehi tvaṁ, brāhmaṇa, yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkama; upasaṅkamitvā mama vacanena bhagavato pāde sirasā vandāhi, appābādhaṁ appātaṅkaṁ lahuṭṭhānaṁ balaṁ phāsuvihāraṁ puccha: 

dn16:1.2.3
Pali: ‘rājā, bhante, māgadho ajātasattu vedehiputto bhagavato pāde sirasā vandati, appābādhaṁ appātaṅkaṁ lahuṭṭhānaṁ balaṁ phāsuvihāraṁ pucchatī’ti. 

dn16:1.2.4
Pali: Evañca vadehi: 

dn16:1.2.5
Pali: ‘rājā, bhante, māgadho ajātasattu vedehiputto vajjī abhiyātukāmo. 

dn16:1.2.6
Pali: So evamāha: 

dn16:1.2.7
Pali: “ahaṁ hime vajjī evaṁmahiddhike evaṁmahānubhāve ucchecchāmi vajjī, vināsessāmi vajjī, anayabyasanaṁ āpādessāmī”’ti. 

dn16:1.2.8
Pali: Yathā te bhagavā byākaroti, taṁ sādhukaṁ uggahetvā mama āroceyyāsi. 

dn16:1.2.9
Pali: Na hi tathāgatā vitathaṁ bhaṇantī”ti. 

dn16:1.3.0
Pali: 1. Vassakārabrāhmaṇa 

dn16:1.3.1
Pali: “Evaṁ, bho”ti kho vassakāro brāhmaṇo magadhamahāmatto rañño māgadhassa ajātasattussa vedehiputtassa paṭissutvā bhaddāni bhaddāni yānāni yojetvā bhaddaṁ bhaddaṁ yānaṁ abhiruhitvā bhaddehi bhaddehi yānehi rājagahamhā niyyāsi, yena gijjhakūṭo pabbato tena pāyāsi. 

dn16:1.3.2
Pali: Yāvatikā yānassa bhūmi, yānena gantvā, yānā paccorohitvā pattikova yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavatā saddhiṁ sammodi. 

dn16:1.3.3
Pali: Sammodanīyaṁ kathaṁ sāraṇīyaṁ vītisāretvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho vassakāro brāhmaṇo magadhamahāmatto bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: 

dn16:1.3.4
Pali: “rājā, bho gotama, māgadho ajātasattu vedehiputto bhoto gotamassa pāde sirasā vandati, appābādhaṁ appātaṅkaṁ lahuṭṭhānaṁ balaṁ phāsuvihāraṁ pucchati. 

dn16:1.3.5
Pali: Rājā, bho gotama, māgadho ajātasattu vedehiputto vajjī abhiyātukāmo. 

dn16:1.3.6
Pali: So evamāha: 

dn16:1.3.7
Pali: ‘ahaṁ hime vajjī evaṁmahiddhike evaṁmahānubhāve ucchecchāmi vajjī, vināsessāmi vajjī, anayabyasanaṁ āpādessāmī’”ti. 

dn16:1.4.0
Pali: 2. Rājaaparihāniyadhamma 

dn16:1.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā ānando bhagavato piṭṭhito ṭhito hoti bhagavantaṁ bījayamāno. 

dn16:1.4.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:1.4.3
Pali: “kinti te, ānanda, sutaṁ, ‘vajjī abhiṇhaṁ sannipātā sannipātabahulā’”ti? 

dn16:1.4.4
Pali: “Sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante: ‘vajjī abhiṇhaṁ sannipātā sannipātabahulā’”ti. 

dn16:1.4.5
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, ānanda, vajjī abhiṇhaṁ sannipātā sannipātabahulā bhavissanti, vuddhiyeva, ānanda, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.4.6
Pali: Kinti te, ānanda, sutaṁ, ‘vajjī samaggā sannipatanti, samaggā vuṭṭhahanti, samaggā vajjikaraṇīyāni karontī’”ti? 

dn16:1.4.7
Pali: “Sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante: ‘vajjī samaggā sannipatanti, samaggā vuṭṭhahanti, samaggā vajjikaraṇīyāni karontī’”ti. 

dn16:1.4.8
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, ānanda, vajjī samaggā sannipatissanti, samaggā vuṭṭhahissanti, samaggā vajjikaraṇīyāni karissanti, vuddhiyeva, ānanda, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.4.9
Pali: Kinti te, ānanda, sutaṁ, ‘vajjī apaññattaṁ na paññapenti, paññattaṁ na samucchindanti, yathāpaññatte porāṇe vajjidhamme samādāya vattantī’”ti? 

dn16:1.4.10
Pali: “Sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante: ‘vajjī apaññattaṁ na paññapenti, paññattaṁ na samucchindanti, yathāpaññatte porāṇe vajjidhamme samādāya vattantī’”ti. 

dn16:1.4.11
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, ānanda, vajjī apaññattaṁ na paññapessanti, paññattaṁ na samucchindissanti, yathāpaññatte porāṇe vajjidhamme samādāya vattissanti, vuddhiyeva, ānanda, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.4.12
Pali: Kinti te, ānanda, sutaṁ, ‘vajjī ye te vajjīnaṁ vajjimahallakā, te sakkaronti garuṁ karonti mānenti pūjenti, tesañca sotabbaṁ maññantī’”ti? 

dn16:1.4.13
Pali: “Sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante: ‘vajjī ye te vajjīnaṁ vajjimahallakā, te sakkaronti garuṁ karonti mānenti pūjenti, tesañca sotabbaṁ maññantī’”ti. 

dn16:1.4.14
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, ānanda, vajjī ye te vajjīnaṁ vajjimahallakā, te sakkarissanti garuṁ karissanti mānessanti pūjessanti, tesañca sotabbaṁ maññissanti, vuddhiyeva, ānanda, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.4.15
Pali: Kinti te, ānanda, sutaṁ, ‘vajjī yā tā kulitthiyo kulakumāriyo, tā na okkassa pasayha vāsentī’”ti? 

dn16:1.4.16
Pali: “Sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante: ‘vajjī yā tā kulitthiyo kulakumāriyo tā na okkassa pasayha vāsentī’”ti. 

dn16:1.4.17
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, ānanda, vajjī yā tā kulitthiyo kulakumāriyo, tā na okkassa pasayha vāsessanti, vuddhiyeva, ānanda, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.4.18
Pali: Kinti te, ānanda, sutaṁ, ‘vajjī yāni tāni vajjīnaṁ vajjicetiyāni abbhantarāni ceva bāhirāni ca, tāni sakkaronti garuṁ karonti mānenti pūjenti, tesañca dinnapubbaṁ katapubbaṁ dhammikaṁ baliṁ no parihāpentī’”ti? 

dn16:1.4.19
Pali: “Sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante: ‘vajjī yāni tāni vajjīnaṁ vajjicetiyāni abbhantarāni ceva bāhirāni ca, tāni sakkaronti garuṁ karonti mānenti pūjenti tesañca dinnapubbaṁ katapubbaṁ dhammikaṁ baliṁ no parihāpentī’”ti. 

dn16:1.4.20
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, ānanda, vajjī yāni tāni vajjīnaṁ vajjicetiyāni abbhantarāni ceva bāhirāni ca, tāni sakkarissanti garuṁ karissanti mānessanti pūjessanti, tesañca dinnapubbaṁ katapubbaṁ dhammikaṁ baliṁ no parihāpessanti, vuddhiyeva, ānanda, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.4.21
Pali: Kinti te, ānanda, sutaṁ, ‘vajjīnaṁ arahantesu dhammikā rakkhāvaraṇagutti susaṁvihitā, kinti anāgatā ca arahanto vijitaṁ āgaccheyyuṁ, āgatā ca arahanto vijite phāsu vihareyyun’”ti? 

dn16:1.4.22
Pali: “Sutaṁ metaṁ, bhante ‘vajjīnaṁ arahantesu dhammikā rakkhāvaraṇagutti susaṁvihitā kinti anāgatā ca arahanto vijitaṁ āgaccheyyuṁ, āgatā ca arahanto vijite phāsu vihareyyun’”ti. 

dn16:1.4.23
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, ānanda, vajjīnaṁ arahantesu dhammikā rakkhāvaraṇagutti susaṁvihitā bhavissati, kinti anāgatā ca arahanto vijitaṁ āgaccheyyuṁ, āgatā ca arahanto vijite phāsu vihareyyunti. Vuddhiyeva, ānanda, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihānī”ti. 

dn16:1.5.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā vassakāraṁ brāhmaṇaṁ magadhamahāmattaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:1.5.2
Pali: “ekamidāhaṁ, brāhmaṇa, samayaṁ vesāliyaṁ viharāmi sārandade cetiye. 

dn16:1.5.3
Pali: Tatrāhaṁ vajjīnaṁ ime satta aparihāniye dhamme desesiṁ. 

dn16:1.5.4
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, brāhmaṇa, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā vajjīsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu vajjī sandississanti, vuddhiyeva, brāhmaṇa, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihānī”ti. 

dn16:1.5.5
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, vassakāro brāhmaṇo magadhamahāmatto bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: 

dn16:1.5.6
Pali: “ekamekenapi, bho gotama, aparihāniyena dhammena samannāgatānaṁ vajjīnaṁ vuddhiyeva pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.5.7
Pali: Ko pana vādo sattahi aparihāniyehi dhammehi. 

dn16:1.5.8
Pali: Akaraṇīyāva, bho gotama, vajjī raññā māgadhena ajātasattunā vedehiputtena yadidaṁ yuddhassa, aññatra upalāpanāya aññatra mithubhedā. 

dn16:1.5.9
Pali: Handa ca dāni mayaṁ, bho gotama, gacchāma, bahukiccā mayaṁ bahukaraṇīyā”ti. 

dn16:1.5.10
Pali: “Yassadāni tvaṁ, brāhmaṇa, kālaṁ maññasī”ti. 

dn16:1.5.11
Pali: Atha kho vassakāro brāhmaṇo magadhamahāmatto bhagavato bhāsitaṁ abhinanditvā anumoditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

dn16:1.6.0
Pali: 3. Bhikkhuaparihāniyadhamma 

dn16:1.6.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā acirapakkante vassakāre brāhmaṇe magadhamahāmatte āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:1.6.2
Pali: “gaccha tvaṁ, ānanda, yāvatikā bhikkhū rājagahaṁ upanissāya viharanti, te sabbe upaṭṭhānasālāyaṁ sannipātehī”ti. 

dn16:1.6.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paṭissutvā yāvatikā bhikkhū rājagahaṁ upanissāya viharanti, te sabbe upaṭṭhānasālāyaṁ sannipātetvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho āyasmā ānando bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: 

dn16:1.6.4
Pali: “sannipatito, bhante, bhikkhusaṅgho, yassadāni, bhante, bhagavā kālaṁ maññatī”ti. 

dn16:1.6.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā uṭṭhāyāsanā yena upaṭṭhānasālā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

dn16:1.6.6
Pali: Nisajja kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi: 

dn16:1.6.7
Pali: “satta vo, bhikkhave, aparihāniye dhamme desessāmi, 

dn16:1.6.8
Pali: taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasikarotha, bhāsissāmī”ti. 

dn16:1.6.9
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. 

dn16:1.6.10
Pali: Bhagavā etadavoca: 

dn16:1.6.11
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū abhiṇhaṁ sannipātā sannipātabahulā bhavissanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.6.12
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū samaggā sannipatissanti, samaggā vuṭṭhahissanti, samaggā saṅghakaraṇīyāni karissanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.6.13
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū apaññattaṁ na paññapessanti, paññattaṁ na samucchindissanti, yathāpaññattesu sikkhāpadesu samādāya vattissanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.6.14
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū ye te bhikkhū therā rattaññū cirapabbajitā saṅghapitaro saṅghapariṇāyakā, te sakkarissanti garuṁ karissanti mānessanti pūjessanti, tesañca sotabbaṁ maññissanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.6.15
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū uppannāya taṇhāya ponobbhavikāya na vasaṁ gacchissanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.6.16
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū āraññakesu senāsanesu sāpekkhā bhavissanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.6.17
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū paccattaññeva satiṁ upaṭṭhapessanti: ‘kinti anāgatā ca pesalā sabrahmacārī āgaccheyyuṁ, āgatā ca pesalā sabrahmacārī phāsu vihareyyun’ti. Vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.6.18
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā bhikkhūsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu bhikkhū sandississanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.7.1
Pali: Aparepi vo, bhikkhave, satta aparihāniye dhamme desessāmi, taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasikarotha, bhāsissāmī”ti. 

dn16:1.7.2
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. 

dn16:1.7.3
Pali: Bhagavā etadavoca: 

dn16:1.7.4
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na kammārāmā bhavissanti na kammaratā na kammārāmatamanuyuttā, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.7.5
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na bhassārāmā bhavissanti na bhassaratā na bhassārāmatamanuyuttā, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.7.6
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na niddārāmā bhavissanti na niddāratā na niddārāmatamanuyuttā, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.7.7
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na saṅgaṇikārāmā bhavissanti na saṅgaṇikaratā na saṅgaṇikārāmatamanuyuttā, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.7.8
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na pāpicchā bhavissanti na pāpikānaṁ icchānaṁ vasaṁ gatā, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.7.9
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na pāpamittā bhavissanti na pāpasahāyā na pāpasampavaṅkā, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.7.10
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na oramattakena visesādhigamena antarāvosānaṁ āpajjissanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.8.1
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā bhikkhūsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu bhikkhū sandississanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.8.2
Pali: Aparepi vo, bhikkhave, satta aparihāniye dhamme desessāmi …pe…. 

dn16:1.8.3
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū saddhā bhavissanti …pe… 

dn16:1.8.4
Pali: hirimanā bhavissanti … 

dn16:1.8.5
Pali: ottappī bhavissanti … 

dn16:1.8.6
Pali: bahussutā bhavissanti … 

dn16:1.8.7
Pali: āraddhavīriyā bhavissanti … 

dn16:1.8.8
Pali: upaṭṭhitassatī bhavissanti … 

dn16:1.8.9
Pali: paññavanto bhavissanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.8.10
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā bhikkhūsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu bhikkhū sandississanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.8.11
Pali: Aparepi vo, bhikkhave, satta aparihāniye dhamme desessāmi, taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasikarotha, bhāsissāmī”ti. 

dn16:1.8.12
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. 

dn16:1.8.13
Pali: Bhagavā etadavoca: 

dn16:1.9.1
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu satisambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāvessanti …pe… 

dn16:1.9.2
Pali: dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.9.3
Pali: vīriyasambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.9.4
Pali: pītisambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.9.5
Pali: passaddhisambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.9.6
Pali: samādhisambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.9.7
Pali: upekkhāsambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāvessanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.10.1
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā bhikkhūsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu bhikkhū sandississanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā no parihāni. 

dn16:1.10.2
Pali: Aparepi vo, bhikkhave, satta aparihāniye dhamme desessāmi, taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasikarotha, bhāsissāmī”ti. 

dn16:1.10.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. 

dn16:1.10.4
Pali: Bhagavā etadavoca: 

dn16:1.10.5
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū aniccasaññaṁ bhāvessanti …pe… 

dn16:1.10.6
Pali: anattasaññaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.10.7
Pali: asubhasaññaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.10.8
Pali: ādīnavasaññaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.10.9
Pali: pahānasaññaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.10.10
Pali: virāgasaññaṁ bhāvessanti … 

dn16:1.10.11
Pali: nirodhasaññaṁ bhāvessanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.10.12
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā bhikkhūsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu bhikkhū sandississanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.11.1
Pali: Cha vo, bhikkhave, aparihāniye dhamme desessāmi, taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasikarotha, bhāsissāmī”ti. 

dn16:1.11.2
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ. 

dn16:1.11.3
Pali: Bhagavā etadavoca: 

dn16:1.11.4
Pali: “Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū mettaṁ kāyakammaṁ paccupaṭṭhāpessanti sabrahmacārīsu āvi ceva raho ca, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.11.5
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū mettaṁ vacīkammaṁ paccupaṭṭhāpessanti …pe… 

dn16:1.11.6
Pali: mettaṁ manokammaṁ paccupaṭṭhāpessanti sabrahmacārīsu āvi ceva raho ca, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.11.7
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū, ye te lābhā dhammikā dhammaladdhā antamaso pattapariyāpannamattampi tathārūpehi lābhehi appaṭivibhattabhogī bhavissanti sīlavantehi sabrahmacārīhi sādhāraṇabhogī, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.11.8
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū yāni tāni sīlāni akhaṇḍāni acchiddāni asabalāni akammāsāni bhujissāni viññūpasatthāni aparāmaṭṭhāni samādhisaṁvattanikāni tathārūpesu sīlesu sīlasāmaññagatā viharissanti sabrahmacārīhi āvi ceva raho ca, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.11.9
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū yāyaṁ diṭṭhi ariyā niyyānikā, niyyāti takkarassa sammā dukkhakkhayāya, tathārūpāya diṭṭhiyā diṭṭhisāmaññagatā viharissanti sabrahmacārīhi āvi ceva raho ca, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni. 

dn16:1.11.10
Pali: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, ime cha aparihāniyā dhammā bhikkhūsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca chasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu bhikkhū sandississanti, vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihānī”ti. 

dn16:1.11.11
Pali: (…) 

dn16:1.12.1
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā rājagahe viharanto gijjhakūṭe pabbate etadeva bahulaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ dhammiṁ kathaṁ karoti: 

dn16:1.12.2
Pali: “iti sīlaṁ, iti samādhi, iti paññā. 

dn16:1.12.3
Pali: Sīlaparibhāvito samādhi mahapphalo hoti mahānisaṁso. 

dn16:1.12.4
Pali: Samādhiparibhāvitā paññā mahapphalā hoti mahānisaṁsā. 

dn16:1.12.5
Pali: Paññāparibhāvitaṁ cittaṁ sammadeva āsavehi vimuccati, seyyathidaṁ—

dn16:1.12.6
Pali: kāmāsavā, bhavāsavā, avijjāsavā”ti. 

dn16:1.13.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājagahe yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:1.13.2
Pali: “āyāmānanda, yena ambalaṭṭhikā tenupasaṅkamissāmā”ti. 

dn16:1.13.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paccassosi. 

dn16:1.13.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ yena ambalaṭṭhikā tadavasari. 

dn16:1.14.1
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā ambalaṭṭhikāyaṁ viharati rājāgārake. 

dn16:1.14.2
Pali: Tatrāpi sudaṁ bhagavā ambalaṭṭhikāyaṁ viharanto rājāgārake etadeva bahulaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ dhammiṁ kathaṁ karoti: 

dn16:1.14.3
Pali: “iti sīlaṁ iti samādhi iti paññā. 

dn16:1.14.4
Pali: Sīlaparibhāvito samādhi mahapphalo hoti mahānisaṁso. 

dn16:1.14.5
Pali: Samādhiparibhāvitā paññā mahapphalā hoti mahānisaṁsā. 

dn16:1.14.6
Pali: Paññāparibhāvitaṁ cittaṁ sammadeva āsavehi vimuccati, seyyathidaṁ—

dn16:1.14.7
Pali: kāmāsavā, bhavāsavā, avijjāsavā”ti. 

dn16:1.15.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā ambalaṭṭhikāyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:1.15.2
Pali: “āyāmānanda, yena nāḷandā tenupasaṅkamissāmā”ti. 

dn16:1.15.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paccassosi. 

dn16:1.15.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ yena nāḷandā tadavasari, 

dn16:1.15.5
Pali: tatra sudaṁ bhagavā nāḷandāyaṁ viharati pāvārikambavane. 

dn16:1.16.0
Pali: 4. Sāriputtasīhanāda 

dn16:1.16.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāriputto yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā sāriputto bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: 

dn16:1.16.2
Pali: “evaṁ pasanno ahaṁ, bhante, bhagavati; 

dn16:1.16.3
Pali: na cāhu na ca bhavissati na cetarahi vijjati añño samaṇo vā brāhmaṇo vā bhagavatā bhiyyobhiññataro yadidaṁ sambodhiyan”ti. 

dn16:1.16.4
Pali: “Uḷārā kho te ayaṁ, sāriputta, āsabhī vācā bhāsitā, ekaṁso gahito, sīhanādo nadito: 

dn16:1.16.5
Pali: ‘evaṁpasanno ahaṁ, bhante, bhagavati; 

dn16:1.16.6
Pali: na cāhu na ca bhavissati na cetarahi vijjati añño samaṇo vā brāhmaṇo vā bhagavatā bhiyyobhiññataro yadidaṁ sambodhiyan’ti. 

dn16:1.16.7
Pali: Kiṁ te, sāriputta, ye te ahesuṁ atītamaddhānaṁ arahanto sammāsambuddhā, sabbe te bhagavanto cetasā ceto paricca viditā: 

dn16:1.16.8
Pali: ‘evaṁsīlā te bhagavanto ahesuṁ itipi, evaṁdhammā evaṁpaññā evaṁvihārī evaṁvimuttā te bhagavanto ahesuṁ itipī’”ti? 

dn16:1.16.9
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn16:1.16.10
Pali: “Kiṁ pana te, sāriputta, ye te bhavissanti anāgatamaddhānaṁ arahanto sammāsambuddhā, sabbe te bhagavanto cetasā ceto paricca viditā: 

dn16:1.16.11
Pali: ‘evaṁsīlā te bhagavanto bhavissanti itipi, evaṁdhammā evaṁpaññā evaṁvihārī evaṁvimuttā te bhagavanto bhavissanti itipī’”ti? 

dn16:1.16.12
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn16:1.16.13
Pali: “Kiṁ pana te, sāriputta, ahaṁ etarahi arahaṁ sammāsambuddho cetasā ceto paricca vidito: 

dn16:1.16.14
Pali: ‘evaṁsīlo bhagavā itipi, evaṁdhammo evaṁpañño evaṁvihārī evaṁvimutto bhagavā itipī’”ti? 

dn16:1.16.15
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

dn16:1.16.16
Pali: “Ettha ca hi te, sāriputta, atītānāgatapaccuppannesu arahantesu sammāsambuddhesu cetopariyañāṇaṁ natthi. 

dn16:1.16.17
Pali: Atha kiñcarahi te ayaṁ, sāriputta, uḷārā āsabhī vācā bhāsitā, ekaṁso gahito, sīhanādo nadito: 

dn16:1.16.18
Pali: ‘evaṁpasanno ahaṁ, bhante, bhagavati; na cāhu na ca bhavissati na cetarahi vijjati añño samaṇo vā brāhmaṇo vā bhagavatā bhiyyobhiññataro yadidaṁ sambodhiyan’”ti? 

dn16:1.17.1
Pali: “Na kho me, bhante, atītānāgatapaccuppannesu arahantesu sammāsambuddhesu cetopariyañāṇaṁ atthi, 

dn16:1.17.2
Pali: api ca me dhammanvayo vidito. 

dn16:1.17.3
Pali: Seyyathāpi, bhante, rañño paccantimaṁ nagaraṁ daḷhuddhāpaṁ daḷhapākāratoraṇaṁ ekadvāraṁ, 

dn16:1.17.4
Pali: tatrassa dovāriko paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī aññātānaṁ nivāretā ñātānaṁ pavesetā. 

dn16:1.17.5
Pali: So tassa nagarassa samantā anupariyāyapathaṁ anukkamamāno na passeyya pākārasandhiṁ vā pākāravivaraṁ vā, antamaso biḷāranikkhamanamattampi. 

dn16:1.17.6
Pali: Tassa evamassa: 

dn16:1.17.7
Pali: ‘ye kho keci oḷārikā pāṇā imaṁ nagaraṁ pavisanti vā nikkhamanti vā, sabbe te imināva dvārena pavisanti vā nikkhamanti vā’ti. 

dn16:1.17.8
Pali: Evameva kho me, bhante, dhammanvayo vidito: 

dn16:1.17.9
Pali: ‘ye te, bhante, ahesuṁ atītamaddhānaṁ arahanto sammāsambuddhā, sabbe te bhagavanto pañca nīvaraṇe pahāya cetaso upakkilese paññāya dubbalīkaraṇe catūsu satipaṭṭhānesu supatiṭṭhitacittā sattabojjhaṅge yathābhūtaṁ bhāvetvā anuttaraṁ sammāsambodhiṁ abhisambujjhiṁsu. 

dn16:1.17.10
Pali: Yepi te, bhante, bhavissanti anāgatamaddhānaṁ arahanto sammāsambuddhā, sabbe te bhagavanto pañca nīvaraṇe pahāya cetaso upakkilese paññāya dubbalīkaraṇe catūsu satipaṭṭhānesu supatiṭṭhitacittā satta bojjhaṅge yathābhūtaṁ bhāvetvā anuttaraṁ sammāsambodhiṁ abhisambujjhissanti. 

dn16:1.17.11
Pali: Bhagavāpi, bhante, etarahi arahaṁ sammāsambuddho pañca nīvaraṇe pahāya cetaso upakkilese paññāya dubbalīkaraṇe catūsu satipaṭṭhānesu supatiṭṭhitacitto satta bojjhaṅge yathābhūtaṁ bhāvetvā anuttaraṁ sammāsambodhiṁ abhisambuddho’”ti. 

dn16:1.18.1
Pali: Tatrapi sudaṁ bhagavā nāḷandāyaṁ viharanto pāvārikambavane etadeva bahulaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ dhammiṁ kathaṁ karoti: 

dn16:1.18.2
Pali: “iti sīlaṁ, iti samādhi, iti paññā. 

dn16:1.18.3
Pali: Sīlaparibhāvito samādhi mahapphalo hoti mahānisaṁso. 

dn16:1.18.4
Pali: Samādhiparibhāvitā paññā mahapphalā hoti mahānisaṁsā. 

dn16:1.18.5
Pali: Paññāparibhāvitaṁ cittaṁ sammadeva āsavehi vimuccati, seyyathidaṁ—

dn16:1.18.6
Pali: kāmāsavā, bhavāsavā, avijjāsavā”ti. 

dn16:1.19.0
Pali: 5. Dussīlaādīnava 

dn16:1.19.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā nāḷandāyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:1.19.2
Pali: “āyāmānanda, yena pāṭaligāmo tenupasaṅkamissāmā”ti. 

dn16:1.19.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paccassosi. 

dn16:1.19.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ yena pāṭaligāmo tadavasari. 

dn16:1.20.1
Pali: Assosuṁ kho pāṭaligāmikā upāsakā: “bhagavā kira pāṭaligāmaṁ anuppatto”ti. 

dn16:1.20.2
Pali: Atha kho pāṭaligāmikā upāsakā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. Ekamantaṁ nisinnā kho pāṭaligāmikā upāsakā bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ: 

dn16:1.20.3
Pali: “adhivāsetu no, bhante, bhagavā āvasathāgāran”ti. 

dn16:1.20.4
Pali: Adhivāsesi bhagavā tuṇhībhāvena. 

dn16:1.21.1
Pali: Atha kho pāṭaligāmikā upāsakā bhagavato adhivāsanaṁ viditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā yena āvasathāgāraṁ tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā sabbasanthariṁ āvasathāgāraṁ santharitvā āsanāni paññapetvā udakamaṇikaṁ patiṭṭhāpetvā telapadīpaṁ āropetvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhaṁsu. Ekamantaṁ ṭhitā kho pāṭaligāmikā upāsakā bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ: 

dn16:1.21.2
Pali: “sabbasantharisanthataṁ, bhante, āvasathāgāraṁ, āsanāni paññattāni, udakamaṇiko patiṭṭhāpito, telapadīpo āropito; 

dn16:1.21.3
Pali: yassadāni, bhante, bhagavā kālaṁ maññatī”ti. 

dn16:1.22.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā sāyanhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena yena āvasathāgāraṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā pāde pakkhāletvā āvasathāgāraṁ pavisitvā majjhimaṁ thambhaṁ nissāya puratthābhimukho nisīdi. 

dn16:1.22.2
Pali: Bhikkhusaṅghopi kho pāde pakkhāletvā āvasathāgāraṁ pavisitvā pacchimaṁ bhittiṁ nissāya puratthābhimukho nisīdi bhagavantameva purakkhatvā. 

dn16:1.22.3
Pali: Pāṭaligāmikāpi kho upāsakā pāde pakkhāletvā āvasathāgāraṁ pavisitvā puratthimaṁ bhittiṁ nissāya pacchimābhimukhā nisīdiṁsu bhagavantameva purakkhatvā. 

dn16:1.22.4
Pali: (…) 

dn16:1.23.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pāṭaligāmike upāsake āmantesi: 

dn16:1.23.2
Pali: “pañcime, gahapatayo, ādīnavā dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn16:1.23.3
Pali: Katame pañca? 

dn16:1.23.4
Pali: Idha, gahapatayo, dussīlo sīlavipanno pamādādhikaraṇaṁ mahatiṁ bhogajāniṁ nigacchati. 

dn16:1.23.5
Pali: Ayaṁ paṭhamo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn16:1.23.6
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, gahapatayo, dussīlassa sīlavipannassa pāpako kittisaddo abbhuggacchati. 

dn16:1.23.7
Pali: Ayaṁ dutiyo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn16:1.23.8
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, gahapatayo, dussīlo sīlavipanno yaññadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkamati—yadi khattiyaparisaṁ yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ yadi gahapatiparisaṁ yadi samaṇaparisaṁ—avisārado upasaṅkamati maṅkubhūto. 

dn16:1.23.9
Pali: Ayaṁ tatiyo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn16:1.23.10
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, gahapatayo, dussīlo sīlavipanno sammūḷho kālaṁ karoti. 

dn16:1.23.11
Pali: Ayaṁ catuttho ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn16:1.23.12
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, gahapatayo, dussīlo sīlavipanno kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjati. 

dn16:1.23.13
Pali: Ayaṁ pañcamo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn16:1.23.14
Pali: Ime kho, gahapatayo, pañca ādīnavā dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn16:1.24.0
Pali: 6. Sīlavantaānisaṁsa 

dn16:1.24.1
Pali: Pañcime, gahapatayo, ānisaṁsā sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn16:1.24.2
Pali: Katame pañca? 

dn16:1.24.3
Pali: Idha, gahapatayo, sīlavā sīlasampanno appamādādhikaraṇaṁ mahantaṁ bhogakkhandhaṁ adhigacchati. 

dn16:1.24.4
Pali: Ayaṁ paṭhamo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn16:1.24.5
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, gahapatayo, sīlavato sīlasampannassa kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggacchati. 

dn16:1.24.6
Pali: Ayaṁ dutiyo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn16:1.24.7
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, gahapatayo, sīlavā sīlasampanno yaññadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkamati—yadi khattiyaparisaṁ yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ yadi gahapatiparisaṁ yadi samaṇaparisaṁ visārado upasaṅkamati amaṅkubhūto. 

dn16:1.24.8
Pali: Ayaṁ tatiyo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn16:1.24.9
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, gahapatayo, sīlavā sīlasampanno asammūḷho kālaṁ karoti. 

dn16:1.24.10
Pali: Ayaṁ catuttho ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn16:1.24.11
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, gahapatayo, sīlavā sīlasampanno kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjati. 

dn16:1.24.12
Pali: Ayaṁ pañcamo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn16:1.24.13
Pali: Ime kho, gahapatayo, pañca ānisaṁsā sīlavato sīlasampadāyā”ti. 

dn16:1.25.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pāṭaligāmike upāsake bahudeva rattiṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā uyyojesi: 

dn16:1.25.2
Pali: “abhikkantā kho, gahapatayo, ratti, yassadāni tumhe kālaṁ maññathā”ti. 

dn16:1.25.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho pāṭaligāmikā upāsakā bhagavato paṭissutvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkamiṁsu. 

dn16:1.25.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā acirapakkantesu pāṭaligāmikesu upāsakesu suññāgāraṁ pāvisi. 

dn16:1.26.0
Pali: 7. Pāṭaliputtanagaramāpana 

dn16:1.26.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sunidhavassakārā magadhamahāmattā pāṭaligāme nagaraṁ māpenti vajjīnaṁ paṭibāhāya. 

dn16:1.26.2
Pali: Tena samayena sambahulā devatāyo sahasseva pāṭaligāme vatthūni pariggaṇhanti. 

dn16:1.26.3
Pali: Yasmiṁ padese mahesakkhā devatā vatthūni pariggaṇhanti, mahesakkhānaṁ tattha raññaṁ rājamahāmattānaṁ cittāni namanti nivesanāni māpetuṁ. 

dn16:1.27.1
Pali: Yasmiṁ padese majjhimā devatā vatthūni pariggaṇhanti, majjhimānaṁ tattha raññaṁ rājamahāmattānaṁ cittāni namanti nivesanāni māpetuṁ. 

dn16:1.27.2
Pali: Yasmiṁ padese nīcā devatā vatthūni pariggaṇhanti, nīcānaṁ tattha raññaṁ rājamahāmattānaṁ cittāni namanti nivesanāni māpetuṁ. 

dn16:1.27.3
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā dibbena cakkhunā visuddhena atikkantamānusakena tā devatāyo sahasseva pāṭaligāme vatthūni pariggaṇhantiyo. 

dn16:1.27.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:1.27.5
Pali: “Ke nu kho, ānanda, pāṭaligāme nagaraṁ māpentī”ti? 

dn16:1.27.6
Pali: “Sunidhavassakārā, bhante, magadhamahāmattā pāṭaligāme nagaraṁ māpenti vajjīnaṁ paṭibāhāyā”ti. 

dn16:1.28.1
Pali: “Seyyathāpi, ānanda, devehi tāvatiṁsehi saddhiṁ mantetvā; 

dn16:1.28.2
Pali: evameva kho, ānanda, sunidhavassakārā magadhamahāmattā pāṭaligāme nagaraṁ māpenti vajjīnaṁ paṭibāhāya. 

dn16:1.28.3
Pali: Idhāhaṁ, ānanda, addasaṁ dibbena cakkhunā visuddhena atikkantamānusakena sambahulā devatāyo sahasseva pāṭaligāme vatthūni pariggaṇhantiyo. 

dn16:1.28.4
Pali: Yasmiṁ, ānanda, padese mahesakkhā devatā vatthūni pariggaṇhanti, mahesakkhānaṁ tattha raññaṁ rājamahāmattānaṁ cittāni namanti nivesanāni māpetuṁ. 

dn16:1.28.5
Pali: Yasmiṁ padese majjhimā devatā vatthūni pariggaṇhanti, majjhimānaṁ tattha raññaṁ rājamahāmattānaṁ cittāni namanti nivesanāni māpetuṁ. 

dn16:1.28.6
Pali: Yasmiṁ padese nīcā devatā vatthūni pariggaṇhanti, nīcānaṁ tattha raññaṁ rājamahāmattānaṁ cittāni namanti nivesanāni māpetuṁ. 

dn16:1.28.7
Pali: Yāvatā, ānanda, ariyaṁ āyatanaṁ yāvatā vaṇippatho idaṁ agganagaraṁ bhavissati pāṭaliputtaṁ puṭabhedanaṁ. 

dn16:1.28.8
Pali: Pāṭaliputtassa kho, ānanda, tayo antarāyā bhavissanti—

dn16:1.28.9
Pali: aggito vā udakato vā mithubhedā vā”ti. 

dn16:1.29.1
Pali: Atha kho sunidhavassakārā magadhamahāmattā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavatā saddhiṁ sammodiṁsu, 

dn16:1.29.2
Pali: sammodanīyaṁ kathaṁ sāraṇīyaṁ vītisāretvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhaṁsu, ekamantaṁ ṭhitā kho sunidhavassakārā magadhamahāmattā bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ: 

dn16:1.29.3
Pali: “adhivāsetu no bhavaṁ gotamo ajjatanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā”ti. 

dn16:1.29.4
Pali: Adhivāsesi bhagavā tuṇhībhāvena. 

dn16:1.30.1
Pali: Atha kho sunidhavassakārā magadhamahāmattā bhagavato adhivāsanaṁ viditvā yena sako āvasatho tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā sake āvasathe paṇītaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyādāpetvā bhagavato kālaṁ ārocāpesuṁ: 

dn16:1.30.2
Pali: “kālo, bho gotama, niṭṭhitaṁ bhattan”ti. 

dn16:1.30.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena yena sunidhavassakārānaṁ magadhamahāmattānaṁ āvasatho tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

dn16:1.30.4
Pali: Atha kho sunidhavassakārā magadhamahāmattā buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappesuṁ sampavāresuṁ. 

dn16:1.30.5
Pali: Atha kho sunidhavassakārā magadhamahāmattā bhagavantaṁ bhuttāviṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ aññataraṁ nīcaṁ āsanaṁ gahetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. 

dn16:1.31.1
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinne kho sunidhavassakāre magadhamahāmatte bhagavā imāhi gāthāhi anumodi: 

dn16:1.31.2
Pali: “Yasmiṁ padese kappeti, 

dn16:1.31.3
Pali: vāsaṁ paṇḍitajātiyo; 

dn16:1.31.4
Pali: Sīlavantettha bhojetvā, 

dn16:1.31.5
Pali: saññate brahmacārayo. 

dn16:1.31.6
Pali: Yā tattha devatā āsuṁ, 

dn16:1.31.7
Pali: tāsaṁ dakkhiṇamādise; 

dn16:1.31.8
Pali: Tā pūjitā pūjayanti, 

dn16:1.31.9
Pali: mānitā mānayanti naṁ. 

dn16:1.31.10
Pali: Tato naṁ anukampanti, 

dn16:1.31.11
Pali: mātā puttaṁva orasaṁ; 

dn16:1.31.12
Pali: Devatānukampito poso, 

dn16:1.31.13
Pali: sadā bhadrāni passatī”ti. 

dn16:1.31.14
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā sunidhavassakāre magadhamahāmatte imāhi gāthāhi anumoditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

dn16:1.32.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sunidhavassakārā magadhamahāmattā bhagavantaṁ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandhā honti: 

dn16:1.32.2
Pali: “yenajja samaṇo gotamo dvārena nikkhamissati, taṁ gotamadvāraṁ nāma bhavissati. 

dn16:1.32.3
Pali: Yena titthena gaṅgaṁ nadiṁ tarissati, taṁ gotamatitthaṁ nāma bhavissatī”ti. 

dn16:1.32.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā yena dvārena nikkhami, taṁ gotamadvāraṁ nāma ahosi. 

dn16:1.32.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā yena gaṅgā nadī tenupasaṅkami. 

dn16:1.33.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gaṅgā nadī pūrā hoti samatittikā kākapeyyā. 

dn16:1.33.2
Pali: Appekacce manussā nāvaṁ pariyesanti, appekacce uḷumpaṁ pariyesanti, appekacce kullaṁ bandhanti apārā, pāraṁ gantukāmā. 

dn16:1.33.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā—seyyathāpi nāma balavā puriso samiñjitaṁ vā bāhaṁ pasāreyya, pasāritaṁ vā bāhaṁ samiñjeyya; evameva—gaṅgāya nadiyā orimatīre antarahito pārimatīre paccuṭṭhāsi saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena. 

dn16:1.34.1
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā te manusse appekacce nāvaṁ pariyesante appekacce uḷumpaṁ pariyesante appekacce kullaṁ bandhante apārā pāraṁ gantukāme. 

dn16:1.34.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etamatthaṁ viditvā tāyaṁ velāyaṁ imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi: 

dn16:1.34.3
Pali: “Ye taranti aṇṇavaṁ saraṁ, 

dn16:1.34.4
Pali: Setuṁ katvāna visajja pallalāni; 

dn16:1.34.5
Pali: Kullañhi jano bandhati, 

dn16:1.34.6
Pali: Tiṇṇā medhāvino janā”ti. 

dn16:1.34.7
Pali: Paṭhamabhāṇavāro. 

dn16:2.1.0
Pali: 8. Ariyasaccakathā 

dn16:2.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:2.1.2
Pali: “āyāmānanda, yena koṭigāmo tenupasaṅkamissāmā”ti. 

dn16:2.1.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paccassosi. 

dn16:2.1.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ yena koṭigāmo tadavasari. 

dn16:2.1.5
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā koṭigāme viharati. 

dn16:2.2.1
Pali: Tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi: 

dn16:2.2.2
Pali: “Catunnaṁ, bhikkhave, ariyasaccānaṁ ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca. 

dn16:2.2.3
Pali: Katamesaṁ catunnaṁ? 

dn16:2.2.4
Pali: Dukkhassa, bhikkhave, ariyasaccassa ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca. 

dn16:2.2.5
Pali: Dukkhasamudayassa, bhikkhave, ariyasaccassa ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca. 

dn16:2.2.6
Pali: Dukkhanirodhassa, bhikkhave, ariyasaccassa ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca. 

dn16:2.2.7
Pali: Dukkhanirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya, bhikkhave, ariyasaccassa ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca. 

dn16:2.2.8
Pali: Tayidaṁ, bhikkhave, dukkhaṁ ariyasaccaṁ anubuddhaṁ paṭividdhaṁ, dukkhasamudayaṁ ariyasaccaṁ anubuddhaṁ paṭividdhaṁ, dukkhanirodhaṁ ariyasaccaṁ anubuddhaṁ paṭividdhaṁ, dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccaṁ anubuddhaṁ paṭividdhaṁ, ucchinnā bhavataṇhā, khīṇā bhavanetti, natthi dāni punabbhavo”ti. 

dn16:2.3.1
Pali: Idamavoca bhagavā. 

dn16:2.3.2
Pali: Idaṁ vatvāna sugato athāparaṁ etadavoca satthā: 

dn16:2.3.3
Pali: “Catunnaṁ ariyasaccānaṁ, 

dn16:2.3.4
Pali: yathābhūtaṁ adassanā; 

dn16:2.3.5
Pali: Saṁsitaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ, 

dn16:2.3.6
Pali: tāsu tāsveva jātisu. 

dn16:2.3.7
Pali: Tāni etāni diṭṭhāni, 

dn16:2.3.8
Pali: bhavanetti samūhatā; 

dn16:2.3.9
Pali: Ucchinnaṁ mūlaṁ dukkhassa, 

dn16:2.3.10
Pali: natthi dāni punabbhavo”ti. 

dn16:2.4.1
Pali: Tatrapi sudaṁ bhagavā koṭigāme viharanto etadeva bahulaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ dhammiṁ kathaṁ karoti: 

dn16:2.4.2
Pali: “iti sīlaṁ, iti samādhi, iti paññā. 

dn16:2.4.3
Pali: Sīlaparibhāvito samādhi mahapphalo hoti mahānisaṁso. 

dn16:2.4.4
Pali: Samādhiparibhāvitā paññā mahapphalā hoti mahānisaṁsā. 

dn16:2.4.5
Pali: Paññāparibhāvitaṁ cittaṁ sammadeva āsavehi vimuccati, seyyathidaṁ—

dn16:2.4.6
Pali: kāmāsavā, bhavāsavā, avijjāsavā”ti. 

dn16:2.5.0
Pali: 9. Anāvattidhammasambodhiparāyaṇa 

dn16:2.5.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā koṭigāme yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:2.5.2
Pali: “āyāmānanda, yena nātikā tenupaṅkamissāmā”ti. 

dn16:2.5.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paccassosi. 

dn16:2.5.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ yena nātikā tadavasari. 

dn16:2.5.5
Pali: Tatrapi sudaṁ bhagavā nātike viharati giñjakāvasathe. 

dn16:2.6.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā ānando bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: 

dn16:2.6.2
Pali: “sāḷho nāma, bhante, bhikkhu nātike kālaṅkato, tassa kā gati, ko abhisamparāyo? 

dn16:2.6.3
Pali: Nandā nāma, bhante, bhikkhunī nātike kālaṅkatā, tassā kā gati, ko abhisamparāyo? 

dn16:2.6.4
Pali: Sudatto nāma, bhante, upāsako nātike kālaṅkato, tassa kā gati, ko abhisamparāyo? 

dn16:2.6.5
Pali: Sujātā nāma, bhante, upāsikā nātike kālaṅkatā, tassā kā gati, ko abhisamparāyo? 

dn16:2.6.6
Pali: Kukkuṭo nāma, bhante, upāsako nātike kālaṅkato, tassa kā gati, ko abhisamparāyo? 

dn16:2.6.7
Pali: Kāḷimbo nāma, bhante, upāsako …pe… 

dn16:2.6.8
Pali: nikaṭo nāma, bhante, upāsako … 

dn16:2.6.9
Pali: kaṭissaho nāma, bhante, upāsako … 

dn16:2.6.10
Pali: tuṭṭho nāma, bhante, upāsako … 

dn16:2.6.11
Pali: santuṭṭho nāma, bhante, upāsako … 

dn16:2.6.12
Pali: bhaddo nāma, bhante, upāsako … 

dn16:2.6.13
Pali: subhaddo nāma, bhante, upāsako nātike kālaṅkato, tassa kā gati, ko abhisamparāyo”ti? 

dn16:2.7.1
Pali: “Sāḷho, ānanda, bhikkhu āsavānaṁ khayā anāsavaṁ cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja vihāsi. 

dn16:2.7.2
Pali: Nandā, ānanda, bhikkhunī pañcannaṁ orambhāgiyānaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā opapātikā tattha parinibbāyinī anāvattidhammā tasmā lokā. 

dn16:2.7.3
Pali: Sudatto, ānanda, upāsako tiṇṇaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā rāgadosamohānaṁ tanuttā sakadāgāmī sakideva imaṁ lokaṁ āgantvā dukkhassantaṁ karissati. 

dn16:2.7.4
Pali: Sujātā, ānanda, upāsikā tiṇṇaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā sotāpannā avinipātadhammā niyatā sambodhiparāyaṇā. 

dn16:2.7.5
Pali: Kukkuṭo, ānanda, upāsako pañcannaṁ orambhāgiyānaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā opapātiko tattha parinibbāyī anāvattidhammo tasmā lokā. 

dn16:2.7.6
Pali: Kāḷimbo, ānanda, upāsako …pe… 

dn16:2.7.7
Pali: nikaṭo, ānanda, upāsako … 

dn16:2.7.8
Pali: kaṭissaho, ānanda, upāsako … 

dn16:2.7.9
Pali: tuṭṭho, ānanda, upāsako … 

dn16:2.7.10
Pali: santuṭṭho, ānanda, upāsako … 

dn16:2.7.11
Pali: bhaddo, ānanda, upāsako … 

dn16:2.7.12
Pali: subhaddo, ānanda, upāsako pañcannaṁ orambhāgiyānaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā opapātiko tattha parinibbāyī anāvattidhammo tasmā lokā. 

dn16:2.7.13
Pali: Paropaññāsaṁ, ānanda, nātike upāsakā kālaṅkatā, pañcannaṁ orambhāgiyānaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā opapātikā tattha parinibbāyino anāvattidhammā tasmā lokā. 

dn16:2.7.14
Pali: Sādhikā navuti, ānanda, nātike upāsakā kālaṅkatā tiṇṇaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā rāgadosamohānaṁ tanuttā sakadāgāmino sakideva imaṁ lokaṁ āgantvā dukkhassantaṁ karissanti. 

dn16:2.7.15
Pali: Sātirekāni, ānanda, pañcasatāni nātike upāsakā kālaṅkatā, tiṇṇaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā sotāpannā avinipātadhammā niyatā sambodhiparāyaṇā. 

dn16:2.8.0
Pali: 10. Dhammādāsadhammapariyāya 

dn16:2.8.1
Pali: Anacchariyaṁ kho panetaṁ, ānanda, yaṁ manussabhūto kālaṁ kareyya. 

dn16:2.8.2
Pali: Tasmiṁyeva kālaṅkate tathāgataṁ upasaṅkamitvā etamatthaṁ pucchissatha, vihesā hesā, ānanda, tathāgatassa. 

dn16:2.8.3
Pali: Tasmātihānanda, dhammādāsaṁ nāma dhammapariyāyaṁ desessāmi, yena samannāgato ariyasāvako ākaṅkhamāno attanāva attānaṁ byākareyya: 

dn16:2.8.4
Pali: ‘khīṇanirayomhi khīṇatiracchānayoni khīṇapettivisayo khīṇāpāyaduggativinipāto, sotāpannohamasmi avinipātadhammo niyato sambodhiparāyaṇo’ti. 

dn16:2.9.1
Pali: Katamo ca so, ānanda, dhammādāso dhammapariyāyo, yena samannāgato ariyasāvako ākaṅkhamāno attanāva attānaṁ byākareyya: 

dn16:2.9.2
Pali: ‘khīṇanirayomhi khīṇatiracchānayoni khīṇapettivisayo khīṇāpāyaduggativinipāto, sotāpannohamasmi avinipātadhammo niyato sambodhiparāyaṇo’ti? 

dn16:2.9.3
Pali: Idhānanda, ariyasāvako buddhe aveccappasādena samannāgato hoti: 

dn16:2.9.4
Pali: ‘itipi so bhagavā arahaṁ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato lokavidū anuttaro purisadammasārathi satthā devamanussānaṁ buddho bhagavā’ti. 

dn16:2.9.5
Pali: Dhamme aveccappasādena samannāgato hoti: 

dn16:2.9.6
Pali: ‘svākkhāto bhagavatā dhammo sandiṭṭhiko akāliko ehipassiko opaneyyiko paccattaṁ veditabbo viññūhī’ti. 

dn16:2.9.7
Pali: Saṅghe aveccappasādena samannāgato hoti: 

dn16:2.9.8
Pali: ‘suppaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, ujuppaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, ñāyappaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, sāmīcippaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho yadidaṁ cattāri purisayugāni aṭṭha purisapuggalā, esa bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho āhuneyyo pāhuneyyo dakkhiṇeyyo añjalikaraṇīyo anuttaraṁ puññakkhettaṁ lokassā’ti. 

dn16:2.9.9
Pali: Ariyakantehi sīlehi samannāgato hoti akhaṇḍehi acchiddehi asabalehi akammāsehi bhujissehi viññūpasatthehi aparāmaṭṭhehi samādhisaṁvattanikehi. 

dn16:2.9.10
Pali: Ayaṁ kho so, ānanda, dhammādāso dhammapariyāyo, yena samannāgato ariyasāvako ākaṅkhamāno attanāva attānaṁ byākareyya: 

dn16:2.9.11
Pali: ‘khīṇanirayomhi khīṇatiracchānayoni khīṇapettivisayo khīṇāpāyaduggativinipāto, sotāpannohamasmi avinipātadhammo niyato sambodhiparāyaṇo’”ti. 

dn16:2.10.1
Pali: Tatrapi sudaṁ bhagavā nātike viharanto giñjakāvasathe etadeva bahulaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ dhammiṁ kathaṁ karoti: 

dn16:2.10.2
Pali: “Iti sīlaṁ iti samādhi iti paññā. 

dn16:2.10.3
Pali: Sīlaparibhāvito samādhi mahapphalo hoti mahānisaṁso. 

dn16:2.10.4
Pali: Samādhiparibhāvitā paññā mahapphalā hoti mahānisaṁsā. 

dn16:2.10.5
Pali: Paññāparibhāvitaṁ cittaṁ sammadeva āsavehi vimuccati, seyyathidaṁ—

dn16:2.10.6
Pali: kāmāsavā, bhavāsavā, avijjāsavā”ti. 

dn16:2.10.7
Pali: (…) 

dn16:2.11.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā nātike yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi: 

dn16:2.11.2
Pali: “āyāmānanda, yena vesālī tenupasaṅkamissāmā”ti. 

dn16:2.11.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paccassosi. 

dn16:2.11.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ yena vesālī tadavasari. 

dn16:2.11.5
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā vesāliyaṁ viharati ambapālivane. 

dn16:2.12.1
Pali: Tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi: 

dn16:2.12.2
Pali: “Sato, bhikkhave, bhikkhu vihareyya sampajāno, 

dn16:2.12.3
Pali: ayaṁ vo amhākaṁ anusāsanī. 

dn16:2.12.4
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sato hoti? 

dn16:2.12.5
Pali: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kāye kāyānupassī viharati ātāpī sampajāno satimā vineyya loke abhijjhādomanassaṁ. 

dn16:2.12.6
Pali: Vedanāsu vedanānupassī …pe… 

dn16:2.12.7
Pali: citte cittānupassī …pe… 

dn16:2.12.8
Pali: dhammesu dhammānupassī viharati ātāpī sampajāno satimā vineyya loke abhijjhādomanassaṁ. 

dn16:2.12.9
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sato hoti. 

dn16:2.13.1
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sampajāno hoti? 

dn16:2.13.2
Pali: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu abhikkante paṭikkante sampajānakārī hoti, ālokite vilokite sampajānakārī hoti, samiñjite pasārite sampajānakārī hoti, saṅghāṭipattacīvaradhāraṇe sampajānakārī hoti, asite pīte khāyite sāyite sampajānakārī hoti, uccārapassāvakamme sampajānakārī hoti, gate ṭhite nisinne sutte jāgarite bhāsite tuṇhībhāve sampajānakārī hoti. 

dn16:2.13.3
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sampajāno hoti. 

dn16:2.13.4
Pali: Sato, bhikkhave, bhikkhu vihareyya sampajāno, 

dn16:2.13.5
Pali: ayaṁ vo amhākaṁ anusāsanī”ti. 

dn16:2.14.0
Pali: 11. Ambapālīgaṇikā 

dn16:2.14.1
Pali: Assosi kho ambapālī gaṇikā: “bhagavā kira vesāliṁ anuppatto vesāliyaṁ viharati mayhaṁ ambavane”ti. 

dn16:2.14.2
Pali: Atha kho ambapālī gaṇikā bhaddāni bhaddāni yānāni yojāpetvā bhaddaṁ bhaddaṁ yānaṁ abhiruhitvā bhaddehi bhaddehi yānehi vesāliyā niyyāsi. Yena sako ārāmo tena pāyāsi. 

dn16:2.14.3
