Pali: Atha kho bhagavā nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena yena sandhāgāraṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā pāde pakkhāletvā sandhāgāraṁ pavisitvā majjhimaṁ thambhaṁ nissāya puratthābhimukho nisīdi. 

dn33:1.4.2
Pali: Bhikkhusaṅghopi kho pāde pakkhāletvā sandhāgāraṁ pavisitvā pacchimaṁ bhittiṁ nissāya puratthābhimukho nisīdi bhagavantaṁyeva purakkhatvā. 

dn33:1.4.3
Pali: Pāveyyakāpi kho mallā pāde pakkhāletvā sandhāgāraṁ pavisitvā puratthimaṁ bhittiṁ nissāya pacchimābhimukhā nisīdiṁsu bhagavantaṁyeva purakkhatvā. 

dn33:1.4.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pāveyyake malle bahudeva rattiṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā uyyojesi: 

dn33:1.4.5
Pali: “abhikkantā kho, vāseṭṭhā, ratti. 

dn33:1.4.6
Pali: Yassadāni tumhe kālaṁ maññathā”ti. 

dn33:1.4.7
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho pāveyyakā mallā bhagavato paṭissutvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkamiṁsu. 

dn33:1.5.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā acirapakkantesu pāveyyakesu mallesu tuṇhībhūtaṁ tuṇhībhūtaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ anuviloketvā āyasmantaṁ sāriputtaṁ āmantesi: 

dn33:1.5.2
Pali: “vigatathinamiddho kho, sāriputta, bhikkhusaṅgho. 

dn33:1.5.3
Pali: Paṭibhātu taṁ, sāriputta, bhikkhūnaṁ dhammīkathā. 

dn33:1.5.4
Pali: Piṭṭhi me āgilāyati. 

dn33:1.5.5
Pali: Tamahaṁ āyamissāmī”ti. 

dn33:1.5.6
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā sāriputto bhagavato paccassosi. 

dn33:1.5.7
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā catugguṇaṁ saṅghāṭiṁ paññāpetvā dakkhiṇena passena sīhaseyyaṁ kappesi pāde pādaṁ accādhāya, sato sampajāno uṭṭhānasaññaṁ manasi karitvā. 

dn33:1.6.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena nigaṇṭho nāṭaputto pāvāyaṁ adhunākālaṅkato hoti. 

dn33:1.6.2
Pali: Tassa kālaṅkiriyāya bhinnā nigaṇṭhā dvedhikajātā bhaṇḍanajātā kalahajātā vivādāpannā aññamaññaṁ mukhasattīhi vitudantā viharanti: 

dn33:1.6.3
Pali: “na tvaṁ imaṁ dhammavinayaṁ ājānāsi, ahaṁ imaṁ dhammavinayaṁ ājānāmi, kiṁ tvaṁ imaṁ dhammavinayaṁ ājānissasi. Micchāpaṭipanno tvamasi, ahamasmi sammāpaṭipanno. Sahitaṁ me, asahitaṁ te. Purevacanīyaṁ pacchā avaca, pacchāvacanīyaṁ pure avaca. Adhiciṇṇaṁ te viparāvattaṁ, āropito te vādo, niggahito tvamasi, cara vādappamokkhāya, nibbeṭhehi vā sace pahosī”ti. 

dn33:1.6.4
Pali: Vadhoyeva kho maññe nigaṇṭhesu nāṭaputtiyesu vattati. 

dn33:1.6.5
Pali: Yepi nigaṇṭhassa nāṭaputtassa sāvakā gihī odātavasanā, tepi nigaṇṭhesu nāṭaputtiyesu nibbinnarūpā virattarūpā paṭivānarūpā, yathā taṁ durakkhāte dhammavinaye duppavedite aniyyānike anupasamasaṁvattanike asammāsambuddhappavedite bhinnathūpe appaṭisaraṇe. 

dn33:1.7.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāriputto bhikkhū āmantesi: 

dn33:1.7.2
Pali: “nigaṇṭho, āvuso, nāṭaputto pāvāyaṁ adhunākālaṅkato, 

dn33:1.7.3
Pali: tassa kālaṅkiriyāya bhinnā nigaṇṭhā dvedhikajātā …pe… bhinnathūpe appaṭisaraṇe. 

dn33:1.7.4
Pali: Evañhetaṁ, āvuso, hoti durakkhāte dhammavinaye duppavedite aniyyānike anupasamasaṁvattanike asammāsambuddhappavedite. 

dn33:1.7.5
Pali: Ayaṁ kho panāvuso, amhākaṁ bhagavatā dhammo svākkhāto suppavedito niyyāniko upasamasaṁvattaniko sammāsambuddhappavedito. 

dn33:1.7.6
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ, na vivaditabbaṁ, yathayidaṁ brahmacariyaṁ addhaniyaṁ assa ciraṭṭhitikaṁ, tadassa bahujanahitāya bahujanasukhāya lokānukampāya atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.7.7
Pali: Katamo cāvuso, amhākaṁ bhagavatā dhammo svākkhāto suppavedito niyyāniko upasamasaṁvattaniko sammāsambuddhappavedito; 

dn33:1.7.8
Pali: yattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ, na vivaditabbaṁ, yathayidaṁ brahmacariyaṁ addhaniyaṁ assa ciraṭṭhitikaṁ, tadassa bahujanahitāya bahujanasukhāya lokānukampāya atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ? 

dn33:1.7.9.0
Pali: 1. Ekaka 

dn33:1.7.10
Pali: Atthi kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena eko dhammo sammadakkhāto. 

dn33:1.7.11
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ, na vivaditabbaṁ, yathayidaṁ brahmacariyaṁ addhaniyaṁ assa ciraṭṭhitikaṁ, tadassa bahujanahitāya bahujanasukhāya lokānukampāya atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.8.1
Pali: Katamo eko dhammo? 

dn33:1.8.2
Pali: Sabbe sattā āhāraṭṭhitikā. 

dn33:1.8.3
Pali: Sabbe sattā saṅkhāraṭṭhitikā. 

dn33:1.8.4
Pali: Ayaṁ kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena eko dhammo sammadakkhāto. 

dn33:1.8.5
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ, na vivaditabbaṁ, yathayidaṁ brahmacariyaṁ addhaniyaṁ assa ciraṭṭhitikaṁ, tadassa bahujanahitāya bahujanasukhāya lokānukampāya atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.9.0
Pali: 2. Duka 

dn33:1.9.1
Pali: Atthi kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena dve dhammā sammadakkhātā. 

dn33:1.9.2
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ, na vivaditabbaṁ, yathayidaṁ brahmacariyaṁ addhaniyaṁ assa ciraṭṭhitikaṁ, tadassa bahujanahitāya bahujanasukhāya lokānukampāya atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.9.3
Pali: Katame dve? 

dn33:1.9.4
Pali: Nāmañca rūpañca. 

dn33:1.9.5
Pali: Avijjā ca bhavataṇhā ca. 

dn33:1.9.6
Pali: Bhavadiṭṭhi ca vibhavadiṭṭhi ca. 

dn33:1.9.7
Pali: Ahirikañca anottappañca. 

dn33:1.9.8
Pali: Hirī ca ottappañca. 

dn33:1.9.9
Pali: Dovacassatā ca pāpamittatā ca. 

dn33:1.9.10
Pali: Sovacassatā ca kalyāṇamittatā ca. 

dn33:1.9.11
Pali: Āpattikusalatā ca āpattivuṭṭhānakusalatā ca. 

dn33:1.9.12
Pali: Samāpattikusalatā ca samāpattivuṭṭhānakusalatā ca. 

dn33:1.9.13
Pali: Dhātukusalatā ca manasikārakusalatā ca. 

dn33:1.9.14
Pali: Āyatanakusalatā ca paṭiccasamuppādakusalatā ca. 

dn33:1.9.15
Pali: Ṭhānakusalatā ca aṭṭhānakusalatā ca. 

dn33:1.9.16
Pali: Ajjavañca lajjavañca. 

dn33:1.9.17
Pali: Khanti ca soraccañca. 

dn33:1.9.18
Pali: Sākhalyañca paṭisanthāro ca. 

dn33:1.9.19
Pali: Avihiṁsā ca soceyyañca. 

dn33:1.9.20
Pali: Muṭṭhassaccañca asampajaññañca. 

dn33:1.9.21
Pali: Sati ca sampajaññañca. 

dn33:1.9.22
Pali: Indriyesu aguttadvāratā ca bhojane amattaññutā ca. 

dn33:1.9.23
Pali: Indriyesu guttadvāratā ca bhojane mattaññutā ca. 

dn33:1.9.24
Pali: Paṭisaṅkhānabalañca bhāvanābalañca. 

dn33:1.9.25
Pali: Satibalañca samādhibalañca. 

dn33:1.9.26
Pali: Samatho ca vipassanā ca. 

dn33:1.9.27
Pali: Samathanimittañca paggahanimittañca. 

dn33:1.9.28
Pali: Paggaho ca avikkhepo ca. 

dn33:1.9.29
Pali: Sīlavipatti ca diṭṭhivipatti ca. 

dn33:1.9.30
Pali: Sīlasampadā ca diṭṭhisampadā ca. 

dn33:1.9.31
Pali: Sīlavisuddhi ca diṭṭhivisuddhi ca. 

dn33:1.9.32
Pali: Diṭṭhivisuddhi kho pana yathā diṭṭhissa ca padhānaṁ. 

dn33:1.9.33
Pali: Saṁvego ca saṁvejanīyesu ṭhānesu saṁviggassa ca yoniso padhānaṁ. 

dn33:1.9.34
Pali: Asantuṭṭhitā ca kusalesu dhammesu appaṭivānitā ca padhānasmiṁ. 

dn33:1.9.35
Pali: Vijjā ca vimutti ca. 

dn33:1.9.36
Pali: Khayeñāṇaṁ anuppādeñāṇaṁ. 

dn33:1.9.37
Pali: Ime kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena dve dhammā sammadakkhātā. 

dn33:1.9.38
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ, na vivaditabbaṁ, yathayidaṁ brahmacariyaṁ addhaniyaṁ assa ciraṭṭhitikaṁ, tadassa bahujanahitāya bahujanasukhāya lokānukampāya atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.0
Pali: 3. Tika 

dn33:1.10.1
Pali: Atthi kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena tayo dhammā sammadakkhātā. 

dn33:1.10.2
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.3
Pali: Katame tayo? 

dn33:1.10.4
Pali: Tīṇi akusalamūlāni—

dn33:1.10.5
Pali: lobho akusalamūlaṁ, doso akusalamūlaṁ, moho akusalamūlaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.6
Pali: Tīṇi kusalamūlāni—

dn33:1.10.7
Pali: alobho kusalamūlaṁ, adoso kusalamūlaṁ, amoho kusalamūlaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.8
Pali: Tīṇi duccaritāni—

dn33:1.10.9
Pali: kāyaduccaritaṁ, vacīduccaritaṁ, manoduccaritaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.10
Pali: Tīṇi sucaritāni—

dn33:1.10.11
Pali: kāyasucaritaṁ, vacīsucaritaṁ, manosucaritaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.12
Pali: Tayo akusalavitakkā—

dn33:1.10.13
Pali: kāmavitakko, byāpādavitakko, vihiṁsāvitakko. 

dn33:1.10.14
Pali: Tayo kusalavitakkā—

dn33:1.10.15
Pali: nekkhammavitakko, abyāpādavitakko, avihiṁsāvitakko. 

dn33:1.10.16
Pali: Tayo akusalasaṅkappā—

dn33:1.10.17
Pali: kāmasaṅkappo, byāpādasaṅkappo, vihiṁsāsaṅkappo. 

dn33:1.10.18
Pali: Tayo kusalasaṅkappā—

dn33:1.10.19
Pali: nekkhammasaṅkappo, abyāpādasaṅkappo, avihiṁsāsaṅkappo. 

dn33:1.10.20
Pali: Tisso akusalasaññā—

dn33:1.10.21
Pali: kāmasaññā, byāpādasaññā, vihiṁsāsaññā. 

dn33:1.10.22
Pali: Tisso kusalasaññā—

dn33:1.10.23
Pali: nekkhammasaññā, abyāpādasaññā, avihiṁsāsaññā. 

dn33:1.10.24
Pali: Tisso akusaladhātuyo—

dn33:1.10.25
Pali: kāmadhātu, byāpādadhātu, vihiṁsādhātu. 

dn33:1.10.26
Pali: Tisso kusaladhātuyo—

dn33:1.10.27
Pali: nekkhammadhātu, abyāpādadhātu, avihiṁsādhātu. 

dn33:1.10.28
Pali: Aparāpi tisso dhātuyo—

dn33:1.10.29
Pali: kāmadhātu, rūpadhātu, arūpadhātu. 

dn33:1.10.30
Pali: Aparāpi tisso dhātuyo—

dn33:1.10.31
Pali: rūpadhātu, arūpadhātu, nirodhadhātu. 

dn33:1.10.32
Pali: Aparāpi tisso dhātuyo—

dn33:1.10.33
Pali: hīnadhātu, majjhimadhātu, paṇītadhātu. 

dn33:1.10.34
Pali: Tisso taṇhā—

dn33:1.10.35
Pali: kāmataṇhā, bhavataṇhā, vibhavataṇhā. 

dn33:1.10.36
Pali: Aparāpi tisso taṇhā—

dn33:1.10.37
Pali: kāmataṇhā, rūpataṇhā, arūpataṇhā. 

dn33:1.10.38
Pali: Aparāpi tisso taṇhā—

dn33:1.10.39
Pali: rūpataṇhā, arūpataṇhā, nirodhataṇhā. 

dn33:1.10.40
Pali: Tīṇi saṁyojanāni—

dn33:1.10.41
Pali: sakkāyadiṭṭhi, vicikicchā, sīlabbataparāmāso. 

dn33:1.10.42
Pali: Tayo āsavā—

dn33:1.10.43
Pali: kāmāsavo, bhavāsavo, avijjāsavo. 

dn33:1.10.44
Pali: Tayo bhavā—

dn33:1.10.45
Pali: kāmabhavo, rūpabhavo, arūpabhavo. 

dn33:1.10.46
Pali: Tisso esanā—

dn33:1.10.47
Pali: kāmesanā, bhavesanā, brahmacariyesanā. 

dn33:1.10.48
Pali: Tisso vidhā—

dn33:1.10.49
Pali: seyyohamasmīti vidhā, sadisohamasmīti vidhā, hīnohamasmīti vidhā. 

dn33:1.10.50
Pali: Tayo addhā—

dn33:1.10.51
Pali: atīto addhā, anāgato addhā, paccuppanno addhā. 

dn33:1.10.52
Pali: Tayo antā—

dn33:1.10.53
Pali: sakkāyo anto, sakkāyasamudayo anto, sakkāyanirodho anto. 

dn33:1.10.54
Pali: Tisso vedanā—

dn33:1.10.55
Pali: sukhā vedanā, dukkhā vedanā, adukkhamasukhā vedanā. 

dn33:1.10.56
Pali: Tisso dukkhatā—

dn33:1.10.57
Pali: dukkhadukkhatā, saṅkhāradukkhatā, vipariṇāmadukkhatā. 

dn33:1.10.58
Pali: Tayo rāsī—

dn33:1.10.59
Pali: micchattaniyato rāsi, sammattaniyato rāsi, aniyato rāsi. 

dn33:1.10.60
Pali: Tayo tamā—

dn33:1.10.61
Pali: atītaṁ vā addhānaṁ ārabbha kaṅkhati vicikicchati nādhimuccati na sampasīdati, anāgataṁ vā addhānaṁ ārabbha kaṅkhati vicikicchati nādhimuccati na sampasīdati, etarahi vā paccuppannaṁ addhānaṁ ārabbha kaṅkhati vicikicchati nādhimuccati na sampasīdati. 

dn33:1.10.62
Pali: Tīṇi tathāgatassa arakkheyyāni—

dn33:1.10.63
Pali: parisuddhakāyasamācāro āvuso tathāgato, natthi tathāgatassa kāyaduccaritaṁ, yaṁ tathāgato rakkheyya: 

dn33:1.10.64
Pali: ‘mā me idaṁ paro aññāsī’ti. 

dn33:1.10.65
Pali: Parisuddhavacīsamācāro āvuso, tathāgato, natthi tathāgatassa vacīduccaritaṁ, yaṁ tathāgato rakkheyya: 

dn33:1.10.66
Pali: ‘mā me idaṁ paro aññāsī’ti. 

dn33:1.10.67
Pali: Parisuddhamanosamācāro, āvuso, tathāgato, natthi tathāgatassa manoduccaritaṁ yaṁ tathāgato rakkheyya: 

dn33:1.10.68
Pali: ‘mā me idaṁ paro aññāsī’ti. 

dn33:1.10.69
Pali: Tayo kiñcanā—

dn33:1.10.70
Pali: rāgo kiñcanaṁ, doso kiñcanaṁ, moho kiñcanaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.71
Pali: Tayo aggī—

dn33:1.10.72
Pali: rāgaggi, dosaggi, mohaggi. 

dn33:1.10.73
Pali: Aparepi tayo aggī—

dn33:1.10.74
Pali: āhuneyyaggi, gahapataggi, dakkhiṇeyyaggi. 

dn33:1.10.75
Pali: Tividhena rūpasaṅgaho—

dn33:1.10.76
Pali: sanidassanasappaṭighaṁ rūpaṁ, anidassanasappaṭighaṁ rūpaṁ, anidassanaappaṭighaṁ rūpaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.77
Pali: Tayo saṅkhārā—

dn33:1.10.78
Pali: puññābhisaṅkhāro, apuññābhisaṅkhāro, āneñjābhisaṅkhāro. 

dn33:1.10.79
Pali: Tayo puggalā—

dn33:1.10.80
Pali: sekkho puggalo, asekkho puggalo, nevasekkho nāsekkho puggalo. 

dn33:1.10.81
Pali: Tayo therā—

dn33:1.10.82
Pali: jātithero, dhammathero, sammutithero. 

dn33:1.10.83
Pali: Tīṇi puññakiriyavatthūni—

dn33:1.10.84
Pali: dānamayaṁ puññakiriyavatthu, sīlamayaṁ puññakiriyavatthu, bhāvanāmayaṁ puññakiriyavatthu. 

dn33:1.10.85
Pali: Tīṇi codanāvatthūni—

dn33:1.10.86
Pali: diṭṭhena, sutena, parisaṅkāya. 

dn33:1.10.87
Pali: Tisso kāmūpapattiyo—

dn33:1.10.88
Pali: santāvuso sattā paccupaṭṭhitakāmā, te paccupaṭṭhitesu kāmesu vasaṁ vattenti, seyyathāpi manussā ekacce ca devā ekacce ca vinipātikā. 

dn33:1.10.89
Pali: Ayaṁ paṭhamā kāmūpapatti. 

dn33:1.10.90
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā nimmitakāmā, te nimminitvā nimminitvā kāmesu vasaṁ vattenti, seyyathāpi devā nimmānaratī. 

dn33:1.10.91
Pali: Ayaṁ dutiyā kāmūpapatti. 

dn33:1.10.92
Pali: Santāvuso sattā paranimmitakāmā, te paranimmitesu kāmesu vasaṁ vattenti, seyyathāpi devā paranimmitavasavattī. 

dn33:1.10.93
Pali: Ayaṁ tatiyā kāmūpapatti. 

dn33:1.10.94
Pali: Tisso sukhūpapattiyo—

dn33:1.10.95
Pali: santāvuso sattā uppādetvā uppādetvā sukhaṁ viharanti, seyyathāpi devā brahmakāyikā. 

dn33:1.10.96
Pali: Ayaṁ paṭhamā sukhūpapatti. 

dn33:1.10.97
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā sukhena abhisannā parisannā paripūrā paripphuṭā. 

dn33:1.10.98
Pali: Te kadāci karahaci udānaṁ udānenti: 

dn33:1.10.99
Pali: ‘aho sukhaṁ, aho sukhan’ti, seyyathāpi devā ābhassarā. 

dn33:1.10.100
Pali: Ayaṁ dutiyā sukhūpapatti. 

dn33:1.10.101
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā sukhena abhisannā parisannā paripūrā paripphuṭā. 

dn33:1.10.102
Pali: Te santaṁyeva tusitā sukhaṁ paṭisaṁvedenti, seyyathāpi devā subhakiṇhā. 

dn33:1.10.103
Pali: Ayaṁ tatiyā sukhūpapatti. 

dn33:1.10.104
Pali: Tisso paññā—

dn33:1.10.105
Pali: sekkhā paññā, asekkhā paññā, nevasekkhānāsekkhā paññā. 

dn33:1.10.106
Pali: Aparāpi tisso paññā—

dn33:1.10.107
Pali: cintāmayā paññā, sutamayā paññā, bhāvanāmayā paññā. 

dn33:1.10.108
Pali: Tīṇāvudhāni—

dn33:1.10.109
Pali: sutāvudhaṁ, pavivekāvudhaṁ, paññāvudhaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.110
Pali: Tīṇindriyāni—

dn33:1.10.111
Pali: anaññātaññassāmītindriyaṁ, aññindriyaṁ, aññātāvindriyaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.112
Pali: Tīṇi cakkhūni—

dn33:1.10.113
Pali: maṁsacakkhu, dibbacakkhu, paññācakkhu. 

dn33:1.10.114
Pali: Tisso sikkhā—

dn33:1.10.115
Pali: adhisīlasikkhā, adhicittasikkhā, adhipaññāsikkhā. 

dn33:1.10.116
Pali: Tisso bhāvanā—

dn33:1.10.117
Pali: kāyabhāvanā, cittabhāvanā, paññābhāvanā. 

dn33:1.10.118
Pali: Tīṇi anuttariyāni—

dn33:1.10.119
Pali: dassanānuttariyaṁ, paṭipadānuttariyaṁ, vimuttānuttariyaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.120
Pali: Tayo samādhī—

dn33:1.10.121
Pali: savitakkasavicāro samādhi, avitakkavicāramatto samādhi, avitakkaavicāro samādhi. 

dn33:1.10.122
Pali: Aparepi tayo samādhī—

dn33:1.10.123
Pali: suññato samādhi, animitto samādhi, appaṇihito samādhi. 

dn33:1.10.124
Pali: Tīṇi soceyyāni—

dn33:1.10.125
Pali: kāyasoceyyaṁ, vacīsoceyyaṁ, manosoceyyaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.126
Pali: Tīṇi moneyyāni—

dn33:1.10.127
Pali: kāyamoneyyaṁ, vacīmoneyyaṁ, manomoneyyaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.128
Pali: Tīṇi kosallāni—

dn33:1.10.129
Pali: āyakosallaṁ, apāyakosallaṁ, upāyakosallaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.130
Pali: Tayo madā—

dn33:1.10.131
Pali: ārogyamado, yobbanamado, jīvitamado. 

dn33:1.10.132
Pali: Tīṇi ādhipateyyāni—

dn33:1.10.133
Pali: attādhipateyyaṁ, lokādhipateyyaṁ, dhammādhipateyyaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.134
Pali: Tīṇi kathāvatthūni—

dn33:1.10.135
Pali: atītaṁ vā addhānaṁ ārabbha kathaṁ katheyya: 

dn33:1.10.136
Pali: ‘evaṁ ahosi atītamaddhānan’ti; 

dn33:1.10.137
Pali: anāgataṁ vā addhānaṁ ārabbha kathaṁ katheyya: 

dn33:1.10.138
Pali: ‘evaṁ bhavissati anāgatamaddhānan’ti; 

dn33:1.10.139
Pali: etarahi vā paccuppannaṁ addhānaṁ ārabbha kathaṁ katheyya: 

dn33:1.10.140
Pali: ‘evaṁ hoti etarahi paccuppannaṁ addhānan’ti. 

dn33:1.10.141
Pali: Tisso vijjā—

dn33:1.10.142
Pali: pubbenivāsānussatiñāṇaṁ vijjā, sattānaṁ cutūpapāteñāṇaṁ vijjā, āsavānaṁ khayeñāṇaṁ vijjā. 

dn33:1.10.143
Pali: Tayo vihārā—

dn33:1.10.144
Pali: dibbo vihāro, brahmā vihāro, ariyo vihāro. 

dn33:1.10.145
Pali: Tīṇi pāṭihāriyāni—

dn33:1.10.146
Pali: iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ, ādesanāpāṭihāriyaṁ, anusāsanīpāṭihāriyaṁ. 

dn33:1.10.147
Pali: Ime kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena tayo dhammā sammadakkhātā. 

dn33:1.10.148
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.0
Pali: 4. Catukka 

dn33:1.11.1
Pali: Atthi kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena cattāro dhammā sammadakkhātā. 

dn33:1.11.2
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ, na vivaditabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.3
Pali: Katame cattāro? 

dn33:1.11.4
Pali: Cattāro satipaṭṭhānā. 

dn33:1.11.5
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu kāye kāyānupassī viharati ātāpī sampajāno satimā, vineyya loke abhijjhādomanassaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.6
Pali: Vedanāsu vedanānupassī …pe… 

dn33:1.11.7
Pali: citte cittānupassī …pe… 

dn33:1.11.8
Pali: dhammesu dhammānupassī viharati ātāpī sampajāno satimā vineyya loke abhijjhādomanassaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.9
Pali: Cattāro sammappadhānā. 

dn33:1.11.10
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu anuppannānaṁ pāpakānaṁ akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ anuppādāya chandaṁ janeti vāyamati vīriyaṁ ārabhati cittaṁ paggaṇhāti padahati. 

dn33:1.11.11
Pali: Uppannānaṁ pāpakānaṁ akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ pahānāya chandaṁ janeti vāyamati vīriyaṁ ārabhati cittaṁ paggaṇhāti padahati. 

dn33:1.11.12
Pali: Anuppannānaṁ kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ uppādāya chandaṁ janeti vāyamati vīriyaṁ ārabhati cittaṁ paggaṇhāti padahati. 

dn33:1.11.13
Pali: Uppannānaṁ kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ ṭhitiyā asammosāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya bhāvanāya pāripūriyā chandaṁ janeti vāyamati vīriyaṁ ārabhati cittaṁ paggaṇhāti padahati. 

dn33:1.11.14
Pali: Cattāro iddhipādā. 

dn33:1.11.15
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu chandasamādhipadhānasaṅkhārasamannāgataṁ iddhipādaṁ bhāveti. 

dn33:1.11.16
Pali: Cittasamādhipadhānasaṅkhārasamannāgataṁ iddhipādaṁ bhāveti. 

dn33:1.11.17
Pali: Vīriyasamādhipadhānasaṅkhārasamannāgataṁ iddhipādaṁ bhāveti. 

dn33:1.11.18
Pali: Vīmaṁsāsamādhipadhānasaṅkhārasamannāgataṁ iddhipādaṁ bhāveti. 

dn33:1.11.19
Pali: Cattāri jhānāni. 

dn33:1.11.20
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu vivicceva kāmehi vivicca akusalehi dhammehi savitakkaṁ savicāraṁ vivekajaṁ pītisukhaṁ paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.21
Pali: Vitakkavicārānaṁ vūpasamā ajjhattaṁ sampasādanaṁ cetaso ekodibhāvaṁ avitakkaṁ avicāraṁ samādhijaṁ pītisukhaṁ dutiyaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.22
Pali: Pītiyā ca virāgā upekkhako ca viharati sato ca sampajāno, sukhañca kāyena paṭisaṁvedeti, yaṁ taṁ ariyā ācikkhanti: ‘upekkhako satimā sukhavihārī’ti tatiyaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.23
Pali: Sukhassa ca pahānā dukkhassa ca pahānā, pubbeva somanassadomanassānaṁ atthaṅgamā, adukkhamasukhaṁ upekkhāsatipārisuddhiṁ catutthaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.24
Pali: Catasso samādhibhāvanā. 

dn33:1.11.25
Pali: Atthāvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā diṭṭhadhammasukhavihārāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.26
Pali: Atthāvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā ñāṇadassanapaṭilābhāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.27
Pali: Atthāvuso samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā satisampajaññāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.28
Pali: Atthāvuso samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā āsavānaṁ khayāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.29
Pali: Katamā cāvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā diṭṭhadhammasukhavihārāya saṁvattati? 

dn33:1.11.30
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu vivicceva kāmehi vivicca akusalehi dhammehi savitakkaṁ … 

dn33:1.11.31
Pali: pe… 

dn33:1.11.32
Pali: catutthaṁ jhānaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.33
Pali: Ayaṁ, āvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā diṭṭhadhammasukhavihārāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.34
Pali: Katamā cāvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā ñāṇadassanapaṭilābhāya saṁvattati? 

dn33:1.11.35
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu ālokasaññaṁ manasi karoti, divāsaññaṁ adhiṭṭhāti yathā divā tathā rattiṁ, yathā rattiṁ tathā divā. 

dn33:1.11.36
Pali: Iti vivaṭena cetasā apariyonaddhena sappabhāsaṁ cittaṁ bhāveti. 

dn33:1.11.37
Pali: Ayaṁ, āvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā ñāṇadassanapaṭilābhāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.38
Pali: Katamā cāvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā satisampajaññāya saṁvattati? 

dn33:1.11.39
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhuno viditā vedanā uppajjanti, viditā upaṭṭhahanti, viditā abbhatthaṁ gacchanti. 

dn33:1.11.40
Pali: Viditā saññā uppajjanti, viditā upaṭṭhahanti, viditā abbhatthaṁ gacchanti. 

dn33:1.11.41
Pali: Viditā vitakkā uppajjanti, viditā upaṭṭhahanti, viditā abbhatthaṁ gacchanti. 

dn33:1.11.42
Pali: Ayaṁ, āvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā satisampajaññāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.43
Pali: Katamā cāvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā āsavānaṁ khayāya saṁvattati? 

dn33:1.11.44
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu pañcasu upādānakkhandhesu udayabbayānupassī viharati. 

dn33:1.11.45
Pali: Iti rūpaṁ, iti rūpassa samudayo, iti rūpassa atthaṅgamo. 

dn33:1.11.46
Pali: Iti vedanā …pe… 

dn33:1.11.47
Pali: iti saññā … 

dn33:1.11.48
Pali: iti saṅkhārā … 

dn33:1.11.49
Pali: iti viññāṇaṁ, iti viññāṇassa samudayo, iti viññāṇassa atthaṅgamo. 

dn33:1.11.50
Pali: Ayaṁ, āvuso, samādhibhāvanā bhāvitā bahulīkatā āsavānaṁ khayāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.51
Pali: Catasso appamaññā. 

dn33:1.11.52
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu mettāsahagatena cetasā ekaṁ disaṁ pharitvā viharati. Tathā dutiyaṁ. Tathā tatiyaṁ. Tathā catutthaṁ. Iti uddhamadho tiriyaṁ sabbadhi sabbattatāya sabbāvantaṁ lokaṁ mettāsahagatena cetasā vipulena mahaggatena appamāṇena averena abyāpajjena pharitvā viharati. 

dn33:1.11.53
Pali: Karuṇāsahagatena cetasā …pe… 

dn33:1.11.54
Pali: muditāsahagatena cetasā …pe… 

dn33:1.11.55
Pali: upekkhāsahagatena cetasā ekaṁ disaṁ pharitvā viharati. Tathā dutiyaṁ. Tathā tatiyaṁ. Tathā catutthaṁ. Iti uddhamadho tiriyaṁ sabbadhi sabbattatāya sabbāvantaṁ lokaṁ upekkhāsahagatena cetasā vipulena mahaggatena appamāṇena averena abyāpajjena pharitvā viharati. 

dn33:1.11.56
Pali: Cattāro āruppā. 

dn33:1.11.57
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu sabbaso rūpasaññānaṁ samatikkamā paṭighasaññānaṁ atthaṅgamā nānattasaññānaṁ amanasikārā ‘ananto ākāso’ti ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.58
Pali: Sabbaso ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma ‘anantaṁ viññāṇan’ti viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.59
Pali: Sabbaso viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma ‘natthi kiñcī’ti ākiñcaññāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.60
Pali: Sabbaso ākiñcaññāyatanaṁ samatikkamma nevasaññānāsaññāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati. 

dn33:1.11.61
Pali: Cattāri apassenāni. 

dn33:1.11.62
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu saṅkhāyekaṁ paṭisevati, saṅkhāyekaṁ adhivāseti, saṅkhāyekaṁ parivajjeti, saṅkhāyekaṁ vinodeti. 

dn33:1.11.63
Pali: Cattāro ariyavaṁsā. 

dn33:1.11.64
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu santuṭṭho hoti itarītarena cīvarena, itarītaracīvarasantuṭṭhiyā ca vaṇṇavādī, na ca cīvarahetu anesanaṁ appatirūpaṁ āpajjati; aladdhā ca cīvaraṁ na paritassati, laddhā ca cīvaraṁ agadhito amucchito anajjhāpanno ādīnavadassāvī nissaraṇapañño paribhuñjati; tāya ca pana itarītaracīvarasantuṭṭhiyā nevattānukkaṁseti na paraṁ vambheti. 

dn33:1.11.65
Pali: Yo hi tattha dakkho analaso sampajāno paṭissato, ayaṁ vuccatāvuso: ‘bhikkhu porāṇe aggaññe ariyavaṁse ṭhito’. 

dn33:1.11.66
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu santuṭṭho hoti itarītarena piṇḍapātena, itarītarapiṇḍapātasantuṭṭhiyā ca vaṇṇavādī, na ca piṇḍapātahetu anesanaṁ appatirūpaṁ āpajjati; aladdhā ca piṇḍapātaṁ na paritassati, laddhā ca piṇḍapātaṁ agadhito amucchito anajjhāpanno ādīnavadassāvī nissaraṇapañño paribhuñjati; tāya ca pana itarītarapiṇḍapātasantuṭṭhiyā nevattānukkaṁseti na paraṁ vambheti. 

dn33:1.11.67
Pali: Yo hi tattha dakkho analaso sampajāno paṭissato, ayaṁ vuccatāvuso: ‘bhikkhu porāṇe aggaññe ariyavaṁse ṭhito’. 

dn33:1.11.68
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu santuṭṭho hoti itarītarena senāsanena, itarītarasenāsanasantuṭṭhiyā ca vaṇṇavādī, na ca senāsanahetu anesanaṁ appatirūpaṁ āpajjati; aladdhā ca senāsanaṁ na paritassati, laddhā ca senāsanaṁ agadhito amucchito anajjhāpanno ādīnavadassāvī nissaraṇapañño paribhuñjati; tāya ca pana itarītarasenāsanasantuṭṭhiyā nevattānukkaṁseti na paraṁ vambheti. 

dn33:1.11.69
Pali: Yo hi tattha dakkho analaso sampajāno paṭissato, ayaṁ vuccatāvuso: ‘bhikkhu porāṇe aggaññe ariyavaṁse ṭhito’. 

dn33:1.11.70
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu pahānārāmo hoti pahānarato, bhāvanārāmo hoti bhāvanārato; tāya ca pana pahānārāmatāya pahānaratiyā bhāvanārāmatāya bhāvanāratiyā nevattānukkaṁseti na paraṁ vambheti. 

dn33:1.11.71
Pali: Yo hi tattha dakkho analaso sampajāno paṭissato ayaṁ vuccatāvuso: ‘bhikkhu porāṇe aggaññe ariyavaṁse ṭhito’. 

dn33:1.11.72
Pali: Cattāri padhānāni. 

dn33:1.11.73
Pali: Saṁvarapadhānaṁ pahānapadhānaṁ bhāvanāpadhānaṁ anurakkhaṇāpadhānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.74
Pali: Katamañcāvuso, saṁvarapadhānaṁ? 

dn33:1.11.75
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu cakkhunā rūpaṁ disvā na nimittaggāhī hoti nānubyañjanaggāhī. 

dn33:1.11.76
Pali: Yatvādhikaraṇamenaṁ cakkhundriyaṁ asaṁvutaṁ viharantaṁ abhijjhādomanassā pāpakā akusalā dhammā anvāssaveyyuṁ, tassa saṁvarāya paṭipajjati, rakkhati cakkhundriyaṁ, cakkhundriye saṁvaraṁ āpajjati. 

dn33:1.11.77
Pali: Sotena saddaṁ sutvā … 

dn33:1.11.78
Pali: ghānena gandhaṁ ghāyitvā … 

dn33:1.11.79
Pali: jivhāya rasaṁ sāyitvā … 

dn33:1.11.80
Pali: kāyena phoṭṭhabbaṁ phusitvā … 

dn33:1.11.81
Pali: manasā dhammaṁ viññāya na nimittaggāhī hoti nānubyañjanaggāhī. 

dn33:1.11.82
Pali: Yatvādhikaraṇamenaṁ manindriyaṁ asaṁvutaṁ viharantaṁ abhijjhādomanassā pāpakā akusalā dhammā anvāssaveyyuṁ, tassa saṁvarāya paṭipajjati, rakkhati manindriyaṁ, manindriye saṁvaraṁ āpajjati. 

dn33:1.11.83
Pali: Idaṁ vuccatāvuso, saṁvarapadhānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.84
Pali: Katamañcāvuso, pahānapadhānaṁ? 

dn33:1.11.85
Pali: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu uppannaṁ kāmavitakkaṁ nādhivāseti pajahati vinodeti byantiṁ karoti anabhāvaṁ gameti; 

dn33:1.11.86
Pali: uppannaṁ byāpādavitakkaṁ …pe… 

dn33:1.11.87
Pali: uppannaṁ vihiṁsāvitakkaṁ …pe… 

dn33:1.11.88
Pali: uppannuppanne pāpake akusale dhamme nādhivāseti pajahati vinodeti byantiṁ karoti anabhāvaṁ gameti. 

dn33:1.11.89
Pali: Idaṁ vuccatāvuso, pahānapadhānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.90
Pali: Katamañcāvuso, bhāvanāpadhānaṁ? 

dn33:1.11.91
Pali: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu satisambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāveti vivekanissitaṁ virāganissitaṁ nirodhanissitaṁ vossaggapariṇāmiṁ, 

dn33:1.11.92
Pali: dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāveti … 

dn33:1.11.93
Pali: vīriyasambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāveti … 

dn33:1.11.94
Pali: pītisambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāveti … 

dn33:1.11.95
Pali: passaddhisambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāveti … 

dn33:1.11.96
Pali: samādhisambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāveti … 

dn33:1.11.97
Pali: upekkhāsambojjhaṅgaṁ bhāveti vivekanissitaṁ virāganissitaṁ nirodhanissitaṁ vossaggapariṇāmiṁ. 

dn33:1.11.98
Pali: Idaṁ vuccatāvuso, bhāvanāpadhānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.99
Pali: Katamañcāvuso, anurakkhaṇāpadhānaṁ? 

dn33:1.11.100
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu uppannaṁ bhadrakaṁ samādhinimittaṁ anurakkhati—aṭṭhikasaññaṁ, puḷuvakasaññaṁ, vinīlakasaññaṁ, vicchiddakasaññaṁ, uddhumātakasaññaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.101
Pali: Idaṁ vuccatāvuso, anurakkhaṇāpadhānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.102
Pali: Cattāri ñāṇāni—

dn33:1.11.103
Pali: dhamme ñāṇaṁ, anvaye ñāṇaṁ, pariye ñāṇaṁ, sammutiyā ñāṇaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.104
Pali: Aparānipi cattāri ñāṇāni—

dn33:1.11.105
Pali: dukkhe ñāṇaṁ, dukkhasamudaye ñāṇaṁ, dukkhanirodhe ñāṇaṁ, dukkhanirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya ñāṇaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.106
Pali: Cattāri sotāpattiyaṅgāni—

dn33:1.11.107
Pali: sappurisasaṁsevo, saddhammassavanaṁ, yonisomanasikāro, dhammānudhammappaṭipatti. 

dn33:1.11.108
Pali: Cattāri sotāpannassa aṅgāni. 

dn33:1.11.109
Pali: Idhāvuso, ariyasāvako buddhe aveccappasādena samannāgato hoti: 

dn33:1.11.110
Pali: ‘itipi so bhagavā arahaṁ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato lokavidū anuttaro purisadammasārathi satthā devamanussānaṁ buddho, bhagavā’ti. 

dn33:1.11.111
Pali: Dhamme aveccappasādena samannāgato hoti: 

dn33:1.11.112
Pali: ‘svākkhāto bhagavatā dhammo sandiṭṭhiko akāliko ehipassiko opaneyyiko paccattaṁ veditabbo viññūhī’ti. 

dn33:1.11.113
Pali: Saṅghe aveccappasādena samannāgato hoti: 

dn33:1.11.114
Pali: ‘suppaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho ujuppaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho ñāyappaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho sāmīcippaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho yadidaṁ cattāri purisayugāni aṭṭha purisapuggalā, esa bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho āhuneyyo pāhuneyyo dakkhiṇeyyo añjalikaraṇīyo anuttaraṁ puññakkhettaṁ lokassā’ti. 

dn33:1.11.115
Pali: Ariyakantehi sīlehi samannāgato hoti akhaṇḍehi acchiddehi asabalehi akammāsehi bhujissehi viññuppasatthehi aparāmaṭṭhehi samādhisaṁvattanikehi. 

dn33:1.11.116
Pali: Cattāri sāmaññaphalāni—

dn33:1.11.117
Pali: sotāpattiphalaṁ, sakadāgāmiphalaṁ, anāgāmiphalaṁ, arahattaphalaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.118
Pali: Catasso dhātuyo—

dn33:1.11.119
Pali: pathavīdhātu, āpodhātu, tejodhātu, vāyodhātu. 

dn33:1.11.120
Pali: Cattāro āhārā—

dn33:1.11.121
Pali: kabaḷīkāro āhāro oḷāriko vā sukhumo vā, phasso dutiyo, manosañcetanā tatiyā, viññāṇaṁ catutthaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.122
Pali: Catasso viññāṇaṭṭhitiyo. 

dn33:1.11.123
Pali: Rūpūpāyaṁ vā, āvuso, viññāṇaṁ tiṭṭhamānaṁ tiṭṭhati rūpārammaṇaṁ rūpappatiṭṭhaṁ nandūpasecanaṁ vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjati; 

dn33:1.11.124
Pali: vedanūpāyaṁ vā āvuso … 

dn33:1.11.125
Pali: saññūpāyaṁ vā, āvuso …pe… 

dn33:1.11.126
Pali: saṅkhārūpāyaṁ vā, āvuso, viññāṇaṁ tiṭṭhamānaṁ tiṭṭhati saṅkhārārammaṇaṁ saṅkhārappatiṭṭhaṁ nandūpasecanaṁ vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjati. 

dn33:1.11.127
Pali: Cattāri agatigamanāni—

dn33:1.11.128
Pali: chandāgatiṁ gacchati, dosāgatiṁ gacchati, mohāgatiṁ gacchati, bhayāgatiṁ gacchati. 

dn33:1.11.129
Pali: Cattāro taṇhuppādā—

dn33:1.11.130
Pali: cīvarahetu vā, āvuso, bhikkhuno taṇhā uppajjamānā uppajjati; 

dn33:1.11.131
Pali: piṇḍapātahetu vā, āvuso, bhikkhuno taṇhā uppajjamānā uppajjati; 

dn33:1.11.132
Pali: senāsanahetu vā, āvuso, bhikkhuno taṇhā uppajjamānā uppajjati; 

dn33:1.11.133
Pali: itibhavābhavahetu vā, āvuso, bhikkhuno taṇhā uppajjamānā uppajjati. 

dn33:1.11.134
Pali: Catasso paṭipadā—

dn33:1.11.135
Pali: dukkhā paṭipadā dandhābhiññā, dukkhā paṭipadā khippābhiññā, sukhā paṭipadā dandhābhiññā, sukhā paṭipadā khippābhiññā. 

dn33:1.11.136
Pali: Aparāpi catasso paṭipadā—

dn33:1.11.137
Pali: akkhamā paṭipadā, khamā paṭipadā, damā paṭipadā, samā paṭipadā. 

dn33:1.11.138
Pali: Cattāri dhammapadāni—

dn33:1.11.139
Pali: anabhijjhā dhammapadaṁ, abyāpādo dhammapadaṁ, sammāsati dhammapadaṁ, sammāsamādhi dhammapadaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.140
Pali: Cattāri dhammasamādānāni—

dn33:1.11.141
Pali: atthāvuso, dhammasamādānaṁ paccuppannadukkhañceva āyatiñca dukkhavipākaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.142
Pali: Atthāvuso, dhammasamādānaṁ paccuppannadukkhaṁ āyatiṁ sukhavipākaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.143
Pali: Atthāvuso, dhammasamādānaṁ paccuppannasukhaṁ āyatiṁ dukkhavipākaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.144
Pali: Atthāvuso, dhammasamādānaṁ paccuppannasukhañceva āyatiñca sukhavipākaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.145
Pali: Cattāro dhammakkhandhā—

dn33:1.11.146
Pali: sīlakkhandho, samādhikkhandho, paññākkhandho, vimuttikkhandho. 

dn33:1.11.147
Pali: Cattāri balāni—

dn33:1.11.148
Pali: vīriyabalaṁ, satibalaṁ, samādhibalaṁ, paññābalaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.149
Pali: Cattāri adhiṭṭhānāni—

dn33:1.11.150
Pali: paññādhiṭṭhānaṁ, saccādhiṭṭhānaṁ, cāgādhiṭṭhānaṁ, upasamādhiṭṭhānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.151
Pali: Cattāri pañhabyākaraṇāni—

dn33:1.11.152
Pali: ekaṁsabyākaraṇīyo pañho, paṭipucchābyākaraṇīyo pañho, vibhajjabyākaraṇīyo pañho, ṭhapanīyo pañho. 

dn33:1.11.153
Pali: Cattāri kammāni—

dn33:1.11.154
Pali: atthāvuso, kammaṁ kaṇhaṁ kaṇhavipākaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.155
Pali: Atthāvuso, kammaṁ sukkaṁ sukkavipākaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.156
Pali: Atthāvuso, kammaṁ kaṇhasukkaṁ kaṇhasukkavipākaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.157
Pali: Atthāvuso, kammaṁ akaṇhaasukkaṁ akaṇhaasukkavipākaṁ kammakkhayāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:1.11.158
Pali: Cattāro sacchikaraṇīyā dhammā—

dn33:1.11.159
Pali: pubbenivāso satiyā sacchikaraṇīyo; 

dn33:1.11.160
Pali: sattānaṁ cutūpapāto cakkhunā sacchikaraṇīyo; 

dn33:1.11.161
Pali: aṭṭha vimokkhā kāyena sacchikaraṇīyā; 

dn33:1.11.162
Pali: āsavānaṁ khayo paññāya sacchikaraṇīyo. 

dn33:1.11.163
Pali: Cattāro oghā—

dn33:1.11.164
Pali: kāmogho, bhavogho, diṭṭhogho, avijjogho. 

dn33:1.11.165
Pali: Cattāro yogā—

dn33:1.11.166
Pali: kāmayogo, bhavayogo, diṭṭhiyogo, avijjāyogo. 

dn33:1.11.167
Pali: Cattāro visaññogā—

dn33:1.11.168
Pali: kāmayogavisaññogo, bhavayogavisaññogo, diṭṭhiyogavisaññogo, avijjāyogavisaññogo. 

dn33:1.11.169
Pali: Cattāro ganthā—

dn33:1.11.170
Pali: abhijjhā kāyagantho, byāpādo kāyagantho, sīlabbataparāmāso kāyagantho, idaṁsaccābhiniveso kāyagantho. 

dn33:1.11.171
Pali: Cattāri upādānāni—

dn33:1.11.172
Pali: kāmupādānaṁ, diṭṭhupādānaṁ, sīlabbatupādānaṁ, attavādupādānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.173
Pali: Catasso yoniyo—

dn33:1.11.174
Pali: aṇḍajayoni, jalābujayoni, saṁsedajayoni, opapātikayoni. 

dn33:1.11.175
Pali: Catasso gabbhāvakkantiyo. 

dn33:1.11.176
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco asampajāno mātukucchiṁ okkamati, asampajāno mātukucchismiṁ ṭhāti, asampajāno mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, ayaṁ paṭhamā gabbhāvakkanti. 

dn33:1.11.177
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, idhekacco sampajāno mātukucchiṁ okkamati, asampajāno mātukucchismiṁ ṭhāti, asampajāno mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, ayaṁ dutiyā gabbhāvakkanti. 

dn33:1.11.178
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, idhekacco sampajāno mātukucchiṁ okkamati, sampajāno mātukucchismiṁ ṭhāti, asampajāno mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, ayaṁ tatiyā gabbhāvakkanti. 

dn33:1.11.179
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, idhekacco sampajāno mātukucchiṁ okkamati, sampajāno mātukucchismiṁ ṭhāti, sampajāno mātukucchimhā nikkhamati, ayaṁ catutthā gabbhāvakkanti. 

dn33:1.11.180
Pali: Cattāro attabhāvapaṭilābhā. 

dn33:1.11.181
Pali: Atthāvuso, attabhāvapaṭilābho, yasmiṁ attabhāvapaṭilābhe attasañcetanāyeva kamati, no parasañcetanā. 

dn33:1.11.182
Pali: Atthāvuso, attabhāvapaṭilābho, yasmiṁ attabhāvapaṭilābhe parasañcetanāyeva kamati, no attasañcetanā. 

dn33:1.11.183
Pali: Atthāvuso, attabhāvapaṭilābho, yasmiṁ attabhāvapaṭilābhe attasañcetanā ceva kamati parasañcetanā ca. 

dn33:1.11.184
Pali: Atthāvuso, attabhāvapaṭilābho, yasmiṁ attabhāvapaṭilābhe neva attasañcetanā kamati, no parasañcetanā. 

dn33:1.11.185
Pali: Catasso dakkhiṇāvisuddhiyo. 

dn33:1.11.186
Pali: Atthāvuso, dakkhiṇā dāyakato visujjhati no paṭiggāhakato. 

dn33:1.11.187
Pali: Atthāvuso, dakkhiṇā paṭiggāhakato visujjhati no dāyakato. 

dn33:1.11.188
Pali: Atthāvuso, dakkhiṇā neva dāyakato visujjhati no paṭiggāhakato. 

dn33:1.11.189
Pali: Atthāvuso, dakkhiṇā dāyakato ceva visujjhati paṭiggāhakato ca. 

dn33:1.11.190
Pali: Cattāri saṅgahavatthūni—

dn33:1.11.191
Pali: dānaṁ, peyyavajjaṁ, atthacariyā, samānattatā. 

dn33:1.11.192
Pali: Cattāro anariyavohārā—

dn33:1.11.193
Pali: musāvādo, pisuṇāvācā, pharusāvācā, samphappalāpo. 

dn33:1.11.194
Pali: Cattāro ariyavohārā—

dn33:1.11.195
Pali: musāvādā veramaṇī, pisuṇāya vācāya veramaṇī, pharusāya vācāya veramaṇī, samphappalāpā veramaṇī. 

dn33:1.11.196
Pali: Aparepi cattāro anariyavohārā—

dn33:1.11.197
Pali: adiṭṭhe diṭṭhavāditā, assute sutavāditā, amute mutavāditā, aviññāte viññātavāditā. 

dn33:1.11.198
Pali: Aparepi cattāro ariyavohārā—

dn33:1.11.199
Pali: adiṭṭhe adiṭṭhavāditā, assute assutavāditā, amute amutavāditā, aviññāte aviññātavāditā. 

dn33:1.11.200
Pali: Aparepi cattāro anariyavohārā—

dn33:1.11.201
Pali: diṭṭhe adiṭṭhavāditā, sute assutavāditā, mute amutavāditā, viññāte aviññātavāditā. 

dn33:1.11.202
Pali: Aparepi cattāro ariyavohārā—

dn33:1.11.203
Pali: diṭṭhe diṭṭhavāditā, sute sutavāditā, mute mutavāditā, viññāte viññātavāditā. 

dn33:1.11.204
Pali: Cattāro puggalā. 

dn33:1.11.205
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco puggalo attantapo hoti attaparitāpanānuyogamanuyutto. 

dn33:1.11.206
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco puggalo parantapo hoti paraparitāpanānuyogamanuyutto. 

dn33:1.11.207
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco puggalo attantapo ca hoti attaparitāpanānuyogamanuyutto, parantapo ca paraparitāpanānuyogamanuyutto. 

dn33:1.11.208
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco puggalo neva attantapo hoti na attaparitāpanānuyogamanuyutto na parantapo na paraparitāpanānuyogamanuyutto. 

dn33:1.11.209
Pali: So anattantapo aparantapo diṭṭheva dhamme nicchāto nibbuto sītībhūto sukhappaṭisaṁvedī brahmabhūtena attanā viharati. 

dn33:1.11.210
Pali: Aparepi cattāro puggalā. 

dn33:1.11.211
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco puggalo attahitāya paṭipanno hoti no parahitāya. 

dn33:1.11.212
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco puggalo parahitāya paṭipanno hoti no attahitāya. 

dn33:1.11.213
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco puggalo neva attahitāya paṭipanno hoti no parahitāya. 

dn33:1.11.214
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco puggalo attahitāya ceva paṭipanno hoti parahitāya ca. 

dn33:1.11.215
Pali: Aparepi cattāro puggalā—

dn33:1.11.216
Pali: tamo tamaparāyano, tamo jotiparāyano, joti tamaparāyano, joti jotiparāyano. 

dn33:1.11.217
Pali: Aparepi cattāro puggalā—

dn33:1.11.218
Pali: samaṇamacalo, samaṇapadumo, samaṇapuṇḍarīko, samaṇesu samaṇasukhumālo. 

dn33:1.11.219
Pali: Ime kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena cattāro dhammā sammadakkhātā; 

dn33:1.11.220
Pali: tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:1.11.221
Pali: Paṭhamabhāṇavāro niṭṭhito. 

dn33:2.1.0
Pali: 5. Pañcaka 

dn33:2.1.1
Pali: Atthi kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena pañca dhammā sammadakkhātā. 

dn33:2.1.2
Pali: Tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.3
Pali: Katame pañca? 

dn33:2.1.4
Pali: Pañcakkhandhā. 

dn33:2.1.5
Pali: Rūpakkhandho vedanākkhandho saññākkhandho saṅkhārakkhandho viññāṇakkhandho. 

dn33:2.1.6
Pali: Pañcupādānakkhandhā. 

dn33:2.1.7
Pali: Rūpupādānakkhandho vedanupādānakkhandho saññupādānakkhandho saṅkhārupādānakkhandho viññāṇupādānakkhandho. 

dn33:2.1.8
Pali: Pañca kāmaguṇā. 

dn33:2.1.9
Pali: Cakkhuviññeyyā rūpā iṭṭhā kantā manāpā piyarūpā kāmūpasañhitā rajanīyā, 

dn33:2.1.10
Pali: sotaviññeyyā saddā … 

dn33:2.1.11
Pali: ghānaviññeyyā gandhā … 

dn33:2.1.12
Pali: jivhāviññeyyā rasā … 

dn33:2.1.13
Pali: kāyaviññeyyā phoṭṭhabbā iṭṭhā kantā manāpā piyarūpā kāmūpasañhitā rajanīyā. 

dn33:2.1.14
Pali: Pañca gatiyo—

dn33:2.1.15
Pali: nirayo, tiracchānayoni, pettivisayo, manussā, devā. 

dn33:2.1.16
Pali: Pañca macchariyāni—

dn33:2.1.17
Pali: āvāsamacchariyaṁ, kulamacchariyaṁ, lābhamacchariyaṁ, vaṇṇamacchariyaṁ, dhammamacchariyaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.18
Pali: Pañca nīvaraṇāni—

dn33:2.1.19
Pali: kāmacchandanīvaraṇaṁ, byāpādanīvaraṇaṁ, thinamiddhanīvaraṇaṁ, uddhaccakukkuccanīvaraṇaṁ, vicikicchānīvaraṇaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.20
Pali: Pañca orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni—

dn33:2.1.21
Pali: sakkāyadiṭṭhi, vicikicchā, sīlabbataparāmāso, kāmacchando, byāpādo. 

dn33:2.1.22
Pali: Pañca uddhambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni—

dn33:2.1.23
Pali: rūparāgo, arūparāgo, māno, uddhaccaṁ, avijjā. 

dn33:2.1.24
Pali: Pañca sikkhāpadāni—

dn33:2.1.25
Pali: pāṇātipātā veramaṇī, adinnādānā veramaṇī, kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇī, musāvādā veramaṇī, surāmerayamajjappamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇī. 

dn33:2.1.26
Pali: Pañca abhabbaṭṭhānāni. 

dn33:2.1.27
Pali: Abhabbo, āvuso, khīṇāsavo bhikkhu sañcicca pāṇaṁ jīvitā voropetuṁ. Abhabbo khīṇāsavo bhikkhu adinnaṁ theyyasaṅkhātaṁ ādiyituṁ. Abhabbo khīṇāsavo bhikkhu methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevituṁ. Abhabbo khīṇāsavo bhikkhu sampajānamusā bhāsituṁ. Abhabbo khīṇāsavo bhikkhu sannidhikārakaṁ kāme paribhuñjituṁ, seyyathāpi pubbe āgārikabhūto. 

dn33:2.1.28
Pali: Pañca byasanāni—

dn33:2.1.29
Pali: ñātibyasanaṁ, bhogabyasanaṁ, rogabyasanaṁ, sīlabyasanaṁ, diṭṭhibyasanaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.30
Pali: Nāvuso, sattā ñātibyasanahetu vā bhogabyasanahetu vā rogabyasanahetu vā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjanti. 

dn33:2.1.31
Pali: Sīlabyasanahetu vā, āvuso, sattā diṭṭhibyasanahetu vā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjanti. 

dn33:2.1.32
Pali: Pañca sampadā—

dn33:2.1.33
Pali: ñātisampadā, bhogasampadā, ārogyasampadā, sīlasampadā, diṭṭhisampadā. 

dn33:2.1.34
Pali: Nāvuso, sattā ñātisampadāhetu vā bhogasampadāhetu vā ārogyasampadāhetu vā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjanti. 

dn33:2.1.35
Pali: Sīlasampadāhetu vā, āvuso, sattā diṭṭhisampadāhetu vā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjanti. 

dn33:2.1.36
Pali: Pañca ādīnavā dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn33:2.1.37
Pali: Idhāvuso, dussīlo sīlavipanno pamādādhikaraṇaṁ mahatiṁ bhogajāniṁ nigacchati, 

dn33:2.1.38
Pali: ayaṁ paṭhamo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn33:2.1.39
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, dussīlassa sīlavipannassa pāpako kittisaddo abbhuggacchati, 

dn33:2.1.40
Pali: ayaṁ dutiyo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn33:2.1.41
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, dussīlo sīlavipanno yaññadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkamati yadi khattiyaparisaṁ yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ yadi gahapatiparisaṁ yadi samaṇaparisaṁ, avisārado upasaṅkamati maṅkubhūto, 

dn33:2.1.42
Pali: ayaṁ tatiyo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn33:2.1.43
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, dussīlo sīlavipanno sammūḷho kālaṁ karoti, 

dn33:2.1.44
Pali: ayaṁ catuttho ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn33:2.1.45
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, dussīlo sīlavipanno kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjati, 

dn33:2.1.46
Pali: ayaṁ pañcamo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā. 

dn33:2.1.47
Pali: Pañca ānisaṁsā sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn33:2.1.48
Pali: Idhāvuso, sīlavā sīlasampanno appamādādhikaraṇaṁ mahantaṁ bhogakkhandhaṁ adhigacchati, 

dn33:2.1.49
Pali: ayaṁ paṭhamo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn33:2.1.50
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, sīlavato sīlasampannassa kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggacchati, 

dn33:2.1.51
Pali: ayaṁ dutiyo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn33:2.1.52
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, sīlavā sīlasampanno yaññadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkamati yadi khattiyaparisaṁ yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ yadi gahapatiparisaṁ yadi samaṇaparisaṁ, visārado upasaṅkamati amaṅkubhūto, 

dn33:2.1.53
Pali: ayaṁ tatiyo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn33:2.1.54
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, sīlavā sīlasampanno asammūḷho kālaṁ karoti, 

dn33:2.1.55
Pali: ayaṁ catuttho ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn33:2.1.56
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, sīlavā sīlasampanno kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjati, 

dn33:2.1.57
Pali: ayaṁ pañcamo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya. 

dn33:2.1.58
Pali: Codakena, āvuso, bhikkhunā paraṁ codetukāmena pañca dhamme ajjhattaṁ upaṭṭhapetvā paro codetabbo. 

dn33:2.1.59
Pali: Kālena vakkhāmi no akālena, 

dn33:2.1.60
Pali: bhūtena vakkhāmi no abhūtena, 

dn33:2.1.61
Pali: saṇhena vakkhāmi no pharusena, 

dn33:2.1.62
Pali: atthasaṁhitena vakkhāmi no anatthasaṁhitena, 

dn33:2.1.63
Pali: mettacittena vakkhāmi no dosantarenāti. 

dn33:2.1.64
Pali: Codakena, āvuso, bhikkhunā paraṁ codetukāmena ime pañca dhamme ajjhattaṁ upaṭṭhapetvā paro codetabbo. 

dn33:2.1.65
Pali: Pañca padhāniyaṅgāni. 

dn33:2.1.66
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu saddho hoti, saddahati tathāgatassa bodhiṁ: 

dn33:2.1.67
Pali: ‘itipi so bhagavā arahaṁ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato, lokavidū anuttaro purisadammasārathi satthā devamanussānaṁ buddho bhagavā’ti. 

dn33:2.1.68
Pali: Appābādho hoti appātaṅko, samavepākiniyā gahaṇiyā samannāgato nātisītāya nāccuṇhāya majjhimāya padhānakkhamāya. 

dn33:2.1.69
Pali: Asaṭho hoti amāyāvī, yathābhūtaṁ attānaṁ āvikattā satthari vā viññūsu vā sabrahmacārīsu. 

dn33:2.1.70
Pali: Āraddhavīriyo viharati akusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ pahānāya kusalānaṁ dhammānaṁ upasampadāya thāmavā daḷhaparakkamo anikkhittadhuro kusalesu dhammesu. 

dn33:2.1.71
Pali: Paññavā hoti udayatthagāminiyā paññāya samannāgato ariyāya nibbedhikāya sammādukkhakkhayagāminiyā. 

dn33:2.1.72
Pali: Pañca suddhāvāsā—

dn33:2.1.73
Pali: avihā, atappā, sudassā, sudassī, akaniṭṭhā. 

dn33:2.1.74
Pali: Pañca anāgāmino—

dn33:2.1.75
Pali: antarāparinibbāyī, upahaccaparinibbāyī, asaṅkhāraparinibbāyī, sasaṅkhāraparinibbāyī, uddhaṁsotoakaniṭṭhagāmī. 

dn33:2.1.76
Pali: Pañca cetokhilā. 

dn33:2.1.77
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu satthari kaṅkhati vicikicchati nādhimuccati na sampasīdati. 

dn33:2.1.78
Pali: Yo so, āvuso, bhikkhu satthari kaṅkhati vicikicchati nādhimuccati na sampasīdati, tassa cittaṁ na namati ātappāya anuyogāya sātaccāya padhānāya, yassa cittaṁ na namati ātappāya anuyogāya sātaccāya padhānāya, ayaṁ paṭhamo cetokhilo. 

dn33:2.1.79
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu dhamme kaṅkhati vicikicchati …pe… 

dn33:2.1.80
Pali: saṅghe kaṅkhati vicikicchati … 

dn33:2.1.81
Pali: sikkhāya kaṅkhati vicikicchati … 

dn33:2.1.82
Pali: sabrahmacārīsu kupito hoti anattamano āhatacitto khilajāto. 

dn33:2.1.83
Pali: Yo so, āvuso, bhikkhu sabrahmacārīsu kupito hoti anattamano āhatacitto khilajāto, tassa cittaṁ na namati ātappāya anuyogāya sātaccāya padhānāya, yassa cittaṁ na namati ātappāya anuyogāya sātaccāya padhānāya, ayaṁ pañcamo cetokhilo. 

dn33:2.1.84
Pali: Pañca cetasovinibandhā. 

dn33:2.1.85
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu kāmesu avītarāgo hoti avigatacchando avigatapemo avigatapipāso avigatapariḷāho avigatataṇho. 

dn33:2.1.86
Pali: Yo so, āvuso, bhikkhu kāmesu avītarāgo hoti avigatacchando avigatapemo avigatapipāso avigatapariḷāho avigatataṇho, tassa cittaṁ na namati ātappāya anuyogāya sātaccāya padhānāya. 

dn33:2.1.87
Pali: Yassa cittaṁ na namati ātappāya anuyogāya sātaccāya padhānāya. 

dn33:2.1.88
Pali: Ayaṁ paṭhamo cetaso vinibandho. 

dn33:2.1.89
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu kāye avītarāgo hoti …pe… 

dn33:2.1.90
Pali: rūpe avītarāgo hoti …pe… 

dn33:2.1.91
Pali: puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu yāvadatthaṁ udarāvadehakaṁ bhuñjitvā seyyasukhaṁ passasukhaṁ middhasukhaṁ anuyutto viharati …pe… 

dn33:2.1.92
Pali: puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu aññataraṁ devanikāyaṁ paṇidhāya brahmacariyaṁ carati: ‘imināhaṁ sīlena vā vatena vā tapena vā brahmacariyena vā devo vā bhavissāmi devaññataro vā’ti. 

dn33:2.1.93
Pali: Yo so, āvuso, bhikkhu aññataraṁ devanikāyaṁ paṇidhāya brahmacariyaṁ carati: ‘imināhaṁ sīlena vā vatena vā tapena vā brahmacariyena vā devo vā bhavissāmi devaññataro vā’ti, tassa cittaṁ na namati ātappāya anuyogāya sātaccāya padhānāya. Yassa cittaṁ na namati ātappāya anuyogāya sātaccāya padhānāya. 

dn33:2.1.94
Pali: Ayaṁ pañcamo cetaso vinibandho. 

dn33:2.1.95
Pali: Pañcindriyāni—

dn33:2.1.96
Pali: cakkhundriyaṁ, sotindriyaṁ, ghānindriyaṁ, jivhindriyaṁ, kāyindriyaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.97
Pali: Aparānipi pañcindriyāni—

dn33:2.1.98
Pali: sukhindriyaṁ, dukkhindriyaṁ, somanassindriyaṁ, domanassindriyaṁ, upekkhindriyaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.99
Pali: Aparānipi pañcindriyāni—

dn33:2.1.100
Pali: saddhindriyaṁ, vīriyindriyaṁ, satindriyaṁ, samādhindriyaṁ, paññindriyaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.101
Pali: Pañca nissaraṇiyā dhātuyo. 

dn33:2.1.102
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhuno kāme manasikaroto kāmesu cittaṁ na pakkhandati na pasīdati na santiṭṭhati na vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.103
Pali: Nekkhammaṁ kho panassa manasikaroto nekkhamme cittaṁ pakkhandati pasīdati santiṭṭhati vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.104
Pali: Tassa taṁ cittaṁ sugataṁ subhāvitaṁ suvuṭṭhitaṁ suvimuttaṁ visaṁyuttaṁ kāmehi. 

dn33:2.1.105
Pali: Ye ca kāmapaccayā uppajjanti āsavā vighātā pariḷāhā, mutto so tehi, na so taṁ vedanaṁ vedeti. 

dn33:2.1.106
Pali: Idamakkhātaṁ kāmānaṁ nissaraṇaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.107
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno byāpādaṁ manasikaroto byāpāde cittaṁ na pakkhandati na pasīdati na santiṭṭhati na vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.108
Pali: Abyāpādaṁ kho panassa manasikaroto abyāpāde cittaṁ pakkhandati pasīdati santiṭṭhati vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.109
Pali: Tassa taṁ cittaṁ sugataṁ subhāvitaṁ suvuṭṭhitaṁ suvimuttaṁ visaṁyuttaṁ byāpādena. 

dn33:2.1.110
Pali: Ye ca byāpādapaccayā uppajjanti āsavā vighātā pariḷāhā, mutto so tehi, na so taṁ vedanaṁ vedeti. 

dn33:2.1.111
Pali: Idamakkhātaṁ byāpādassa nissaraṇaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.112
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno vihesaṁ manasikaroto vihesāya cittaṁ na pakkhandati na pasīdati na santiṭṭhati na vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.113
Pali: Avihesaṁ kho panassa manasikaroto avihesāya cittaṁ pakkhandati pasīdati santiṭṭhati vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.114
Pali: Tassa taṁ cittaṁ sugataṁ subhāvitaṁ suvuṭṭhitaṁ suvimuttaṁ visaṁyuttaṁ vihesāya. 

dn33:2.1.115
Pali: Ye ca vihesāpaccayā uppajjanti āsavā vighātā pariḷāhā, mutto so tehi, na so taṁ vedanaṁ vedeti. 

dn33:2.1.116
Pali: Idamakkhātaṁ vihesāya nissaraṇaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.117
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno rūpe manasikaroto rūpesu cittaṁ na pakkhandati na pasīdati na santiṭṭhati na vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.118
Pali: Arūpaṁ kho panassa manasikaroto arūpe cittaṁ pakkhandati pasīdati santiṭṭhati vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.119
Pali: Tassa taṁ cittaṁ sugataṁ subhāvitaṁ suvuṭṭhitaṁ suvimuttaṁ visaṁyuttaṁ rūpehi. 

dn33:2.1.120
Pali: Ye ca rūpapaccayā uppajjanti āsavā vighātā pariḷāhā, mutto so tehi, na so taṁ vedanaṁ vedeti. 

dn33:2.1.121
Pali: Idamakkhātaṁ rūpānaṁ nissaraṇaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.122
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno sakkāyaṁ manasikaroto sakkāye cittaṁ na pakkhandati na pasīdati na santiṭṭhati na vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.123
Pali: Sakkāyanirodhaṁ kho panassa manasikaroto sakkāyanirodhe cittaṁ pakkhandati pasīdati santiṭṭhati vimuccati. 

dn33:2.1.124
Pali: Tassa taṁ cittaṁ sugataṁ subhāvitaṁ suvuṭṭhitaṁ suvimuttaṁ visaṁyuttaṁ sakkāyena. 

dn33:2.1.125
Pali: Ye ca sakkāyapaccayā uppajjanti āsavā vighātā pariḷāhā, mutto so tehi, na so taṁ vedanaṁ vedeti. 

dn33:2.1.126
Pali: Idamakkhātaṁ sakkāyassa nissaraṇaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.127
Pali: Pañca vimuttāyatanāni. 

dn33:2.1.128
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhuno satthā dhammaṁ deseti aññataro vā garuṭṭhāniyo sabrahmacārī. 

dn33:2.1.129
Pali: Yathā yathā, āvuso, bhikkhuno satthā dhammaṁ deseti aññataro vā garuṭṭhāniyo sabrahmacārī tathā tathā so tasmiṁ dhamme atthapaṭisaṁvedī ca hoti dhammapaṭisaṁvedī ca. 

dn33:2.1.130
Pali: Tassa atthapaṭisaṁvedino dhammapaṭisaṁvedino pāmojjaṁ jāyati, pamuditassa pīti jāyati, pītimanassa kāyo passambhati, passaddhakāyo sukhaṁ vedeti, sukhino cittaṁ samādhiyati. 

dn33:2.1.131
Pali: Idaṁ paṭhamaṁ vimuttāyatanaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.132
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno na heva kho satthā dhammaṁ deseti aññataro vā garuṭṭhāniyo sabrahmacārī, api ca kho yathāsutaṁ yathāpariyattaṁ dhammaṁ vitthārena paresaṁ deseti …pe… 

dn33:2.1.133
Pali: api ca kho yathāsutaṁ yathāpariyattaṁ dhammaṁ vitthārena sajjhāyaṁ karoti …pe… 

dn33:2.1.134
Pali: api ca kho yathāsutaṁ yathāpariyattaṁ dhammaṁ cetasā anuvitakketi anuvicāreti manasānupekkhati …pe… 

dn33:2.1.135
Pali: api ca khvassa aññataraṁ samādhinimittaṁ suggahitaṁ hoti sumanasikataṁ sūpadhāritaṁ suppaṭividdhaṁ paññāya. 

dn33:2.1.136
Pali: Yathā yathā, āvuso, bhikkhuno aññataraṁ samādhinimittaṁ suggahitaṁ hoti sumanasikataṁ sūpadhāritaṁ suppaṭividdhaṁ paññāya tathā tathā so tasmiṁ dhamme atthapaṭisaṁvedī ca hoti dhammapaṭisaṁvedī ca. 

dn33:2.1.137
Pali: Tassa atthapaṭisaṁvedino dhammapaṭisaṁvedino pāmojjaṁ jāyati, pamuditassa pīti jāyati, pītimanassa kāyo passambhati, passaddhakāyo sukhaṁ vedeti, sukhino cittaṁ samādhiyati. 

dn33:2.1.138
Pali: Idaṁ pañcamaṁ vimuttāyatanaṁ. 

dn33:2.1.139
Pali: Pañca vimuttiparipācanīyā saññā—

dn33:2.1.140
Pali: aniccasaññā, anicce dukkhasaññā, dukkhe anattasaññā, pahānasaññā, virāgasaññā. 

dn33:2.1.141
Pali: Ime kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena pañca dhammā sammadakkhātā; 

dn33:2.1.142
Pali: tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:2.2.0
Pali: 6. Chakka 

dn33:2.2.1
Pali: Atthi kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena cha dhammā sammadakkhātā; 

dn33:2.2.2
Pali: tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:2.2.3
Pali: Katame cha? 

dn33:2.2.4
Pali: Cha ajjhattikāni āyatanāni—

dn33:2.2.5
Pali: cakkhāyatanaṁ, sotāyatanaṁ, ghānāyatanaṁ, jivhāyatanaṁ, kāyāyatanaṁ, manāyatanaṁ. 

dn33:2.2.6
Pali: Cha bāhirāni āyatanāni—

dn33:2.2.7
Pali: rūpāyatanaṁ, saddāyatanaṁ, gandhāyatanaṁ, rasāyatanaṁ, phoṭṭhabbāyatanaṁ, dhammāyatanaṁ. 

dn33:2.2.8
Pali: Cha viññāṇakāyā—

dn33:2.2.9
Pali: cakkhuviññāṇaṁ, sotaviññāṇaṁ, ghānaviññāṇaṁ, jivhāviññāṇaṁ, kāyaviññāṇaṁ, manoviññāṇaṁ. 

dn33:2.2.10
Pali: Cha phassakāyā—

dn33:2.2.11
Pali: cakkhusamphasso, sotasamphasso, ghānasamphasso, jivhāsamphasso, kāyasamphasso, manosamphasso. 

dn33:2.2.12
Pali: Cha vedanākāyā—

dn33:2.2.13
Pali: cakkhusamphassajā vedanā, sotasamphassajā vedanā, ghānasamphassajā vedanā, jivhāsamphassajā vedanā, kāyasamphassajā vedanā, manosamphassajā vedanā. 

dn33:2.2.14
Pali: Cha saññākāyā—

dn33:2.2.15
Pali: rūpasaññā, saddasaññā, gandhasaññā, rasasaññā, phoṭṭhabbasaññā, dhammasaññā. 

dn33:2.2.16
Pali: Cha sañcetanākāyā—

dn33:2.2.17
Pali: rūpasañcetanā, saddasañcetanā, gandhasañcetanā, rasasañcetanā, phoṭṭhabbasañcetanā, dhammasañcetanā. 

dn33:2.2.18
Pali: Cha taṇhākāyā—

dn33:2.2.19
Pali: rūpataṇhā, saddataṇhā, gandhataṇhā, rasataṇhā, phoṭṭhabbataṇhā, dhammataṇhā. 

dn33:2.2.20
Pali: Cha agāravā. 

dn33:2.2.21
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu satthari agāravo viharati appatisso; dhamme agāravo viharati appatisso; saṅghe agāravo viharati appatisso; sikkhāya agāravo viharati appatisso; appamāde agāravo viharati appatisso; paṭisanthāre agāravo viharati appatisso. 

dn33:2.2.22
Pali: Cha gāravā. 

dn33:2.2.23
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu satthari sagāravo viharati sappatisso; dhamme sagāravo viharati sappatisso; saṅghe sagāravo viharati sappatisso; sikkhāya sagāravo viharati sappatisso; appamāde sagāravo viharati sappatisso; paṭisanthāre sagāravo viharati sappatisso. 

dn33:2.2.24
Pali: Cha somanassūpavicārā. 

dn33:2.2.25
Pali: Cakkhunā rūpaṁ disvā somanassaṭṭhāniyaṁ rūpaṁ upavicarati; 

dn33:2.2.26
Pali: sotena saddaṁ sutvā … 

dn33:2.2.27
Pali: ghānena gandhaṁ ghāyitvā … 

dn33:2.2.28
Pali: jivhāya rasaṁ sāyitvā … 

dn33:2.2.29
Pali: kāyena phoṭṭhabbaṁ phusitvā. 

dn33:2.2.30
Pali: Manasā dhammaṁ viññāya somanassaṭṭhāniyaṁ dhammaṁ upavicarati. 

dn33:2.2.31
Pali: Cha domanassūpavicārā. 

dn33:2.2.32
Pali: Cakkhunā rūpaṁ disvā domanassaṭṭhāniyaṁ rūpaṁ upavicarati …pe… 

dn33:2.2.33
Pali: manasā dhammaṁ viññāya domanassaṭṭhāniyaṁ dhammaṁ upavicarati. 

dn33:2.2.34
Pali: Cha upekkhūpavicārā. 

dn33:2.2.35
Pali: Cakkhunā rūpaṁ disvā upekkhāṭṭhāniyaṁ rūpaṁ upavicarati …pe… 

dn33:2.2.36
Pali: manasā dhammaṁ viññāya upekkhāṭṭhāniyaṁ dhammaṁ upavicarati. 

dn33:2.2.37
Pali: Cha sāraṇīyā dhammā. 

dn33:2.2.38
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhuno mettaṁ kāyakammaṁ paccupaṭṭhitaṁ hoti sabrahmacārīsu āvi ceva raho ca. 

dn33:2.2.39
Pali: Ayampi dhammo sāraṇīyo piyakaraṇo garukaraṇo saṅgahāya avivādāya sāmaggiyā ekībhāvāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:2.2.40
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno mettaṁ vacīkammaṁ paccupaṭṭhitaṁ hoti sabrahmacārīsu āvi ceva raho ca. 

dn33:2.2.41
Pali: Ayampi dhammo sāraṇīyo …pe… ekībhāvāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:2.2.42
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno mettaṁ manokammaṁ paccupaṭṭhitaṁ hoti sabrahmacārīsu āvi ceva raho ca. 

dn33:2.2.43
Pali: Ayampi dhammo sāraṇīyo …pe… ekībhāvāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:2.2.44
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu ye te lābhā dhammikā dhammaladdhā antamaso pattapariyāpannamattampi, tathārūpehi lābhehi appaṭivibhattabhogī hoti sīlavantehi sabrahmacārīhi sādhāraṇabhogī. 

dn33:2.2.45
Pali: Ayampi dhammo sāraṇīyo …pe… ekībhāvāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:2.2.46
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu yāni tāni sīlāni akhaṇḍāni acchiddāni asabalāni akammāsāni bhujissāni viññuppasatthāni aparāmaṭṭhāni samādhisaṁvattanikāni, tathārūpesu sīlesu sīlasāmaññagato viharati sabrahmacārīhi āvi ceva raho ca. 

dn33:2.2.47
Pali: Ayampi dhammo sāraṇīyo …pe… ekībhāvāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:2.2.48
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu yāyaṁ diṭṭhi ariyā niyyānikā niyyāti takkarassa sammā dukkhakkhayāya, tathārūpāya diṭṭhiyā diṭṭhisāmaññagato viharati sabrahmacārīhi āvi ceva raho ca. 

dn33:2.2.49
Pali: Ayampi dhammo sāraṇīyo piyakaraṇo garukaraṇo saṅgahāya avivādāya sāmaggiyā ekībhāvāya saṁvattati. 

dn33:2.2.50
Pali: Cha vivādamūlāni. 

dn33:2.2.51
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu kodhano hoti upanāhī. 

dn33:2.2.52
Pali: Yo so, āvuso, bhikkhu kodhano hoti upanāhī, so sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi agāravo viharati appatisso, saṅghepi agāravo viharati appatisso, sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī hoti. 

dn33:2.2.53
Pali: Yo so, āvuso, bhikkhu satthari agāravo viharati appatisso, dhamme agāravo viharati appatisso, saṅghe agāravo viharati appatisso, sikkhāya na paripūrakārī, so saṅghe vivādaṁ janeti. Yo hoti vivādo bahujanāhitāya bahujanāsukhāya anatthāya ahitāya dukkhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:2.2.54
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, āvuso, vivādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā samanupasseyyātha. Tatra tumhe, āvuso, tasseva pāpakassa vivādamūlassa pahānāya vāyameyyātha. 

dn33:2.2.55
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, āvuso, vivādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā na samanupasseyyātha. Tatra tumhe, āvuso, tasseva pāpakassa vivādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavāya paṭipajjeyyātha. 

dn33:2.2.56
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa vivādamūlassa pahānaṁ hoti. Evametassa pāpakassa vivādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavo hoti. 

dn33:2.2.57
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu makkhī hoti paḷāsī …pe… 

dn33:2.2.58
Pali: issukī hoti maccharī …pe… 

dn33:2.2.59
Pali: saṭho hoti māyāvī … 

dn33:2.2.60
Pali: pāpiccho hoti micchādiṭṭhī … 

dn33:2.2.61
Pali: sandiṭṭhiparāmāsī hoti ādhānaggāhī duppaṭinissaggī …pe… 

dn33:2.2.62
Pali: yo so, āvuso, bhikkhu sandiṭṭhiparāmāsī hoti ādhānaggāhī duppaṭinissaggī, so sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi agāravo viharati appatisso, saṅghepi agāravo viharati appatisso, sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī hoti. 

dn33:2.2.63
Pali: Yo so, āvuso, bhikkhu satthari agāravo viharati appatisso, dhamme agāravo viharati appatisso, saṅghe agāravo viharati appatisso, sikkhāya na paripūrakārī, so saṅghe vivādaṁ janeti. Yo hoti vivādo bahujanāhitāya bahujanāsukhāya anatthāya ahitāya dukkhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:2.2.64
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, āvuso, vivādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā samanupasseyyātha. Tatra tumhe, āvuso, tasseva pāpakassa vivādamūlassa pahānāya vāyameyyātha. 

dn33:2.2.65
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, āvuso, vivādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā na samanupasseyyātha. Tatra tumhe, āvuso, tasseva pāpakassa vivādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavāya paṭipajjeyyātha. 

dn33:2.2.66
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa vivādamūlassa pahānaṁ hoti. Evametassa pāpakassa vivādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavo hoti. 

dn33:2.2.67
Pali: Cha dhātuyo—

dn33:2.2.68
Pali: pathavīdhātu, āpodhātu, tejodhātu, vāyodhātu, ākāsadhātu, viññāṇadhātu. 

dn33:2.2.69
Pali: Cha nissaraṇiyā dhātuyo. 

dn33:2.2.70
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu evaṁ vadeyya: 

dn33:2.2.71
Pali: ‘mettā hi kho me cetovimutti bhāvitā bahulīkatā yānīkatā vatthukatā anuṭṭhitā paricitā susamāraddhā, 

dn33:2.2.72
Pali: atha ca pana me byāpādo cittaṁ pariyādāya tiṭṭhatī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.73
Pali: So ‘mā hevan’tissa vacanīyo, ‘māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

dn33:2.2.74
Pali: Aṭṭhānametaṁ, āvuso, anavakāso, yaṁ mettāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya. 

dn33:2.2.75
Pali: Atha ca panassa byāpādo cittaṁ pariyādāya ṭhassati, netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati. 

dn33:2.2.76
Pali: Nissaraṇaṁ hetaṁ, āvuso, byāpādassa, yadidaṁ mettā cetovimuttī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.77
Pali: Idha panāvuso, bhikkhu evaṁ vadeyya: 

dn33:2.2.78
Pali: ‘karuṇā hi kho me cetovimutti bhāvitā bahulīkatā yānīkatā vatthukatā anuṭṭhitā paricitā susamāraddhā. 

dn33:2.2.79
Pali: Atha ca pana me vihesā cittaṁ pariyādāya tiṭṭhatī’ti, 

dn33:2.2.80
Pali: so ‘mā hevan’tissa vacanīyo ‘māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

dn33:2.2.81
Pali: Aṭṭhānametaṁ, āvuso, anavakāso, yaṁ karuṇāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya, 

dn33:2.2.82
Pali: atha ca panassa vihesā cittaṁ pariyādāya ṭhassati, netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati. 

dn33:2.2.83
Pali: Nissaraṇaṁ hetaṁ, āvuso, vihesāya, yadidaṁ karuṇā cetovimuttī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.84
Pali: Idha panāvuso, bhikkhu evaṁ vadeyya: 

dn33:2.2.85
Pali: ‘muditā hi kho me cetovimutti bhāvitā bahulīkatā yānīkatā vatthukatā anuṭṭhitā paricitā susamāraddhā. 

dn33:2.2.86
Pali: Atha ca pana me arati cittaṁ pariyādāya tiṭṭhatī’ti, 

dn33:2.2.87
Pali: so ‘mā hevan’tissa vacanīyo ‘māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

dn33:2.2.88
Pali: Aṭṭhānametaṁ, āvuso, anavakāso, yaṁ muditāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya, 

dn33:2.2.89
Pali: atha ca panassa arati cittaṁ pariyādāya ṭhassati, netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati. 

dn33:2.2.90
Pali: Nissaraṇaṁ hetaṁ, āvuso, aratiyā, yadidaṁ muditā cetovimuttī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.91
Pali: Idha panāvuso, bhikkhu evaṁ vadeyya: 

dn33:2.2.92
Pali: ‘upekkhā hi kho me cetovimutti bhāvitā bahulīkatā yānīkatā vatthukatā anuṭṭhitā paricitā susamāraddhā. 

dn33:2.2.93
Pali: Atha ca pana me rāgo cittaṁ pariyādāya tiṭṭhatī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.94
Pali: So ‘mā hevan’tissa vacanīyo ‘māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

dn33:2.2.95
Pali: Aṭṭhānametaṁ, āvuso, anavakāso, yaṁ upekkhāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya, 

dn33:2.2.96
Pali: atha ca panassa rāgo cittaṁ pariyādāya ṭhassati netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati. 

dn33:2.2.97
Pali: Nissaraṇaṁ hetaṁ, āvuso, rāgassa, yadidaṁ upekkhā cetovimuttī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.98
Pali: Idha panāvuso, bhikkhu evaṁ vadeyya: 

dn33:2.2.99
Pali: ‘animittā hi kho me cetovimutti bhāvitā bahulīkatā yānīkatā vatthukatā anuṭṭhitā paricitā susamāraddhā. 

dn33:2.2.100
Pali: Atha ca pana me nimittānusāri viññāṇaṁ hotī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.101
Pali: So ‘mā hevan’tissa vacanīyo ‘māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

dn33:2.2.102
Pali: Aṭṭhānametaṁ, āvuso, anavakāso, yaṁ animittāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya, 

dn33:2.2.103
Pali: atha ca panassa nimittānusāri viññāṇaṁ bhavissati, netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati. 

dn33:2.2.104
Pali: Nissaraṇaṁ hetaṁ, āvuso, sabbanimittānaṁ, yadidaṁ animittā cetovimuttī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.105
Pali: Idha panāvuso, bhikkhu evaṁ vadeyya: 

dn33:2.2.106
Pali: ‘asmīti kho me vigataṁ, ayamahamasmīti na samanupassāmi, 

dn33:2.2.107
Pali: atha ca pana me vicikicchākathaṅkathāsallaṁ cittaṁ pariyādāya tiṭṭhatī’ti. 

dn33:2.2.108
Pali: So ‘mā hevan’tissa vacanīyo ‘māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

dn33:2.2.109
Pali: Aṭṭhānametaṁ, āvuso, anavakāso, yaṁ asmīti vigate ayamahamasmīti asamanupassato, 

dn33:2.2.110
Pali: atha ca panassa vicikicchākathaṅkathāsallaṁ cittaṁ pariyādāya ṭhassati, netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati. 

dn33:2.2.111
Pali: Nissaraṇaṁ hetaṁ, āvuso, vicikicchākathaṅkathāsallassa, yadidaṁ asmimānasamugghāto’ti. 

dn33:2.2.112
Pali: Cha anuttariyāni—

dn33:2.2.113
Pali: dassanānuttariyaṁ, savanānuttariyaṁ, lābhānuttariyaṁ, sikkhānuttariyaṁ, pāricariyānuttariyaṁ, anussatānuttariyaṁ. 

dn33:2.2.114
Pali: Cha anussatiṭṭhānāni—

dn33:2.2.115
Pali: buddhānussati, dhammānussati, saṅghānussati, sīlānussati, cāgānussati, devatānussati. 

dn33:2.2.116
Pali: Cha satatavihārā. 

dn33:2.2.117
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu cakkhunā rūpaṁ disvā neva sumano hoti na dummano, upekkhako viharati sato sampajāno. 

dn33:2.2.118
Pali: Sotena saddaṁ sutvā …pe… 

dn33:2.2.119
Pali: manasā dhammaṁ viññāya neva sumano hoti na dummano, upekkhako viharati sato sampajāno. 

dn33:2.2.120
Pali: Chaḷābhijātiyo. 

dn33:2.2.121
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco kaṇhābhijātiko samāno kaṇhaṁ dhammaṁ abhijāyati. 

dn33:2.2.122
Pali: Idha panāvuso, ekacco kaṇhābhijātiko samāno sukkaṁ dhammaṁ abhijāyati. 

dn33:2.2.123
Pali: Idha panāvuso, ekacco kaṇhābhijātiko samāno akaṇhaṁ asukkaṁ nibbānaṁ abhijāyati. 

dn33:2.2.124
Pali: Idha panāvuso, ekacco sukkābhijātiko samāno sukkaṁ dhammaṁ abhijāyati. 

dn33:2.2.125
Pali: Idha panāvuso, ekacco sukkābhijātiko samāno kaṇhaṁ dhammaṁ abhijāyati. 

dn33:2.2.126
Pali: Idha panāvuso, ekacco sukkābhijātiko samāno akaṇhaṁ asukkaṁ nibbānaṁ abhijāyati. 

dn33:2.2.127
Pali: Cha nibbedhabhāgiyā saññā—

dn33:2.2.128
Pali: aniccasaññā, anicce dukkhasaññā, dukkhe anattasaññā, pahānasaññā, virāgasaññā, nirodhasaññā. 

dn33:2.2.129
Pali: Ime kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena cha dhammā sammadakkhātā; 

dn33:2.2.130
Pali: tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:2.3.0
Pali: 7. Sattaka 

dn33:2.3.1
Pali: Atthi kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena satta dhammā sammadakkhātā; 

dn33:2.3.2
Pali: tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:2.3.3
Pali: Katame satta? 

dn33:2.3.4
Pali: Satta ariyadhanāni—

dn33:2.3.5
Pali: saddhādhanaṁ, sīladhanaṁ, hiridhanaṁ, ottappadhanaṁ, sutadhanaṁ, cāgadhanaṁ, paññādhanaṁ. 

dn33:2.3.6
Pali: Satta bojjhaṅgā—

dn33:2.3.7
Pali: satisambojjhaṅgo, dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgo, vīriyasambojjhaṅgo, pītisambojjhaṅgo, passaddhisambojjhaṅgo, samādhisambojjhaṅgo, upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo. 

dn33:2.3.8
Pali: Satta samādhiparikkhārā—

dn33:2.3.9
Pali: sammādiṭṭhi, sammāsaṅkappo, sammāvācā, sammākammanto, sammāājīvo, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati. 

dn33:2.3.10
Pali: Satta asaddhammā—

dn33:2.3.11
Pali: idhāvuso, bhikkhu assaddho hoti, ahiriko hoti, anottappī hoti, appassuto hoti, kusīto hoti, muṭṭhassati hoti, duppañño hoti. 

dn33:2.3.12
Pali: Satta saddhammā—

dn33:2.3.13
Pali: idhāvuso, bhikkhu saddho hoti, hirimā hoti, ottappī hoti, bahussuto hoti, āraddhavīriyo hoti, upaṭṭhitassati hoti, paññavā hoti. 

dn33:2.3.14
Pali: Satta sappurisadhammā—

dn33:2.3.15
Pali: idhāvuso, bhikkhu dhammaññū ca hoti atthaññū ca attaññū ca mattaññū ca kālaññū ca parisaññū ca puggalaññū ca. 

dn33:2.3.16
Pali: Satta niddasavatthūni. 

dn33:2.3.17
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu sikkhāsamādāne tibbacchando hoti, āyatiñca sikkhāsamādāne avigatapemo. 

dn33:2.3.18
Pali: Dhammanisantiyā tibbacchando hoti, āyatiñca dhammanisantiyā avigatapemo. 

dn33:2.3.19
Pali: Icchāvinaye tibbacchando hoti, āyatiñca icchāvinaye avigatapemo. 

dn33:2.3.20
Pali: Paṭisallāne tibbacchando hoti, āyatiñca paṭisallāne avigatapemo. 

dn33:2.3.21
Pali: Vīriyārambhe tibbacchando hoti, āyatiñca vīriyārambhe avigatapemo. 

dn33:2.3.22
Pali: Satinepakke tibbacchando hoti, āyatiñca satinepakke avigatapemo. 

dn33:2.3.23
Pali: Diṭṭhipaṭivedhe tibbacchando hoti, āyatiñca diṭṭhipaṭivedhe avigatapemo. 

dn33:2.3.24
Pali: Satta saññā—

dn33:2.3.25
Pali: aniccasaññā, anattasaññā, asubhasaññā, ādīnavasaññā, pahānasaññā, virāgasaññā, nirodhasaññā. 

dn33:2.3.26
Pali: Satta balāni—

dn33:2.3.27
Pali: saddhābalaṁ, vīriyabalaṁ, hiribalaṁ, ottappabalaṁ, satibalaṁ, samādhibalaṁ, paññābalaṁ. 

dn33:2.3.28
Pali: Satta viññāṇaṭṭhitiyo. 

dn33:2.3.29
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā nānattakāyā nānattasaññino, seyyathāpi manussā ekacce ca devā ekacce ca vinipātikā. 

dn33:2.3.30
Pali: Ayaṁ paṭhamā viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn33:2.3.31
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā nānattakāyā ekattasaññino seyyathāpi devā brahmakāyikā paṭhamābhinibbattā. 

dn33:2.3.32
Pali: Ayaṁ dutiyā viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn33:2.3.33
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā ekattakāyā nānattasaññino seyyathāpi devā ābhassarā. 

dn33:2.3.34
Pali: Ayaṁ tatiyā viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn33:2.3.35
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā ekattakāyā ekattasaññino seyyathāpi devā subhakiṇhā. 

dn33:2.3.36
Pali: Ayaṁ catutthī viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn33:2.3.37
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā sabbaso rūpasaññānaṁ samatikkamā paṭighasaññānaṁ atthaṅgamā nānattasaññānaṁ amanasikārā ‘ananto ākāso’ti ākāsānañcāyatanūpagā. 

dn33:2.3.38
Pali: Ayaṁ pañcamī viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn33:2.3.39
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā sabbaso ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma ‘anantaṁ viññāṇan’ti viññāṇañcāyatanūpagā. 

dn33:2.3.40
Pali: Ayaṁ chaṭṭhī viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn33:2.3.41
Pali: Santāvuso, sattā sabbaso viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma ‘natthi kiñcī’ti ākiñcaññāyatanūpagā. 

dn33:2.3.42
Pali: Ayaṁ sattamī viññāṇaṭṭhiti. 

dn33:2.3.43
Pali: Satta puggalā dakkhiṇeyyā—

dn33:2.3.44
Pali: ubhatobhāgavimutto, paññāvimutto, kāyasakkhi, diṭṭhippatto, saddhāvimutto, dhammānusārī, saddhānusārī. 

dn33:2.3.45
Pali: Satta anusayā—

dn33:2.3.46
Pali: kāmarāgānusayo, paṭighānusayo, diṭṭhānusayo, vicikicchānusayo, mānānusayo, bhavarāgānusayo, avijjānusayo. 

dn33:2.3.47
Pali: Satta saṁyojanāni—

dn33:2.3.48
Pali: anunayasaṁyojanaṁ, paṭighasaṁyojanaṁ, diṭṭhisaṁyojanaṁ, vicikicchāsaṁyojanaṁ, mānasaṁyojanaṁ, bhavarāgasaṁyojanaṁ, avijjāsaṁyojanaṁ. 

dn33:2.3.49
Pali: Satta adhikaraṇasamathā uppannuppannānaṁ adhikaraṇānaṁ samathāya vūpasamāya—

dn33:2.3.50
Pali: sammukhāvinayo dātabbo, sativinayo dātabbo, amūḷhavinayo dātabbo, paṭiññāya kāretabbaṁ, yebhuyyasikā, tassapāpiyasikā, tiṇavatthārako. 

dn33:2.3.51
Pali: Ime kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena satta dhammā sammadakkhātā; 

dn33:2.3.52
Pali: tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:2.3.53
Pali: Dutiyabhāṇavāro niṭṭhito. 

dn33:3.1.0
Pali: 8. Aṭṭhaka 

dn33:3.1.1
Pali: Atthi kho, āvuso, tena bhagavatā jānatā passatā arahatā sammāsambuddhena aṭṭha dhammā sammadakkhātā; 

dn33:3.1.2
Pali: tattha sabbeheva saṅgāyitabbaṁ …pe… atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

dn33:3.1.3
Pali: Katame aṭṭha? 

dn33:3.1.4
Pali: Aṭṭha micchattā—

dn33:3.1.5
Pali: micchādiṭṭhi, micchāsaṅkappo, micchāvācā, micchākammanto, micchāājīvo, micchāvāyāmo micchāsati, micchāsamādhi. 

dn33:3.1.6
Pali: Aṭṭha sammattā—

dn33:3.1.7
Pali: sammādiṭṭhi, sammāsaṅkappo, sammāvācā, sammākammanto, sammāājīvo, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati, sammāsamādhi. 

dn33:3.1.8
Pali: Aṭṭha puggalā dakkhiṇeyyā—

dn33:3.1.9
Pali: sotāpanno, sotāpattiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipanno; sakadāgāmī, sakadāgāmiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipanno; anāgāmī, anāgāmiphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipanno; arahā, arahattaphalasacchikiriyāya paṭipanno. 

dn33:3.1.10
Pali: Aṭṭha kusītavatthūni. 

dn33:3.1.11
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhunā kammaṁ kātabbaṁ hoti. 

dn33:3.1.12
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.13
Pali: ‘kammaṁ kho me kātabbaṁ bhavissati, kammaṁ kho pana me karontassa kāyo kilamissati, handāhaṁ nipajjāmī’ti. 

dn33:3.1.14
Pali: So nipajjati na vīriyaṁ ārabhati appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya. 

dn33:3.1.15
Pali: Idaṁ paṭhamaṁ kusītavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.16
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhunā kammaṁ kataṁ hoti. 

dn33:3.1.17
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.18
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho kammaṁ akāsiṁ, kammaṁ kho pana me karontassa kāyo kilanto, handāhaṁ nipajjāmī’ti. 

dn33:3.1.19
Pali: So nipajjati na vīriyaṁ ārabhati …pe… 

dn33:3.1.20
Pali: idaṁ dutiyaṁ kusītavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.21
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhunā maggo gantabbo hoti. 

dn33:3.1.22
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.23
Pali: ‘maggo kho me gantabbo bhavissati, maggaṁ kho pana me gacchantassa kāyo kilamissati, handāhaṁ nipajjāmī’ti. 

dn33:3.1.24
Pali: So nipajjati na vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.25
Pali: idaṁ tatiyaṁ kusītavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.26
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhunā maggo gato hoti. 

dn33:3.1.27
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.28
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho maggaṁ agamāsiṁ, maggaṁ kho pana me gacchantassa kāyo kilanto, handāhaṁ nipajjāmī’ti. 

dn33:3.1.29
Pali: So nipajjati na vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.30
Pali: idaṁ catutthaṁ kusītavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.31
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā piṇḍāya caranto na labhati lūkhassa vā paṇītassa vā bhojanassa yāvadatthaṁ pāripūriṁ. 

dn33:3.1.32
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.33
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā piṇḍāya caranto nālatthaṁ lūkhassa vā paṇītassa vā bhojanassa yāvadatthaṁ pāripūriṁ, tassa me kāyo kilanto akammañño, handāhaṁ nipajjāmī’ti. 

dn33:3.1.34
Pali: So nipajjati na vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.35
Pali: idaṁ pañcamaṁ kusītavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.36
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā piṇḍāya caranto labhati lūkhassa vā paṇītassa vā bhojanassa yāvadatthaṁ pāripūriṁ. 

dn33:3.1.37
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.38
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā piṇḍāya caranto alatthaṁ lūkhassa vā paṇītassa vā bhojanassa yāvadatthaṁ pāripūriṁ, tassa me kāyo garuko akammañño, māsācitaṁ maññe, handāhaṁ nipajjāmī’ti. 

dn33:3.1.39
Pali: So nipajjati na vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.40
Pali: idaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ kusītavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.41
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno uppanno hoti appamattako ābādho. 

dn33:3.1.42
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.43
Pali: ‘uppanno kho me ayaṁ appamattako ābādho; 

dn33:3.1.44
Pali: atthi kappo nipajjituṁ, handāhaṁ nipajjāmī’ti. 

dn33:3.1.45
Pali: So nipajjati na vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.46
Pali: idaṁ sattamaṁ kusītavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.47
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu gilānā vuṭṭhito hoti aciravuṭṭhito gelaññā. 

dn33:3.1.48
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.49
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho gilānā vuṭṭhito aciravuṭṭhito gelaññā, tassa me kāyo dubbalo akammañño, handāhaṁ nipajjāmī’ti. 

dn33:3.1.50
Pali: So nipajjati na vīriyaṁ ārabhati appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya. 

dn33:3.1.51
Pali: Idaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ kusītavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.52
Pali: Aṭṭha ārambhavatthūni. 

dn33:3.1.53
Pali: Idhāvuso, bhikkhunā kammaṁ kātabbaṁ hoti. 

dn33:3.1.54
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.55
Pali: ‘kammaṁ kho me kātabbaṁ bhavissati, kammaṁ kho pana me karontena na sukaraṁ buddhānaṁ sāsanaṁ manasi kātuṁ, handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya, asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāyā’ti. 

dn33:3.1.56
Pali: So vīriyaṁ ārabhati appattassa pattiyā, anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya. 

dn33:3.1.57
Pali: Idaṁ paṭhamaṁ ārambhavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.58
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhunā kammaṁ kataṁ hoti. 

dn33:3.1.59
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.60
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho kammaṁ akāsiṁ, kammaṁ kho panāhaṁ karonto nāsakkhiṁ buddhānaṁ sāsanaṁ manasi kātuṁ, handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi …pe… 

dn33:3.1.61
Pali: so vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.62
Pali: idaṁ dutiyaṁ ārambhavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.63
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhunā maggo gantabbo hoti. 

dn33:3.1.64
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.65
Pali: ‘maggo kho me gantabbo bhavissati, maggaṁ kho pana me gacchantena na sukaraṁ buddhānaṁ sāsanaṁ manasi kātuṁ. 

dn33:3.1.66
Pali: Handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi …pe… 

dn33:3.1.67
Pali: so vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.68
Pali: idaṁ tatiyaṁ ārambhavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.69
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhunā maggo gato hoti. 

dn33:3.1.70
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.71
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho maggaṁ agamāsiṁ, maggaṁ kho panāhaṁ gacchanto nāsakkhiṁ buddhānaṁ sāsanaṁ manasi kātuṁ, handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi …pe… 

dn33:3.1.72
Pali: so vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.73
Pali: idaṁ catutthaṁ ārambhavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.74
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā piṇḍāya caranto na labhati lūkhassa vā paṇītassa vā bhojanassa yāvadatthaṁ pāripūriṁ. 

dn33:3.1.75
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.76
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā piṇḍāya caranto nālatthaṁ lūkhassa vā paṇītassa vā bhojanassa yāvadatthaṁ pāripūriṁ, tassa me kāyo lahuko kammañño, handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi …pe… 

dn33:3.1.77
Pali: so vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.78
Pali: idaṁ pañcamaṁ ārambhavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.79
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā piṇḍāya caranto labhati lūkhassa vā paṇītassa vā bhojanassa yāvadatthaṁ pāripūriṁ. 

dn33:3.1.80
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.81
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā piṇḍāya caranto alatthaṁ lūkhassa vā paṇītassa vā bhojanassa yāvadatthaṁ pāripūriṁ, tassa me kāyo balavā kammañño, handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi …pe… 

dn33:3.1.82
Pali: so vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.83
Pali: idaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ ārambhavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.84
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhuno uppanno hoti appamattako ābādho. 

dn33:3.1.85
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.86
Pali: ‘uppanno kho me ayaṁ appamattako ābādho, ṭhānaṁ kho panetaṁ vijjati yaṁ me ābādho pavaḍḍheyya, handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi …pe… 

dn33:3.1.87
Pali: so vīriyaṁ ārabhati … 

dn33:3.1.88
Pali: idaṁ sattamaṁ ārambhavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.89
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu gilānā vuṭṭhito hoti aciravuṭṭhito gelaññā. 

dn33:3.1.90
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.91
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho gilānā vuṭṭhito aciravuṭṭhito gelaññā, ṭhānaṁ kho panetaṁ vijjati yaṁ me ābādho paccudāvatteyya, handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāyā’ti. 

dn33:3.1.92
Pali: So vīriyaṁ ārabhati appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya. 

dn33:3.1.93
Pali: Idaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ ārambhavatthu. 

dn33:3.1.94
Pali: Aṭṭha dānavatthūni. 

dn33:3.1.95
Pali: Āsajja dānaṁ deti, bhayā dānaṁ deti, ‘adāsi me’ti dānaṁ deti, ‘dassati me’ti dānaṁ deti, ‘sāhu dānan’ti dānaṁ deti, ‘ahaṁ pacāmi, ime na pacanti, nārahāmi pacanto apacantānaṁ dānaṁ na dātun’ti dānaṁ deti, ‘idaṁ me dānaṁ dadato kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggacchatī’ti dānaṁ deti. 

dn33:3.1.96
Pali: Cittālaṅkāracittaparikkhāratthaṁ dānaṁ deti. 

dn33:3.1.97
Pali: Aṭṭha dānūpapattiyo. 

dn33:3.1.98
Pali: Idhāvuso, ekacco dānaṁ deti samaṇassa vā brāhmaṇassa vā annaṁ pānaṁ vatthaṁ yānaṁ mālāgandhavilepanaṁ seyyāvasathapadīpeyyaṁ. 

dn33:3.1.99
Pali: So yaṁ deti taṁ paccāsīsati. 

dn33:3.1.100
Pali: So passati khattiyamahāsālaṁ vā brāhmaṇamahāsālaṁ vā gahapatimahāsālaṁ vā pañcahi kāmaguṇehi samappitaṁ samaṅgībhūtaṁ paricārayamānaṁ. 

dn33:3.1.101
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.102
Pali: ‘aho vatāhaṁ kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā khattiyamahāsālānaṁ vā brāhmaṇamahāsālānaṁ vā gahapatimahāsālānaṁ vā sahabyataṁ upapajjeyyan’ti. 

dn33:3.1.103
Pali: So taṁ cittaṁ dahati, taṁ cittaṁ adhiṭṭhāti, taṁ cittaṁ bhāveti, tassa taṁ cittaṁ hīne vimuttaṁ uttari abhāvitaṁ tatrūpapattiyā saṁvattati. 

dn33:3.1.104
Pali: Tañca kho sīlavato vadāmi no dussīlassa. 

dn33:3.1.105
Pali: Ijjhatāvuso, sīlavato cetopaṇidhi visuddhattā. 

dn33:3.1.106
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, idhekacco dānaṁ deti samaṇassa vā brāhmaṇassa vā annaṁ pānaṁ …pe… seyyāvasathapadīpeyyaṁ. 

dn33:3.1.107
Pali: So yaṁ deti taṁ paccāsīsati. 

dn33:3.1.108
Pali: Tassa sutaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.109
Pali: ‘cātumahārājikā devā dīghāyukā vaṇṇavanto sukhabahulā’ti. 

dn33:3.1.110
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.111
Pali: ‘aho vatāhaṁ kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā cātumahārājikānaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjeyyan’ti. 

dn33:3.1.112
Pali: So taṁ cittaṁ dahati, taṁ cittaṁ adhiṭṭhāti, taṁ cittaṁ bhāveti, tassa taṁ cittaṁ hīne vimuttaṁ uttari abhāvitaṁ tatrūpapattiyā saṁvattati. 

dn33:3.1.113
Pali: Tañca kho sīlavato vadāmi no dussīlassa. 

dn33:3.1.114
Pali: Ijjhatāvuso, sīlavato cetopaṇidhi visuddhattā. 

dn33:3.1.115
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, idhekacco dānaṁ deti samaṇassa vā brāhmaṇassa vā annaṁ pānaṁ …pe… seyyāvasathapadīpeyyaṁ. 

dn33:3.1.116
Pali: So yaṁ deti taṁ paccāsīsati. 

dn33:3.1.117
Pali: Tassa sutaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.118
Pali: ‘tāvatiṁsā devā …pe… 

dn33:3.1.119
Pali: yāmā devā …pe… 

dn33:3.1.120
Pali: tusitā devā …pe… 

dn33:3.1.121
Pali: nimmānaratī devā …pe… 

dn33:3.1.122
Pali: paranimmitavasavattī devā dīghāyukā vaṇṇavanto sukhabahulā’ti. 

dn33:3.1.123
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.124
Pali: ‘aho vatāhaṁ kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā paranimmitavasavattīnaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjeyyan’ti. 

dn33:3.1.125
Pali: So taṁ cittaṁ dahati, taṁ cittaṁ adhiṭṭhāti, taṁ cittaṁ bhāveti, tassa taṁ cittaṁ hīne vimuttaṁ uttari abhāvitaṁ tatrūpapattiyā saṁvattati. 

dn33:3.1.126
Pali: Tañca kho sīlavato vadāmi no dussīlassa. 

dn33:3.1.127
Pali: Ijjhatāvuso, sīlavato cetopaṇidhi visuddhattā. 

dn33:3.1.128
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, āvuso, idhekacco dānaṁ deti samaṇassa vā brāhmaṇassa vā annaṁ pānaṁ vatthaṁ yānaṁ mālāgandhavilepanaṁ seyyāvasathapadīpeyyaṁ. 

dn33:3.1.129
Pali: So yaṁ deti taṁ paccāsīsati. 

dn33:3.1.130
Pali: Tassa sutaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.131
Pali: ‘brahmakāyikā devā dīghāyukā vaṇṇavanto sukhabahulā’ti. 

dn33:3.1.132
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti: 

dn33:3.1.133
Pali: ‘aho vatāhaṁ kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā brahmakāyikānaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjeyyan’ti. 

dn33:3.1.134
Pali: So taṁ cittaṁ dahati, taṁ cittaṁ adhiṭṭhāti, taṁ cittaṁ bhāveti, tassa taṁ cittaṁ hīne vimuttaṁ uttari abhāvitaṁ tatrūpapattiyā saṁvattati. 

dn33:3.1.135
Pali: Tañca kho sīlavato vadāmi no dussīlassa; 

dn33:3.1.136
Pali: vītarāgassa no sarāgassa. 

dn33:3.1.137
Pali: Ijjhatāvuso, sīlavato cetopaṇidhi vītarāgattā. 

dn33:3.1.138
Pali: Aṭṭha parisā—

dn33:3.1.139
Pali: khattiyaparisā, brāhmaṇaparisā, gahapatiparisā, samaṇaparisā, cātumahārājikaparisā, tāvatiṁsaparisā, māraparisā, brahmaparisā. 

dn33:3.1.140
Pali: Aṭṭha lokadhammā—

dn33:3.1.141
Pali: lābho ca, alābho ca, yaso ca, ayaso ca, nindā ca, pasaṁsā ca, sukhañca, dukkhañca. 

dn33:3.1.142
Pali: Aṭṭha abhibhāyatanāni. 

dn33:3.1.143
Pali: Ajjhattaṁ rūpasaññī eko bahiddhā rūpāni passati parittāni suvaṇṇadubbaṇṇāni, ‘tāni abhibhuyya jānāmi passāmī’ti evaṁsaññī hoti. 

dn33:3.1.144
